  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award. Business justification: Research training grants (NIH T32, NSF fellowships, etc.) provide student stipends administered as scholarships. Financial aid office must track the originating research award for federal reporting (I']
  student_org_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to studentlife.student_org. Business justification: Many scholarships are restricted to members of specific student organizations (Greek life scholarships, club-specific awards, honor society scholarships). Business process: Scholarship eligibility ver']
  academic_level varchar [note: 'Academic level or degree program for which the scholarship is available. Restricts eligibility to undergraduate, graduate, doctoral, professional, or postdoctoral students, or allows any level.']
  application_deadline date [note: 'Final date by which students must submit scholarship applications or supporting materials to be considered for the award cycle.']
  application_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether students must submit a separate scholarship application to be considered, or if the scholarship is automatically awarded based on admission or FAFSA data.']
  award_notification_date date [note: 'Date on which scholarship recipients are notified of their award. Used for planning financial aid packaging timelines and student communication.']
  class_standing varchar [note: 'Specific class year or standing required for scholarship eligibility. May restrict awards to incoming freshmen, continuing sophomores, juniors, seniors, or graduate students.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address for scholarship inquiries and administration. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the institutional staff member, department, or external organization contact responsible for administering the scholarship and answering student inquiries.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for scholarship inquiries and administration. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  coordination_rule varchar [note: 'Rule governing how this scholarship interacts with other financial aid in the student\'s award package. Determines whether the scholarship is stackable with other aid, reduces need-based aid, replaces loans, replaces work-study, or has no coordination requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the scholarship record was first created in the system. Audit field for data lineage and compliance.']
  donor_organization_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual donor, corporation, foundation, or organization that established or funds the scholarship. Critical for external and endowed scholarships for stewardship and recognition purposes.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the scholarship program ends or is no longer available for new awards. Null for perpetual endowed scholarships or ongoing programs.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the scholarship becomes available for awarding. Marks the beginning of the scholarship program\'s active period.']
  eligibility_criteria varchar [note: 'Comprehensive description of all eligibility requirements for the scholarship, including academic qualifications, demographic criteria, residency requirements, major or program restrictions, financial need thresholds, and any other donor-specified or institutional criteria.']
  endowment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship is funded by an endowment with perpetual principal and annual earnings distribution, as opposed to annual or one-time funding.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the scholarship funds. Indicates whether the scholarship is funded by the institution, federal government, state government, private donor, corporation, foundation, alumni association, or endowment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: institutional|federal|state|private|corporate|foundation|alumni|endowment — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  major_restriction varchar [note: 'Academic major, program, or field of study required for scholarship eligibility. May specify a single major, a list of eligible majors, or a broad discipline such as STEM (Science Technology Engineering Mathematics) or business.']
  maximum_award_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum dollar amount that can be awarded to a single recipient per academic year or term. Used in financial aid packaging to cap individual awards.']
  maximum_years_awarded varchar [note: 'Maximum number of academic years a student may receive this scholarship, including initial award and renewals. Typically 4 for undergraduate scholarships, variable for graduate programs.']
  merit_based_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship is awarded based on academic merit, standardized test scores, or other achievement criteria independent of financial need.']
  minimum_award_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Minimum dollar amount that must be awarded if the scholarship is granted. Ensures awards meet donor or program requirements for minimum funding levels.']
  minimum_credit_hours varchar [note: 'Minimum number of credit hours per term that a student must be enrolled in to be eligible for or retain the scholarship. Typically used to enforce full-time or half-time enrollment requirements.']
  minimum_gpa decimal(3,2) [note: 'Minimum cumulative or term GPA required for initial eligibility or renewal of the scholarship. Expressed on a 4.0 scale.']
  need_based_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship requires demonstrated financial need as determined by FAFSA (Free Application for Federal Student Aid) and EFC (Expected Family Contribution) calculations.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for internal administrative notes, special instructions, donor preferences, or historical context about the scholarship program. Not visible to students.']
  renewable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship can be renewed for multiple academic years if the recipient continues to meet eligibility criteria.']
  renewal_criteria varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the academic, enrollment, and behavioral requirements a student must maintain to renew the scholarship for subsequent years. May include minimum GPA, credit hour requirements, major continuation, and Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP) standards.']
  reporting_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the scholarship for IPEDS (Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System) and other regulatory reporting purposes. Aligns with federal financial aid reporting categories.']
  residency_requirement varchar [note: 'Geographic or residency restrictions for scholarship eligibility, such as state residency, county of origin, or international student status. May specify in-state, out-of-state, or specific geographic regions.']
  scholarship_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code or identifier for the scholarship used in financial aid packaging and student communications. Business identifier for the scholarship.']
  scholarship_name varchar [note: 'Full official name of the scholarship or grant program as it appears in institutional publications and award letters.']
  scholarship_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the scholarship. Indicates whether the scholarship is actively available for awarding, temporarily suspended, permanently discontinued, or pending approval for activation.']
  scholarship_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the scholarship by its primary awarding criteria and funding structure. Distinguishes merit-based, need-based, departmental, endowed, external/private, athletic, diversity, research, and service scholarships. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: merit|need_based|departmental|endowed|external|athletic|diversity|research|service — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  taxable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship is considered taxable income under IRS regulations. Scholarships used for room, board, or non-qualified expenses may be taxable.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the scholarship record was last modified. Audit field for tracking changes to scholarship terms, funding, or eligibility criteria.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Web address for additional scholarship information, application instructions, and donor recognition. May link to institutional financial aid portal or external scholarship provider site.']

  Note: 'Master catalog record for institutionally administered and externally sourced scholarships and grants, including merit-based, need-based, departmental, endowed, and outside/private scholarships. Captures scholarship name, funding source, eligibility criteria, renewable flag, renewal criteria, maximum award amount, donor/organization for external awards, and coordination rules for need-based aid packaging. SSOT for the institutional scholarship catalog and external scholarship registry.'
}

Table aid.r2t4_calculation {
  r2t4_calculation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the R2T4 calculation record. Primary key.']
  aid_year_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the financial aid year in which the withdrawal occurred.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.journal_entry. Business justification: Return of Title IV calculations create journal entries to reverse aid revenue and establish federal liabilities. Federal regulation 34 CFR 668.22 requires proper accounting of returned funds. Critical']
  original_calculation_r2t4_calculation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the original R2T4 calculation record if this is a recalculation. Null if this is the initial calculation.']
  primary_r2t4_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the financial aid staff member who performed or initiated the R2T4 calculation.']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the student who withdrew and triggered the R2T4 calculation.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: R2T4 calculations must follow 34 CFR 668.22 precisely, including percentage calculation methodology, post-withdrawal disbursement rules, and return allocation order. Regulatory reference is mandatory ']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.student_athlete. Business justification: Return of Title IV calculations for withdrawn student-athletes require coordination with athletic compliance to determine impact on athletic scholarship, eligibility clock, and seasons of competition.']
  studentlife_housing_assignment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to studentlife.housing_assignment. Business justification: Return of Title IV calculations must include institutional charges for housing and prorated refunds based on actual housing assignment dates. Business process: R2T4 institutional charges component req']
  term_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the academic term (payment period) in which the withdrawal occurred.']
  calculation_method varchar [note: 'Method used for the R2T4 calculation based on the program structure: standard (credit-hour term-based), modular (courses not spanning entire term), or nonstandard term (non-traditional calendar).']
  calculation_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the R2T4 calculation, typically formatted as aid year, term, and sequence number for audit and tracking purposes.']
  calculation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the R2T4 calculation process.']
  calculation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the R2T4 calculation was performed or last recalculated.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this R2T4 calculation record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this calculation. Typically USD for U.S. Title IV aid.']
  days_completed varchar [note: 'Number of calendar days the student completed in the payment period before withdrawing, calculated from payment period start date to withdrawal date.']
  determination_date date [note: 'Date the institution determined that the student withdrew. This date triggers the 45-day return deadline and is critical for compliance timing.']
  grant_protection_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of grant aid protected from return under the 50% grant protection rule. Students are not required to return grant overpayments if the amount is 50% or less of total grants received.']
  institutional_charges decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total institutional charges (tuition, fees, room, board) assessed to the student for the payment period, used to calculate the institutional share of unearned aid to be returned.']
  institutional_return_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of unearned Title IV aid the institution is responsible for returning to the Department of Education, calculated based on institutional charges and unearned aid.']
  last_date_of_attendance date [note: 'Last documented date the student attended an academically-related activity. Used when the institution is required to take attendance.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this R2T4 calculation record was last modified in the system.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes documenting special circumstances, exceptions, or additional context related to the R2T4 calculation for audit and compliance purposes.']
  payment_period_days varchar [note: 'Total number of calendar days in the payment period, calculated as the difference between payment period end date and start date.']
  payment_period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the payment period (typically the term end date) used to calculate the percentage of the period completed.']
  payment_period_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the payment period (typically the term start date) used to calculate the percentage of the period completed.']
  percentage_completed decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the payment period the student completed before withdrawing, calculated as (days completed / payment period days) * 100. Capped at 60% per federal regulation.']
  post_withdrawal_disbursement_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of Title IV aid the student earned but was not yet disbursed at the time of withdrawal. The institution must offer this to the student within regulatory timeframes.']
  recalculation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this calculation is a recalculation of a previously completed R2T4 calculation, typically due to corrected data or audit findings.']
  return_completed_date date [note: 'Date the institution completed the return of unearned Title IV funds to the Department of Education.']
  return_deadline_date date [note: 'Deadline by which the institution must return unearned Title IV funds to the Department of Education, typically 45 days from the date the institution determined the student withdrew.']
  review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the R2T4 calculation was reviewed and approved.']
  sixty_percent_rule_applied boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the 60% rule was applied. If a student completes more than 60% of the payment period, they earn 100% of Title IV aid and no return is required.']
  student_return_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of unearned Title IV aid the student is responsible for returning, calculated as total unearned aid minus institutional return amount.']
  total_title_iv_aid_disbursed decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total amount of Title IV federal aid that was disbursed to the student or on behalf of the student for the payment period as of the withdrawal date.']
  total_title_iv_aid_earned decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of Title IV aid the student earned based on the percentage of the payment period completed, calculated as total disbursed aid * percentage completed (or 100% if percentage >= 60%).']
  total_title_iv_aid_unearned decimal(12,2) [note: 'Amount of Title IV aid that was not earned and must be returned, calculated as total disbursed aid - total earned aid.']
  withdrawal_date date [note: 'Official date the student withdrew from all courses in the payment period. This is the date used to determine the percentage of the payment period completed.']
  withdrawal_type varchar [note: 'Type of withdrawal that triggered the R2T4 calculation: official (student formally withdrew), unofficial (student stopped attending without formal withdrawal), or administrative (institution-initiated withdrawal).']

  Note: 'Return to Title IV (R2T4) calculation record triggered when a student withdraws from all courses during a payment period. Captures withdrawal date, last date of attendance, percentage of payment period completed, earned aid amount, unearned aid to be returned, institutional share, student share, return deadline, and completion status. SSOT for Title IV R2T4 compliance. Sourced from Ellucian Banner R2T4 module.'
}

Table aid.professional_judgment {
  professional_judgment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the professional judgment decision record.']
  aid_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aid.aid_application. Business justification: Professional judgment adjustments are made in the context of a specific aid application. The professional_judgment record should FK to the aid_application being adjusted. Column award_year is authorit']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the financial aid administrator who approved the professional judgment decision.']
  housing_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to studentlife.housing_application. Business justification: Professional judgment often involves housing cost adjustments (student requests commuter status due to family circumstances, documents inability to afford on-campus housing). PJ documentation must ref']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Professional judgment decisions must be made under documented institutional policies complying with 34 CFR 668.53. Policy reference ensures consistent application of PJ authority, documentation standa']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the student for whom professional judgment was exercised.']
  adjusted_coa decimal(12,2) [note: 'The revised Cost of Attendance after professional judgment adjustment.']
  adjusted_dependency_status varchar [note: 'The students revised dependency status (dependent or independent) after professional judgment override.']
  adjusted_efc decimal(12,2) [note: 'The recalculated Expected Family Contribution after professional judgment adjustment.']
  adjusted_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The new value of the element after professional judgment was applied (may be numeric, text, or status depending on adjustment category).']
  adjustment_category varchar [note: 'The financial aid element being adjusted: Expected Family Contribution (EFC), Cost of Attendance (COA), dependency status, income, assets, enrollment status, or other. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: efc|coa|dependency_status|income|assets|enrollment_status|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  appeal_deadline_date date [note: 'The deadline by which the student must submit an appeal of the professional judgment decision.']
  appeal_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student is eligible to appeal the professional judgment decision per institutional policy.']
  approving_administrator_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the financial aid administrator who approved the professional judgment decision.']
  approving_administrator_title varchar [note: 'Job title of the financial aid administrator who approved the professional judgment decision (e.g., Director of Financial Aid, Associate Director).']
  audit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this professional judgment case has been flagged for internal or external audit review.']
  audit_notes varchar [note: 'Notes or findings recorded during audit review of this professional judgment decision.']
  corrected_isir_transaction_number varchar [note: 'The ISIR transaction number for any corrected FAFSA submitted after professional judgment adjustment, if applicable.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this professional judgment record was first created in the system.']
  decision_date date [note: 'The date when the professional judgment decision was finalized (approved or denied).']
  decision_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the professional judgment decision: pending initial review, approved, denied, withdrawn by student, or under review.']
  denial_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation provided to the student if the professional judgment request was denied.']
  documentation_received_date date [note: 'The date when supporting documentation was received by the financial aid office.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which the professional judgment adjustment takes effect for financial aid packaging and disbursement.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date when the professional judgment adjustment expires or must be re-evaluated (typically end of award year).']
  isir_transaction_number varchar [note: 'The ISIR transaction number associated with the FAFSA data used for the original EFC calculation before professional judgment.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this professional judgment record was last updated.']
  original_coa decimal(12,2) [note: 'The original Cost of Attendance before professional judgment adjustment.']
  original_dependency_status varchar [note: 'The students original dependency status (dependent or independent) as determined by FAFSA before professional judgment.']
  original_efc decimal(12,2) [note: 'The original Expected Family Contribution calculated from the FAFSA before professional judgment adjustment.']
  original_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The original value of the element before professional judgment was applied (may be numeric, text, or status depending on adjustment category).']
  pj_type varchar [note: 'The category of professional judgment exercised: special circumstance (income/asset adjustment), dependency override (independent status), cost of attendance adjustment, unusual enrollment history waiver, satisfactory academic progress appeal, or other.']
  reason_code varchar [note: 'Institutional code or category describing the specific reason for the professional judgment (e.g., job loss, medical expenses, divorce, death of parent, natural disaster).']
  reason_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative explanation of the circumstances that warranted the professional judgment decision.']
  record_source varchar [note: 'The source system or module from which this professional judgment record originated (e.g., Ellucian Banner Financial Aid, manual entry).']
  repackaging_completed_date date [note: 'The date when the financial aid repackaging was completed following the professional judgment adjustment.']
  repackaging_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the students financial aid award package must be recalculated and reissued as a result of this professional judgment decision.']
  request_date date [note: 'The date when the student or family submitted the professional judgment request.']
  reviewer_notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes or comments recorded by the financial aid administrator during the review and decision process.']
  supporting_documentation varchar [note: 'Description or reference to the documentation submitted by the student to support the professional judgment request (e.g., tax returns, medical bills, unemployment notice, death certificate).']

  Note: 'Records instances where a financial aid administrator exercises professional judgment (PJ) to adjust a student\'s EFC, COA, or dependency status under 34 CFR 668.53. Captures PJ type (special circumstance, unusual enrollment history, dependency override), reason code, original value, adjusted value, supporting documentation, approving administrator, approval date, and award year. SSOT for PJ decisions and audit trail.'
}

Table aid.workstudy_assignment {
  workstudy_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the work-study assignment record. Primary key.']

Progr']

  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement.   research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award.   student_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.student_account. Business justification: Work-study earnings may credit student accounts or offset institutional charges depending on institutional policy. Billing tracks work-study activity for statement accuracy, account balance calculatio']
  studentlife_housing_assignment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to studentlife.housing_assignment. Business justification: Work-study positions in residence halls (RA, desk staff, facilities) are coordinated with housing assignments, often including reduced room charges as part of compensation package. Business process: I']

Work_location is currently free text that should be norm']

  assignment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the work-study assignment indicating whether the student is actively employed, pending start, or has concluded the assignment.']
  authorized_hours_per_week decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum number of hours per week the student is authorized to work under this assignment, typically capped to ensure academic progress.']
  community_service_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this work-study assignment qualifies as community service employment, which has specific federal reporting and percentage requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this work-study assignment record was first created in the system.']

  federal_share_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of wages paid by federal work-study funds, typically 75% for most positions and up to 100% for community service roles.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'The source of work-study funding: Federal Work-Study (FWS), institutional funds, or state-sponsored work-study programs.']
  hourly_rate decimal(10,2) [note: 'The hourly wage rate paid to the student for work performed, must meet or exceed federal or state minimum wage requirements.']
  i9_verification_date date [note: 'Date on which the students I-9 employment eligibility verification was completed.']
  i9_verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of the students I-9 employment eligibility verification, required for all U.S. work-study employment.']
  institutional_share_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of wages paid by the institution or employer, typically 25% for most positions unless higher federal share applies.']
  job_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the work-study job duties, responsibilities, and learning outcomes associated with the position.']
  last_updated_by varchar [note: 'Identifier or username of the financial aid counselor or system user who last modified this assignment record.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this work-study assignment record was most recently modified.']
  orientation_completed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student has completed required work-study orientation or onboarding training before beginning work.']
  orientation_completion_date date [note: 'Date on which the student completed work-study orientation or onboarding requirements.']
  payroll_account_code varchar [note: 'General ledger account code or cost center to which the students work-study wages are charged for financial accounting purposes.']
  remaining_balance decimal(12,2) [note: 'The remaining work-study award balance available for the student to earn, calculated as total award amount minus cumulative earnings to date.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for early termination or cancellation of the work-study assignment (e.g., student request, academic issues, employer decision, award exhausted).']
  total_award_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'The total work-study award amount allocated to the student for this assignment period, representing the maximum earnings authorized.']

  Note: 'Tracks Federal Work-Study (FWS) and institutional work-study job assignments for eligible students, including employer (on-campus department or off-campus community service site), position title, authorized hours per week, hourly rate, award period, cumulative earnings to date, remaining work-study balance, and assignment status. SSOT for work-study employment authorization. Sourced from Ellucian Banner Work-Study module.'
}

Table aid.veteran_benefit {
  veteran_benefit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the veteran benefit record. Primary key for the veteran benefit entity.']
  academic_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to curriculum.academic_program. Business justification: VA certification requires program-level tracking—each program must be VA-approved individually, benefits vary by program approval status, and SCOs must certify enrollment in specific approved programs']
  award_package_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aid.award_package. Business justification: Veteran education benefits are part of the overall financial aid package and should be coordinated with other aid. The veteran_benefit record should reference the award_package. This allows the instit']
  award_year_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the financial aid award year during which the veteran benefit is active. Links to the award year reference table.']
  certification_term_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the academic term for which enrollment was certified to the VA. Links to the term reference table in the Student Information System.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the School Certifying Official who certified the student\'s enrollment to the VA. Links to the employee or staff record responsible for VA certification compliance.']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the student receiving veteran education benefits. Links to the student master record in the Student Information System (SIS).']
  studentlife_housing_assignment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to studentlife.housing_assignment. Business justification: VA benefits include Basic Allowance for Housing (BAH) calculated based on verified housing status and zip code. VA certification process requires documented housing assignment to determine correct BAH']
  benefit_chapter varchar [note: 'The specific VA education benefit program chapter under which the student is receiving benefits. CH33 = Post-9/11 GI Bill, CH30 = Montgomery GI Bill Active Duty, CH35 = Survivors and Dependents Educational Assistance, CH1606 = Montgomery GI Bill Selected Reserve, VRAP = Veteran Rapid Retraining Assistance Program.']
  benefit_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of full benefit entitlement the student is eligible to receive, ranging from 0.00 to 100.00. For Post-9/11 GI Bill, determined by length of active duty service (e.g., 90 days = 40%, 36 months = 100%).']
  benefit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the veteran benefit. Active = currently receiving benefits, Pending = application submitted awaiting approval, Suspended = temporarily paused, Terminated = ended by student or institution, Exhausted = all benefit entitlement used, Denied = application rejected by VA.']
  book_stipend_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'The annual book and supplies stipend amount the student is eligible to receive under Post-9/11 GI Bill (CH33). Typically $1,000 per academic year, prorated based on training time and benefit percentage. Not applicable for other benefit chapters.']
  certificate_of_eligibility_number varchar [note: 'The unique certificate number issued by the Department of Veterans Affairs confirming the student\'s eligibility for education benefits. Required for enrollment certification and benefit disbursement.']
  certification_date date [note: 'The date on which the School Certifying Official (SCO) certified the student\'s enrollment to the VA for the current term. Required for VA payment processing and compliance tracking.']
  certified_credit_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'The number of credit hours certified to the VA for the current enrollment period. Used to determine the student\'s training time (full-time, three-quarter-time, half-time) and corresponding benefit payment rate.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this veteran benefit record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  delimiting_date date [note: 'The final date by which the student must use their veteran education benefits. For Post-9/11 GI Bill, typically 15 years from the date of last discharge from active duty. After this date, unused benefits expire.']
  eligibility_begin_date date [note: 'The date on which the student becomes eligible to receive veteran education benefits under this benefit chapter. Typically corresponds to the service discharge date or eligibility determination date.']
  eligibility_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the student\'s eligibility for veteran education benefits expires. For Post-9/11 GI Bill (CH33), typically 15 years from last discharge date. Null if no expiration or benefit exhausted before expiration.']
  kicker_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the student is eligible for an additional monthly kicker payment (also known as College Fund) based on their military service agreement. True = kicker eligible, False = not eligible. Kicker is an additional benefit on top of standard GI Bill payments.']
  kicker_monthly_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'The additional monthly kicker payment amount the student is eligible to receive based on their military service agreement. Null if student is not kicker eligible.']
  last_certification_change_date date [note: 'The date of the most recent change to the student\'s enrollment certification submitted to the VA. Changes may include enrollment status updates, credit hour adjustments, or program changes that affect benefit eligibility.']
  last_certification_change_reason varchar [note: 'Description of the reason for the most recent change to the student\'s enrollment certification. Examples include course withdrawal, program change, enrollment status change, or correction of certification error.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this veteran benefit record was most recently updated. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and data synchronization purposes.']
  last_payment_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'The dollar amount of the most recent benefit payment disbursed by the VA for this student. Includes tuition, housing allowance, and book stipend components as applicable.']
  last_payment_date date [note: 'The date of the most recent benefit payment disbursed by the VA for this student. Used for payment tracking and reconciliation purposes.']
  monthly_housing_allowance_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'The monthly housing allowance amount the student is eligible to receive under Post-9/11 GI Bill (CH33). Amount is based on the Basic Allowance for Housing (BAH) rate for an E-5 with dependents at the institution\'s ZIP code. Not applicable for other benefit chapters.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the VA benefit payment for the certified enrollment period. Pending = certification submitted awaiting VA processing, In Progress = VA processing payment, Paid = payment completed and disbursed, Denied = payment rejected by VA, Suspended = payment temporarily halted.']
  remaining_entitlement_months decimal(5,2) [note: 'The number of months of benefit entitlement remaining for the student. Typically starts at 36 months for full-time enrollment and decreases based on certified enrollment hours. Tracked to two decimal places for partial month usage.']
  sco_remarks varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and remarks entered by the School Certifying Official regarding the student\'s veteran benefit status, certification issues, special circumstances, or communication with the VA. Used for case management and compliance documentation.']
  training_time timestamp [note: 'The enrollment intensity classification for the student based on certified credit hours. Full-time = 12+ credits (undergraduate) or 9+ credits (graduate), Three-quarter-time = 9-11 credits (UG) or 7-8 credits (G), Half-time = 6-8 credits (UG) or 5-6 credits (G), Less-than-half-time = below half-time threshold.']
  tuition_and_fees_paid_to_school decimal(10,2) [note: 'The total amount of tuition and fees paid directly to the institution by the VA on behalf of the student for the current enrollment period. For Post-9/11 GI Bill, capped at the in-state tuition rate for public institutions or the national maximum for private institutions.']
  vocational_rehab_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the student is receiving benefits under the Vocational Rehabilitation and Employment (VR&E) program (Chapter 31) in addition to or instead of standard education benefits. True = VR&E participant, False = not VR&E participant.']
  vr_and_e_counselor_email varchar [note: 'The email address for the VA Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor assigned to the student. Null if student is not a VR&E participant.']
  vr_and_e_counselor_name varchar [note: 'The name of the VA Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor assigned to the student. Null if student is not a VR&E participant.']
  vr_and_e_counselor_phone varchar [note: 'The contact phone number for the VA Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor assigned to the student. Null if student is not a VR&E participant.']
  yellow_ribbon_institution_contribution decimal(10,2) [note: 'The amount the institution has agreed to contribute toward the student\'s tuition and fees under the Yellow Ribbon Program. The VA matches this amount dollar-for-dollar. Null if student is not a Yellow Ribbon participant.']
  yellow_ribbon_participant_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the student is participating in the Yellow Ribbon Program, which provides additional funding for tuition and fees exceeding the Post-9/11 GI Bill maximum benefit. True = participating, False = not participating. Only applicable to Post-9/11 GI Bill (CH33) recipients at 100% benefit level.']
  yellow_ribbon_va_contribution decimal(10,2) [note: 'The amount the Department of Veterans Affairs contributes toward the student\'s tuition and fees under the Yellow Ribbon Program, matching the institution\'s contribution. Null if student is not a Yellow Ribbon participant.']

  Note: 'Master record for students receiving veteran education benefits, including VA benefit chapter (Ch. 33 Post-9/11, Ch. 30 Montgomery GI Bill, Ch. 35, Ch. 1606, VR&E), certificate of eligibility, benefit percentage, enrollment certification details (certified hours, training time, certification date, certifying official), housing allowance, book stipend, Yellow Ribbon participation, and VA payment status. SSOT for veteran benefit administration, enrollment certification, and SCO compliance under 38 U.S.C.'
}

Table aid.fund_fee_coverage {
  fund_fee_coverage_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for this fund-fee coverage rule. Primary key.']
  aid_fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the financial aid fund that provides coverage']
  fee_schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the fee schedule that is eligible for coverage']
  coverage_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of the fee that this fund is authorized to cover. For example, 100.00 means full coverage, 50.00 means half coverage. Derived from detection phase relationship_data.']
  coverage_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of this coverage rule. Controls whether the rule is applied during aid disbursement processing.']
  created_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this coverage rule was created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date on which this coverage rule becomes active. Allows for temporal management of coverage policies. Derived from detection phase relationship_data.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which this coverage rule ceases to be active. Nullable for open-ended rules. Derived from detection phase relationship_data.']
  maximum_coverage_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'The maximum dollar amount this fund will cover for this fee type per student per term, regardless of percentage. Null if no cap applies. Derived from detection phase relationship_data.']
  modified_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this coverage rule was last modified.']
  priority_rank varchar [note: 'Numeric rank defining the order in which funds are applied when multiple funds can cover the same fee. Lower numbers indicate higher priority.']

  Note: 'This association product represents the coverage rules between financial aid funds and fee schedules. It captures which types of fees each aid fund is authorized to cover, the percentage of coverage allowed, and any dollar limits on that coverage. Each record links one aid fund to one fee schedule with attributes that define the coverage policy for that specific fund-fee combination.. Existence Justification: In higher education financial aid operations, institutions establish coverage rules that define which aid funds are authorized to pay for which fee types. A single aid fund (e.g., Federal Pell Grant) can cover multiple fee categories (tuition, technology fee, health fee), and a single fee type (e.g., tuition) can be covered by multiple funds (Pell, state grant, institutional scholarship). These coverage rules are actively managed by financial aid administrators and include policy attributes such as coverage percentage, dollar limits, and effective dates.'
}

Table aid.award_year {
  award_year_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for award_year']
  prior_award_year_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on award_year (prior_award_year_id)']
  academic_year_end_date date [note: 'The end date of the academic calendar year associated with this award year.']
  academic_year_start_date date [note: 'The start date of the academic calendar year associated with this award year, which may differ from the financial aid award year start date.']
  application_deadline_date date [note: 'The priority deadline date for students to submit financial aid applications for this award year.']
  application_open_date date [note: 'The date when financial aid applications open for this award year.']
  code varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the award year in format YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024). This is the externally-known code used across financial aid operations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this award year record was first created in the system.']
  default_cost_of_attendance_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The default or baseline cost of attendance amount used for financial aid calculations for this award year before student-specific adjustments.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description or notes about this award year including any special considerations, policy changes, or operational notes.']
  direct_subsidized_loan_annual_limit decimal(15,2) [note: 'The annual borrowing limit for Direct Subsidized Loans for dependent undergraduate students in this award year.']
  direct_unsubsidized_loan_annual_limit decimal(15,2) [note: 'The annual borrowing limit for Direct Unsubsidized Loans for undergraduate students in this award year.']
  disbursement_end_date date [note: 'The latest date financial aid disbursements can be made for this award year.']
  disbursement_start_date date [note: 'The earliest date financial aid disbursements can be made for this award year.']
  end_date date [note: 'The date when the award year ends and financial aid processing concludes for this period.']
  enrollment_end_date date [note: 'The latest date students can be enrolled for terms within this award year.']
  enrollment_start_date date [note: 'The earliest date students can begin enrollment for terms within this award year.']
  fafsa_cycle_code varchar [note: 'FAFSA processing cycle identifier associated with this award year for federal aid application processing.']
  federal_award_year_code varchar [note: 'Four-digit federal award year code used for Title IV federal student aid reporting and FAFSA processing (e.g., 2024 for the 2023-2024 award year).']
  federal_pell_maximum_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The maximum Federal Pell Grant award amount available for this award year as determined by federal regulations.']
  is_current_year boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this is the current active award year for financial aid operations.']
  is_default_year boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this award year should be used as the default selection in financial aid systems.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or label for the award year (e.g., \'Academic Year 2023-2024\').']
  packaging_end_date date [note: 'The date when financial aid packaging operations conclude for this award year.']
  packaging_start_date date [note: 'The date when financial aid packaging operations begin for this award year.']
  r2t4_calculation_enabled boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether Return to Title IV calculations are enabled and required for withdrawals in this award year.']
  sap_evaluation_required boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether Satisfactory Academic Progress evaluation is required for students receiving aid in this award year.']
  sort_order varchar [note: 'Numeric value used to control the display order of award years in user interfaces and reports, with lower values appearing first.']
  start_date date [note: 'The date when the award year becomes effective and financial aid processing begins for this period.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the award year indicating whether it is currently in use for financial aid processing.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this award year record was last modified in the system.']
  verification_deadline_date date [note: 'The deadline date by which students must complete verification requirements for this award year.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for award_year. Referenced by award_year_id.'
}

Table aid.master_promissory_note {
  master_promissory_note_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for master_promissory_note']
  lender_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the lender or loan servicer that holds the master promissory note.']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student who signed the master promissory note.']
  renewed_master_promissory_note_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on master_promissory_note (renewed_master_promissory_note_id)']
  borrower_address_line1 varchar [note: 'The first line of the borrower\'s mailing address at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_address_line2 varchar [note: 'The second line of the borrower\'s mailing address (apartment, suite, etc.).']
  borrower_city varchar [note: 'The city of the borrower\'s mailing address at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_country varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO country code of the borrower\'s mailing address at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_date_of_birth date [note: 'The date of birth of the student borrower.']
  borrower_email varchar [note: 'The primary email address of the student borrower at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_name varchar [note: 'The full legal name of the student borrower as it appears on the master promissory note.']
  borrower_phone varchar [note: 'The primary contact phone number of the student borrower at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_postal_code varchar [note: 'The postal code of the borrower\'s mailing address at the time of MPN signing.']
  borrower_ssn varchar [note: 'The Social Security Number of the student borrower who signed the master promissory note.']
  borrower_state varchar [note: 'The two-letter state code of the borrower\'s mailing address at the time of MPN signing.']
  cancellation_date date [note: 'The date on which the master promissory note was cancelled, if applicable.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'The reason for cancellation of the master promissory note, if applicable.']
  counseling_completed_date date [note: 'The date on which the borrower completed entrance counseling.']
  counseling_completed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the borrower completed entrance counseling prior to signing the master promissory note, as required by federal regulations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this master promissory note record was first created in the system.']
  deferment_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether loans originated under this MPN are eligible for deferment under federal regulations.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which the master promissory note becomes legally binding and can be used to originate loans.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the master promissory note expires and can no longer be used to originate new loans. Nullable for indefinite MPNs.']
  forbearance_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether loans originated under this MPN are eligible for forbearance under federal regulations.']
  grace_period_months varchar [note: 'The number of months of grace period before repayment begins after the borrower leaves school or drops below half-time enrollment.']
  interest_rate_percent decimal(5,3) [note: 'The annual interest rate percentage applicable to loans originated under this master promissory note.']
  interest_rate_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the loans originated under this MPN carry a fixed or variable interest rate.']
  lender_code varchar [note: 'The standardized code assigned to the lender by the Department of Education.']
  lender_name varchar [note: 'The name of the lender or loan servicer that holds the master promissory note.']
  loan_type varchar [note: 'The type of federal student loan covered by this master promissory note (e.g., Direct Subsidized, Direct Unsubsidized, Direct PLUS, Direct Consolidation, FFEL Subsidized, FFEL Unsubsidized).']
  max_loan_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The maximum aggregate loan amount that can be originated under this master promissory note, if applicable. Nullable for unlimited MPNs.']
  mpn_number varchar [note: 'The externally-known unique identifier assigned to the master promissory note by the federal loan servicer or lender.']
  mpn_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the master promissory note (e.g., active, expired, cancelled, completed, pending, suspended).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes or comments related to the master promissory note.']
  origination_fee_percent decimal(5,3) [note: 'The origination fee percentage charged on loans originated under this master promissory note.']
  repayment_plan_type varchar [note: 'The default repayment plan type selected by the borrower at the time of MPN signing. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: standard|graduated|extended|income_driven|income_based|pay_as_you_earn|revised_pay_as_you_earn|income_contingent — promote to reference product]']
  signature_ip_address varchar [note: 'The IP address from which the borrower electronically signed the master promissory note, used for audit and fraud prevention.']
  signature_method varchar [note: 'The method by which the borrower signed the master promissory note (e.g., electronic, paper, wet signature).']
  signature_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise date and time when the borrower completed the signature process for the master promissory note.']
  signed_date date [note: 'The date on which the student signed the master promissory note.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this master promissory note record was last modified in the system.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for master_promissory_note. Referenced by mpn_id.'
}

Table aid.borrower {
  borrower_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for borrower']
  parent_borrower_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on borrower (parent_borrower_id)']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier linking the borrower to their student record. A borrower may be a student or a parent/sponsor borrowing on behalf of a student.']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address line for the borrower permanent or current residence.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line for apartment, suite, or unit number.']
  adverse_credit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the borrower has adverse credit history as defined by federal Direct PLUS loan criteria. Affects PLUS loan eligibility.']
  aggregate_loan_limit decimal(15,2) [note: 'Maximum cumulative federal loan amount the borrower is eligible to receive based on dependency status and academic level. Enforced per 34 CFR 685.203.']
  alternate_phone_number varchar [note: 'Secondary contact phone number for the borrower. Used when primary contact fails.']
  borrower_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the borrower record. Active borrowers are eligible for new loans; inactive or suspended borrowers require review.']
  borrower_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the borrower role. Indicates whether the borrower is the student themselves, a parent PLUS borrower, spouse, or other sponsor.']
  citizenship_status varchar [note: 'Citizenship or immigration status of the borrower. Determines eligibility for federal Title IV aid programs.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of the borrower residence address.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the borrower residence. Defaults to USA for domestic borrowers.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the borrower record was first created in the financial aid system.']
  credit_authorization_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the borrower has authorized the institution to perform credit checks for PLUS loan eligibility and adverse credit determination.']
  date_of_birth date [note: 'Borrower date of birth. Used for identity verification, dependency status determination, and loan eligibility calculations.']
  default_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the borrower is currently in default on any federal student loan. Blocks eligibility for additional Title IV aid.']
  dependency_status varchar [note: 'Federal dependency status of the borrower as determined by FAFSA criteria. Affects loan limits and parent PLUS eligibility.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for borrower communication, loan notifications, and electronic disclosure delivery.']
  entrance_counseling_date date [note: 'Date the borrower completed mandatory entrance loan counseling. Required before first disbursement of a Direct Loan.']
  exit_counseling_date date [note: 'Date the borrower completed mandatory exit loan counseling. Required upon graduation, withdrawal, or dropping below half-time enrollment.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'Legal first name of the borrower as reported on loan applications and promissory notes.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'Legal last name (surname) of the borrower as reported on loan applications and promissory notes.']
  marital_status varchar [note: 'Marital status of the borrower at the time of loan application. Impacts dependency determination and household size calculations.']
  middle_name varchar [note: 'Middle name or initial of the borrower. May be null if not provided.']
  mpn_expiration_date date [note: 'Date the Master Promissory Note expires. Borrower must sign a new MPN after this date to receive additional loans.']
  mpn_signed_date date [note: 'Date the borrower signed the Master Promissory Note. MPN is valid for up to 10 years for subsequent loans.']
  nslds_match_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the borrower record has been matched and verified against the National Student Loan Data System for existing federal loan and grant history.']
  outstanding_principal_balance decimal(15,2) [note: 'Current total outstanding principal balance across all federal loans for this borrower. Used to calculate remaining eligibility against aggregate limits.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the borrower. Used for loan counseling, default prevention, and collections contact.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP or postal code for the borrower residence address.']
  ssn varchar [note: 'Social Security Number of the borrower. Required for federal loan processing and credit reporting. Stored in encrypted format.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter state or territory code for the borrower residence. Used for state grant eligibility and residency determination.']
  suffix varchar [note: 'Generational or professional suffix appended to the borrower name (e.g., Jr., Sr., III).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the borrower record was last modified. Used for change tracking and audit trail.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for borrower. Referenced by parent_borrower_id.'
}

Table aid.lender {
  lender_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for lender']
  parent_lender_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on lender (parent_lender_id)']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address line for the lender\'s headquarters or primary contact location.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line (suite, floor, building) for the lender\'s contact location.']
  city varchar [note: 'City name for the lender\'s primary contact address.']
  contact_person_email varchar [note: 'Email address for the primary contact person at the lender organization.']
  contact_person_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person at the lender organization for institutional coordination.']
  contact_person_phone varchar [note: 'Direct phone number for the primary contact person at the lender organization.']
  contact_person_title varchar [note: 'Job title of the primary contact person at the lender organization.']
  contract_end_date date [note: 'Date when the institution\'s lending agreement or partnership with this lender expires or was terminated. Null for open-ended agreements.']
  contract_start_date date [note: 'Date when the institution\'s lending agreement or partnership with this lender became effective.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the lender\'s primary contact address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this lender record was first created in the system.']
  duns_number varchar [note: 'Nine-digit DUNS number assigned by Dun & Bradstreet to uniquely identify the lender organization.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for lender correspondence and notifications.']
  fax_number varchar [note: 'Fax number for the lender organization, if applicable.']
  federal_lender_id varchar [note: 'Federal lender identification number assigned by the U.S. Department of Education for Title IV loan programs.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the lender relationship was last reviewed or audited by the financial aid office.']
  lender_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code assigned to the lender by the institution or federal system (e.g., FFELP lender code, Direct Loan servicer code).']
  lender_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the lending institution or loan servicer.']
  lender_short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated or display name of the lender used in reports and student-facing communications.']
  lender_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the lender based on the loan program type (e.g., Federal Direct Loan Program, FFELP, private lender, institutional lender, state agency, alternative lender).']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next review or audit of the lender relationship.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about the lender relationship, special terms, or operational considerations.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the lender organization.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP or ZIP+4 postal code for the lender\'s primary contact address.']
  preferred_lender_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this lender is on the institution\'s preferred lender list for student loan recommendations.']
  servicer_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this lender also acts as a loan servicer (True) or is purely an originating lender (False).']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter state or territory code for the lender\'s primary contact address.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the lender relationship with the institution.']
  tax_id varchar [note: 'Federal Employer Identification Number (EIN) or Tax ID for the lender organization.']
  title_iv_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the lender is eligible to participate in federal Title IV student aid programs.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this lender record was last modified.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL for the lender organization.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for lender. Referenced by lender_id.'
}

Table research.proposal {
  proposal_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sponsored research grant proposal. Primary key for the proposal entity.']
  enterprise_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.enterprise_application. Business justification: Proposals created and managed in research administration systems. Business need: tracking which system manages each proposal, supporting system integrations, audit trails. The kuali_research_proposal_']
  identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who last modified the proposal record. Used for audit trail and accountability.']
  preparer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Proposal development involves research administrators who draft budgets, coordinate submissions, ensure compliance, distinct from PI. Essential for pre-award office workload analysis, training needs a']
  principal_investigator_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the Principal Investigator (PI) who is the lead researcher responsible for the scientific and technical direction of the project.']
  proposal_lead_department_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'FK to hr.org_unit']
  proposal_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the academic or research department that is the primary organizational unit responsible for the proposal.']
  proposed_building_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to facility.building. Business justification: Proposals requesting facility construction or major renovation funds must specify target buildings. Pre-award planning, feasibility assessments, and institutional commitment letters require linking pr']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Proposals must document compliance with specific regulatory requirements (45 CFR 46 for human subjects, Animal Welfare Act, EAR/ITAR) for sponsor review and institutional approval. Required for pre-aw']
  sponsor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.sponsor. Business justification: proposal has sponsor_agency_name which should be normalized via FK to sponsor master table. Proposals are submitted to sponsors; this is a critical relationship for accessing sponsor requirements, sub']
  abstract varchar [note: 'Executive summary or abstract of the research proposal describing the project objectives, methodology, and expected outcomes. Used for internal review and reporting.']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of sponsored activity proposed (research, instruction, public service, or other). Used for institutional reporting and cost accounting.']
  biohazard_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the proposed research involves biohazardous materials and requires Institutional Biosafety Committee (IBC) approval.']
  budget_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the proposal budget (typically USD for U.S. institutions). Required for international collaborations and multi-currency proposals.']
  cfda_number varchar [note: 'Five-digit CFDA number identifying the federal program under which funding is requested. Required for federal grant proposals and used for compliance reporting.']
  cost_sharing_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount of institutional cost sharing or matching funds committed in the proposal. Represents the institutions financial contribution to the project.']
  cost_sharing_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the sponsor requires institutional cost sharing or matching funds as a condition of the award.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the proposal record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  decision_date date [note: 'Date the sponsoring agency communicated their funding decision (awarded, declined, or deferred). Marks the conclusion of the proposal review process.']
  direct_cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total direct costs requested in the proposal budget, including salaries, equipment, supplies, and travel. Excludes indirect costs.']
  fa_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Facilities and Administrative (F&A) indirect cost rate percentage applied to the proposal budget. This is the negotiated rate approved by the federal cognizant agency.']
  human_subjects_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the proposed research involves human subjects and requires Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval.']
  iacuc_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) approval for vertebrate animal research. Required for proposals involving animal subjects.']
  ibc_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of Institutional Biosafety Committee (IBC) approval for biohazard research. Required for proposals involving recombinant DNA or biohazardous materials.']
  idc_rate_type varchar [note: 'Type of indirect cost rate applied to the proposal (e.g., on-campus research, off-campus research, MTDC base). Determines which institutional F&A rate is used.']
  indirect_cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total indirect costs (also known as Facilities and Administrative or F&A costs) requested in the proposal budget. Calculated by applying the institutional IDC rate to the direct cost base.']
  irb_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval for human subjects research. Required for proposals involving human participants.']
  kuali_research_proposal_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the proposal in the Kuali Research system. Used for integration and cross-reference with the source system of record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the proposal record was last updated or modified. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  project_duration_months varchar [note: 'Total duration of the proposed project period expressed in months. Calculated from project start and end dates.']
  project_end_date date [note: 'Proposed end date for the research project period. Marks the conclusion of the project performance period if the proposal is awarded.']
  project_start_date date [note: 'Proposed start date for the research project period. Marks the beginning of the project performance period if the proposal is awarded.']
  proposal_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique proposal number assigned by the institution for tracking and reference. This is the business identifier used in communications with sponsors and internal stakeholders.']
  proposal_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the proposal indicating its position in the pre-award workflow. Tracks progression from initial draft through final agency decision.']
  proposal_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the proposal indicating whether it is a new submission, continuation of existing funding, renewal, supplement, or revision. Used for sponsor reporting and internal tracking.']
  requested_budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total budget amount requested from the sponsor in the proposal, including both direct and indirect costs. This is the principal monetary value for the proposal.']
  research_area_code varchar [note: 'Code or classification identifying the primary research discipline or field of study for the proposal (e.g., NSF directorate code, NIH institute code).']
  research_area_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of the primary research discipline or field of study for the proposal (e.g., Biological Sciences, Engineering, Social Sciences).']
  sponsor_award_number varchar [note: 'Award or grant number assigned by the sponsoring agency if the proposal is funded. Links the proposal to the post-award grant record.']
  sponsor_program_announcement varchar [note: 'Program announcement, solicitation number, or funding opportunity announcement (FOA) number under which the proposal is submitted. Links the proposal to the specific sponsor funding mechanism.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the proposal was officially submitted to the sponsoring agency. This is the principal business event timestamp for the proposal transaction.']
  submission_deadline date [note: 'Final deadline date by which the proposal must be submitted to the sponsor. Used for internal tracking and compliance monitoring.']
  title varchar [note: 'Full title of the sponsored research proposal as submitted to the funding agency. This is the official project name that appears on all grant documentation.']
  vertebrate_animals_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the proposed research involves vertebrate animals and requires Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) approval.']

  Note: 'Master record for a sponsored research grant proposal submitted to an external funding agency (NSF, NIH, DOE, etc.). Captures the full proposal lifecycle from pre-submission through agency decision, including proposal number, title, abstract, submission deadline, sponsor agency, program announcement, requested budget, F&A rate applied, submission date, status (draft, submitted, awarded, declined, withdrawn), PI information, lead department, CFDA number, project period start/end, indirect cost rate type, and Kuali Research proposal ID. Serves as the authoritative source for all pre-award activity.'
}

  no_cost_extension_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the award has been granted a no-cost extension to extend the project period without additional funding.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Mechanism by which the sponsor disburses funds to the institution (advance payment, reimbursement, or letter of credit).']
  payment_schedule varchar [note: 'Description of the timing and conditions under which sponsor payments are made throughout the award period.']
