  annual_review_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the faculty annual performance review record. Primary key for the annual review entity.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Merit pay recommendations in annual reviews directly impact departmental salary budgets tracked by cost centers. Links enable budget planning, merit pool allocation by department/college, and reconcil']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member being reviewed. Links to the faculty master data entity.']
  review_policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Annual faculty evaluations follow institutional evaluation policies that define review criteria, rating scales, timelines, and merit pay procedures. Department chairs and deans reference policy during']
  academic_rank varchar [note: 'The faculty member\'s academic rank at the time of the review, reflecting their position in the academic hierarchy. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: professor|associate_professor|assistant_professor|instructor|lecturer|clinical_professor|research_professor|adjunct_professor — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  appointment_type varchar [note: 'The type of faculty appointment held during the review period, indicating employment status and workload expectations.']
  approving_authority varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the administrative authority (typically dean or provost) who provided final approval of the annual review.']
  average_course_evaluation_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Mean student course evaluation score across all courses taught during the review period, typically on a 5-point scale.']
  chair_review_submitted_date date [note: 'The date on which the department chair completed and submitted their evaluation of the faculty member.']
  committee_assignments_count varchar [note: 'Total number of departmental, college, university, and professional organization committee assignments held during the review period.']
  courses_taught_count varchar [note: 'Total number of distinct courses taught by the faculty member during the review period.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for merit pay amount (e.g., USD for United States Dollar).']
  dean_review_submitted_date date [note: 'The date on which the dean completed and submitted their review and approval of the faculty annual review.']
  department_chair_narrative varchar [note: 'Comprehensive written evaluation and commentary provided by the department chair, summarizing the faculty member\'s performance, strengths, areas for development, and contributions to the department.']
  faculty_self_evaluation_narrative varchar [note: 'The faculty member\'s self-assessment narrative describing their accomplishments, challenges, professional development activities, and goals for the review period.']
  faculty_self_evaluation_submitted_date date [note: 'The date on which the faculty member submitted their self-evaluation materials for the annual review.']
  final_approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the annual review was officially approved and closed, completing the review cycle.']
  fte decimal(4,3) [note: 'The Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) percentage representing the faculty member\'s workload commitment during the review period, where 1.000 equals full-time.']
  goals_for_next_period varchar [note: 'Faculty member\'s stated goals and objectives for the upcoming review period, including teaching, research, and service priorities.']
  graduate_students_advised_count varchar [note: 'Total number of graduate students for whom the faculty member served as primary advisor or dissertation/thesis committee chair during the review period.']
  grant_funding_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total dollar amount of external research funding awarded to the faculty member during the review period.']
  grants_awarded_count varchar [note: 'Total number of research grants awarded to the faculty member as Principal Investigator (PI) or Co-PI during the review period.']
  grants_submitted_count varchar [note: 'Total number of research grant proposals submitted by the faculty member as Principal Investigator (PI) or Co-PI during the review period.']
  merit_pay_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'The recommended dollar amount for merit-based salary increase, calculated based on performance rating and institutional merit pool allocation.']
  merit_pay_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The recommended percentage increase for merit-based salary adjustment, expressed as a percentage of current base salary.']
  merit_pay_recommended_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member is recommended for merit-based salary increase based on performance during the review period.']
  overall_performance_rating varchar [note: 'The comprehensive performance rating assigned to the faculty member for the review period, reflecting aggregate performance across all evaluation dimensions.']
  presentations_count varchar [note: 'Total number of conference presentations, invited talks, and other scholarly presentations delivered during the review period.']
  professional_development_activities varchar [note: 'Description of professional development activities undertaken during the review period, including workshops, certifications, conferences attended, and skill development initiatives.']
  publications_count varchar [note: 'Total number of peer-reviewed publications, books, book chapters, and other scholarly works produced during the review period.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this annual review record was first created in the data platform.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'The source system from which this annual review record originated, typically Workday HCM Performance Management Module.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this annual review record was last updated in the data platform.']
  research_rating varchar [note: 'Performance rating for research and scholarly activity, including publications, grants, presentations, creative works, and contributions to the discipline.']
  review_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or administrative remarks related to the annual review process, including any special circumstances or follow-up actions required.']
  review_period_end_date date [note: 'The ending date of the performance period being evaluated in this annual review, typically the end of the academic or fiscal year.']
  review_period_start_date date [note: 'The beginning date of the performance period being evaluated in this annual review, typically the start of the academic or fiscal year.']
  review_status varchar [note: 'Current workflow status of the annual review process, tracking progression from initiation through final approval. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: not_started|in_progress|self_evaluation_submitted|chair_review_submitted|dean_review_submitted|approved|closed — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  service_rating varchar [note: 'Performance rating for service contributions, including departmental service, university committee work, professional organization involvement, and community engagement.']
  student_enrollment_count varchar [note: 'Total number of students enrolled in courses taught by the faculty member during the review period.']
  teaching_load_credit_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total credit hours (CR) taught by the faculty member during the review period, used to assess teaching workload and productivity.']
  teaching_rating varchar [note: 'Performance rating for teaching effectiveness, including course delivery, student learning outcomes (SLO), course evaluations, and instructional innovation.']
  tenure_track_status varchar [note: 'The faculty member\'s tenure classification at the time of the review, indicating whether they are on a tenure track, have achieved tenure, or hold a non-tenure appointment.']

  Note: 'Captures the formal annual performance review record for a faculty member, including review period, overall performance rating, ratings across teaching, research/scholarship, and service dimensions, department chair narrative, faculty self-evaluation submission date, merit pay recommendation, and final approval status. Serves as the primary record for faculty performance management and merit compensation decisions in Workday HCM performance module.'
}

Table faculty.sabbatical {
  sabbatical_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sabbatical leave record. Primary key.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Sabbaticals have direct budget impact through continued salary payments (pay_continuation_percentage), replacement faculty costs, and teaching load redistribution. Cost center link enables sabbatical ']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.donor. Business justification: Sabbaticals often endowed or donor-funded (named sabbatical funds, research leave supplements). Stewardship requires tracking. Real business process: named sabbatical funds require annual reports to d']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Sabbatical requests must comply with institutional sabbatical policies defining eligibility (years of service), duration (semester vs. year), pay continuation percentage, and return-to-service obligat']
  sabbatical_department_chair_instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the department chair who reviewed and approved or denied the leave request at the department level.']
  sabbatical_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dean who reviewed and approved or denied the leave request at the college level.']
  sabbatical_instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member taking sabbatical leave. Links to faculty master data.']
  sabbatical_provost_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the provost or chief academic officer who provided final approval or denial of the leave request at the institutional level.']
  sabbatical_replacement_faculty_instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the replacement faculty member (adjunct, visiting, or internal) hired or assigned to cover teaching and service duties during the leave.']
  actual_return_date date [note: 'Actual date the faculty member returned from leave. Populated when leave is completed.']
  actual_start_date date [note: 'Actual date the faculty member began the leave. Populated when leave becomes active.']
  approved_end_date date [note: 'Officially approved end date of the leave period. May differ from requested date.']
  approved_start_date date [note: 'Officially approved start date of the leave period. May differ from requested date.']
  benefits_continuation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether health and other benefits continue during the leave period.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation provided when an approved leave is cancelled before or during the leave period.']
  case_number varchar [note: 'Human-readable business identifier for the sabbatical leave case as assigned by HR or academic affairs.']
  dean_approval_date date [note: 'Date the dean approved or denied the leave request.']
  dean_decision varchar [note: 'Dean decision on the leave request.']
  denial_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation provided when a leave request is denied at any approval stage. Captures rationale for denial decision.']
  department_chair_approval_date date [note: 'Date the department chair approved or denied the leave request.']
  department_chair_decision varchar [note: 'Department chair decision on the leave request.']
  expected_return_date date [note: 'Expected date of return to active service. Used for planning and workload management.']
  hr_case_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number or identifier of the HR case or absence case in Workday HCM that tracks this leave event.']
  leave_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special circumstances related to the leave event. Free-text field for case-specific information.']
  leave_request_submitted_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member submitted the leave request application.']
  leave_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the leave request and execution. Tracks progression through approval workflow and leave period. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: requested|pending_chair|pending_dean|pending_provost|approved|denied|active|completed|cancelled — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  leave_type varchar [note: 'Type of faculty leave. Sabbatical is the primary focus; other leave types (FMLA, medical, parental, military, administrative, unpaid) are also tracked in this product. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sabbatical|fmla|medical|parental|military|administrative|unpaid — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  pay_continuation_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of regular salary continued during the leave period. For full-year sabbatical at half pay this would be 50.00; for half-year at full pay this would be 100.00.']
  post_sabbatical_report_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the post-sabbatical report must be submitted. Typically 30-90 days after return from sabbatical.']
  post_sabbatical_report_status varchar [note: 'Status of the post-sabbatical report submission and review. Faculty are typically required to submit a report documenting sabbatical outcomes and scholarly productivity.']
  post_sabbatical_report_submitted_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member submitted the post-sabbatical report.']
  project_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the sabbatical project, research agenda, or professional development activities. Submitted as part of sabbatical application.']
  provost_approval_date date [note: 'Date the provost approved or denied the leave request.']
  provost_decision varchar [note: 'Provost decision on the leave request. Final institutional approval authority.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Primary purpose category of the sabbatical leave. Applicable only when leave_type is sabbatical. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: research|writing|professional_development|creative_work|field_study|collaboration|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sabbatical leave record was first created in the system.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this record originated. Typically Workday HCM Absence Management module.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sabbatical leave record was last modified.']
  requested_end_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member requested the leave to end.']
  requested_start_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member requested the leave to begin.']
  return_to_service_commitment_months varchar [note: 'Number of months the faculty member commits to return to active service following sabbatical. Typically one year (12 months) or two years (24 months) depending on institutional policy.']
  sabbatical_type varchar [note: 'Specific sabbatical arrangement: full academic year at half pay, half academic year at full pay, or other negotiated arrangement. Applicable only when leave_type is sabbatical.']
  teaching_load_impact_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of how the leave impacts teaching assignments, course coverage, and departmental workload distribution.']
  tenure_clock_extension_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a tenure clock extension (stop-the-clock) was granted in conjunction with this leave. Applicable for tenure-track faculty.']
  tenure_clock_extension_months varchar [note: 'Number of months by which the tenure clock was extended due to this leave. Typically 12 months for qualifying leaves.']

  Note: 'Manages all faculty leave events including sabbatical leave, FMLA leave, medical leave, parental leave, military leave, administrative leave, and unpaid leave. For sabbaticals: captures sabbatical type (full-year at half pay, half-year at full pay), purpose and project description, return-to-service commitment, and post-sabbatical report status. For all leave types: captures leave type, requested and approved dates, expected and actual return dates, approval chain status (department chair, dean, provost as applicable), HR case reference, and impact on tenure clock (whether a tenure clock extension was granted). Tracks the full lifecycle of faculty absence as managed in Workday HCM Absence Management module.'
}

Real business process: appointment to IRB grant']
