Business justification: Faculty serve as advisors/liaisons to alumni chapters, regional clubs, and affinity groups (e.g., engineering alumni society, law school alumni board). Real business process: affinity group management']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Service assignments with compensation or course releases have budget impact on departmental cost centers. Links enable tracking of service-related costs, budget allocation for committee stipends, and ']
  event_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.advancement_event. Business justification: Faculty serve as speakers, hosts, honorees at advancement events (galas, donor dinners, groundbreakings, campaign launches). Real business process: event planning tracks faculty participants for invit']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member assigned to this service commitment. Links to the faculty master record.']
  accreditation_service_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this service assignment is related to institutional or program accreditation activities (e.g., self-study committee, site visit team, accreditation liaison). Used for accreditation reporting and compliance tracking.']
  appointment_authority varchar [note: 'Name or title of the individual or body that appointed the faculty member to this service role (e.g., Provost, Dean, Faculty Senate, Department Chair, External Organization).']
  appointment_date date [note: 'Date on which the appointment was officially made or approved by the appointing authority.']
  appointment_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the faculty member\'s service assignment ends. Nullable for ongoing or indefinite assignments.']
  appointment_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the faculty member\'s service assignment begins. Effective start of the service commitment.']
  assignment_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes providing additional context, special conditions, or details about the service assignment. May include information about specific responsibilities, deliverables, or recognition received.']
  assignment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the service assignment. Indicates whether the assignment is currently active, has been completed, is temporarily suspended, or was cancelled.']
  committee_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the committee, board, council, senate, or professional body to which the faculty member is assigned.']
  compensation_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary compensation or stipend provided for this service assignment, if any. Nullable for uncompensated service.']
  compensation_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the compensation amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Applicable only when compensation is provided.']
  course_release_units decimal(4,2) [note: 'Number of course units or credit hours released from teaching load in recognition of this service assignment. Used in workload planning and faculty load balancing.']
  elected_position_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member was elected to this service role by peers or members, as opposed to being appointed. Elected positions often carry greater weight in promotion and tenure review.']
  irb_service_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this service assignment involves Institutional Review Board (IRB) responsibilities for human subjects research review. IRB service is tracked separately for compliance and workload purposes.']
  leadership_role_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member holds a leadership position within the service assignment (e.g., Chair, President, Editor-in-Chief). Leadership roles are weighted more heavily in annual review and promotion dossiers.']
  meeting_frequency varchar [note: 'Expected frequency of meetings or activities for this service assignment. Provides context for time commitment estimation.']
  national_prominence_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the service assignment is with a nationally or internationally prominent organization or body. Used in promotion and tenure evaluation to assess the prestige and impact of service contributions.']
  organization_name varchar [note: 'Name of the external professional association, journal, funding agency, or community organization for which the service is performed. Applicable only to external service assignments.']
  organization_type varchar [note: 'Type of external organization for which the service is performed. Used to categorize external service contributions for promotion and tenure review.']
  promotion_tenure_credit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this service assignment is eligible for consideration in promotion and tenure review. Some service activities may be excluded from formal evaluation.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or system account that created this service assignment record. Used for audit and accountability purposes.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this service assignment record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this service assignment record originated (e.g., Workday HCM, Faculty Activity Reporting System, Manual Entry).']
  record_updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or system account that last modified this service assignment record. Used for audit and accountability purposes.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this service assignment record was last modified. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  renewable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the service assignment is renewable for additional terms upon expiration. Used to distinguish term-limited from potentially ongoing service commitments.']
  role_title varchar [note: 'Title or role held by the faculty member within the service assignment (e.g., Chair, Vice Chair, Member, Secretary, Ex-Officio, Officer, Editor, Reviewer).']
  service_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of the service assignment: internal (institutional governance and committees), external (professional associations, editorial boards, grant review panels), or community (public service and outreach).']
  service_type varchar [note: 'Category of service commitment. Distinguishes between governance, committee, review board, accreditation, and professional service roles. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: faculty_senate|curriculum_committee|search_committee|irb|accreditation_self_study|editorial_board|professional_association_officer|advisory_board|peer_review_panel|grant_review_panel|community_service|student_organization_advisor — promote to reference product]']
  term_length_years varchar [note: 'Standard length of the service term in years, if the assignment has a defined term (e.g., 2-year term for faculty senate, 3-year term for editorial board). Nullable for indefinite or ad-hoc assignments.']
  time_commitment_hours_per_year decimal(6,2) [note: 'Estimated annual time commitment in hours required for this service assignment. Used for workload planning and annual review documentation.']
  workload_credit_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the faculty member\'s total workload allocated to this service assignment. Used in workload distribution calculations across teaching, research, and service.']

  Note: 'Records faculty service commitments to institutional governance and professional communities, including service type (faculty senate, curriculum committee, search committee, IRB, accreditation self-study, editorial board, professional association officer), committee or body name, role held, appointment start and end dates, time commitment estimate, and whether the service is internal (institutional) or external (professional/community). Supports annual review documentation and promotion and tenure dossier service section.'
}

Table faculty.accreditation_qualification {
  accreditation_qualification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the accreditation qualification record. Primary key for this entity.']
  academic_program_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the academic program for which the faculty qualification is being evaluated. Nullable if qualification applies to course-level teaching rather than program oversight.']
  accreditation_review_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.accreditation_review. Business justification: Faculty qualifications are verified and documented during accreditation reviews. Self-study teams compile qualification records for site visits. Accreditors assess whether faculty collectively meet st']
  coach_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.coach. Business justification: Coaches teaching credit-bearing courses (kinesiology, sports management, coaching theory) must meet accreditation body standards (CAATE, COSMA, AACSB). Accreditation reviews require documentation of i']
  course_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific course for which the faculty qualification is being evaluated. Nullable if qualification applies to program-level teaching rather than a specific course.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the individual (typically department chair, dean, or credentialing officer) who reviewed and determined the faculty member\'s qualification status.']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member whose qualification is being assessed. Links to the faculty master record.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'The accrediting agency or body whose qualification standards are being applied. Includes regional accreditors (SACSCOC, HLC, MSCHE, NWCCU, NECHE, WSCUC) and specialized/programmatic accreditors (ABET, AACSB, ABA, LCME, etc.). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: SACSCOC|HLC|MSCHE|NWCCU|NECHE|WSCUC|ABET|AACSB|ABA|LCME|ACEN|CCNE|NAACLS|APA|CSWE|CEPH|CAHME|ACPE|JRCERT|CAATE|Other — 21 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  accreditation_visit_cycle varchar [note: 'The accreditation review cycle or visit year for which this qualification determination was prepared. Used to organize qualification documentation for self-study and site visit preparation.']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the qualification determination was formally approved by the reviewing authority. May differ from determination_date if multi-level approval is required.']
  determination_date date [note: 'The date on which the qualification determination was officially made by the reviewing authority.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the qualification determination expires or is no longer valid. Nullable for qualifications that do not expire (e.g., terminal degree qualifications).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which the qualification determination is effective. Typically aligns with the start of the academic term or appointment period.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which time-limited qualifications (e.g., professional licensure, industry certifications, provisional qualifications) expire and require renewal or re-evaluation. Nullable for permanent qualifications.']
  graduate_hours_in_discipline varchar [note: 'The number of graduate-level credit hours the faculty member has completed in the specific teaching discipline. Relevant for qualification pathways requiring master\'s degree plus 18 graduate hours.']
  industry_certification_date date [note: 'The date on which the industry certification was awarded to the faculty member.']
  industry_certification_expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the industry certification expires and requires renewal. Nullable for certifications that do not expire.']
  industry_certification_issuing_body varchar [note: 'The organization or body that issued the industry certification (e.g., PMI, CFA Institute, ISC2, Amazon Web Services).']
  industry_certification_name varchar [note: 'The name of the industry certification held by the faculty member that qualifies them to teach in the discipline (e.g., PMP, CFA, CISSP, AWS Certified Solutions Architect). Relevant when qualification pathway is industry certification.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'The date on which the qualification determination should be reviewed or renewed. Applicable for time-limited qualifications or when periodic review is required by policy.']
  professional_experience_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the faculty member\'s relevant professional experience that supports their qualification to teach in the discipline. Includes roles, responsibilities, and achievements.']
  professional_license_expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the professional license expires and requires renewal. Critical for maintaining qualification status for license-based pathways.']
  professional_license_number varchar [note: 'The license number or credential identifier for the faculty member\'s professional license. Used for verification purposes.']
  professional_license_state varchar [note: 'The U.S. state or jurisdiction that issued the professional license. Uses two-letter state abbreviation (e.g., CA, TX, NY).']
  professional_license_type varchar [note: 'The type of professional license held by the faculty member that qualifies them to teach in the discipline (e.g., CPA, PE, RN, JD with bar admission). Relevant when qualification pathway is professional licensure.']
  qualification_category varchar [note: 'The faculty qualification category as defined by the accreditation body. Primarily used by AACSB: Scholarly Academic (SA), Practice Academic (PA), Instructional Practitioner (IP), or Additional (A). Other accreditors may use different taxonomies.']
  qualification_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or context regarding the qualification determination. May include special circumstances, conditions, or reviewer observations.']
  qualification_pathway varchar [note: 'The specific pathway or criterion by which the faculty member meets the accreditation body\'s qualification standards. Examples include terminal degree in the teaching discipline, master\'s degree plus 18 graduate hours in the discipline, professional licensure, industry certification, or documented equivalent experience. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Terminal Degree in Discipline|Terminal Degree in Related Field|ABD with Progress|Masters plus 18 Graduate Hours|Professional Licensure|Industry Certification|Equivalent Professional Experience|Tested Experience|Other — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  qualification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the faculty member\'s qualification determination for the specified course or program under the given accreditation body\'s standards.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'The user ID or system identifier of the individual or process that created this qualification record.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this qualification record was first created in the system.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'The source system or application from which this qualification record originated (e.g., Faculty Credentialing System, HR System, Accreditation Management System).']
  record_updated_by varchar [note: 'The user ID or system identifier of the individual or process that last updated this qualification record.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this qualification record was last updated in the system.']
  requalification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member will need to undergo requalification review in the future. True for time-limited qualifications (e.g., based on expiring licenses or certifications); False for permanent qualifications (e.g., terminal degree).']
  reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual who reviewed and approved the qualification determination. Captured for audit trail purposes.']
  reviewer_title varchar [note: 'Official title or role of the reviewer at the time of qualification determination (e.g., Department Chair, Associate Dean for Academic Affairs, Provost).']
  scholarly_activity_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of the faculty member\'s scholarly and professional contributions that support their qualification status. May include publications, presentations, grants, creative works, or other intellectual contributions relevant to the teaching discipline.']
  supporting_evidence_references varchar [note: 'References to supporting documentation that substantiates the qualification determination. May include document repository paths, file names, or identifiers for transcripts, diplomas, licenses, certifications, CVs, or other credentials.']
  terminal_degree_field varchar [note: 'The academic discipline or field of study in which the faculty member holds their terminal degree (e.g., PhD in Economics, JD, MD, MFA in Creative Writing). Relevant when qualification pathway is based on terminal degree.']
  terminal_degree_institution varchar [note: 'The name of the institution that conferred the faculty member\'s terminal degree. Used for verification and accreditation documentation.']
  terminal_degree_year varchar [note: 'The year in which the faculty member\'s terminal degree was conferred. Used to assess recency of academic preparation.']
  years_professional_experience varchar [note: 'The number of years of relevant professional experience in the teaching discipline. Used to support qualification pathways based on equivalent professional experience or tested experience.']

  Note: 'Tracks whether a faculty member meets the qualification standards required by specific accreditation bodies (SACSCOC, HLC, ABET, AACSB, ABA, LCME) for each course or program they are assigned to teach. Captures the accreditation body, qualification pathway used (terminal degree, equivalent experience, professional licensure, industry certification), qualification determination date, reviewer, expiration date if applicable, and supporting evidence references. Critical for accreditation self-study and compliance audits.'
}

Table faculty.hire_event {
  hire_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the faculty hire event transaction. Primary key for the hire_event product.']
  budget_ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Startup packages and relocation assistance must be charged to specific ledger accounts for financial tracking and budget control. Currently only has string budget_account_code; proper FK enables encum']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the faculty member who chaired the search committee for this hire. Null for emergency or non-committee hires.']
  hiring_cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: New faculty hires require budget authorization from specific cost centers for salary, startup packages, and relocation. Links hiring decisions to budget availability, enables tracking of hiring costs ']
  hiring_policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Faculty hiring follows institutional hiring policies governing search procedures, committee composition, diversity requirements, approval workflows, and offer authorization. Provost and HR verify poli']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the faculty member who was hired through this event. Links to the faculty master data product.']
  onboarding_service_request_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.service_request. Business justification: New faculty hire events trigger IT onboarding service requests for account creation, equipment provisioning, office phone setup, building access. This tracks the IT service ticket that fulfills techno']
  primary_hire_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the academic department that initiated and owns this faculty hire. The tenure home for tenure-track appointments.']
  recruitment_requisition_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.recruitment_requisition. Business justification: Hire events are outcomes of recruitment requisitions; this link is mandatory for recruitment analytics (time-to-fill, offer acceptance rates), hiring funnel reporting, EEO compliance tracking, and req']
  accreditation_qualified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member meets the qualification standards of the relevant programmatic accreditor (AACSB, ABET, ABA, etc.) at the time of hire.']
  actual_start_date date [note: 'The actual date on which the faculty member commenced their duties. May differ from negotiated start date due to onboarding delays or early starts.']
  appointment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the appointment: regular (standard faculty line), visiting (temporary appointment), adjunct (part-time non-tenure), emeritus (retired with title), joint (shared across departments), or courtesy (unpaid affiliation).']
  candidate_source varchar [note: 'The primary channel through which the candidate was identified and recruited. Used for recruitment effectiveness analysis and diversity pipeline tracking. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: academic_job_board|professional_network|internal_referral|conference_recruitment|direct_application|search_firm|diversity_program|other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  contract_months decimal(3,1) [note: 'The number of months per year covered by the faculty contract (typically 9.0 for academic year or 12.0 for calendar year appointments).']
  degree_granting_institution varchar [note: 'The name of the institution that awarded the faculty member\'s highest degree. Used for accreditation documentation and alumni network analysis.']
  diversity_hire_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this hire was tracked under institutional diversity and equity hiring goals. Used for EEO and affirmative action reporting.']
  doctoral_committee_eligibility boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member is eligible to serve on doctoral dissertation committees at the time of hire. Requires terminal degree and graduate faculty status.']
  external_hire_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the hire was an external candidate (true) or an internal promotion/transfer (false). Used for talent pipeline analytics.']
  fte decimal(4,3) [note: 'The full-time equivalent percentage of the appointment (1.000 for full-time, 0.500 for half-time, etc.). Used for workload and IPEDS reporting.']
  graduate_faculty_status varchar [note: 'Indicates the level of graduate faculty privileges granted at hire: full (can chair dissertations), associate (can serve on committees), or none (undergraduate teaching only).']
  highest_degree_earned varchar [note: 'The highest academic degree held by the faculty member at the time of hire. Used for accreditation qualification and IPEDS reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: phd|edd|md|jd|mfa|dma|dba|pharmd|dpt|dnp|masters|bachelors|other — 13 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  hire_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context about the hire, including special negotiated terms, strategic hiring initiatives, or unique circumstances.']
  hire_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the hire event in its lifecycle: offer_extended (awaiting candidate response), offer_accepted (candidate accepted), onboarding (pre-start activities), active (faculty member started), offer_declined (candidate rejected offer), or hire_cancelled (position withdrawn).']
  initial_annual_salary decimal(15,2) [note: 'The negotiated annual base salary offered at the time of hire, excluding benefits, bonuses, or summer salary supplements.']
  initial_rank varchar [note: 'The academic rank offered and accepted at the time of hire. Determines initial salary band, tenure eligibility, and academic responsibilities. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: professor|associate_professor|assistant_professor|instructor|lecturer|clinical_professor|clinical_associate_professor|clinical_assistant_professor|research_professor|research_associate_professor|research_assistant_professor|professor_of_practice|visiting_professor|adjunct_professor — 14 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  negotiated_start_date date [note: 'The agreed-upon date on which the faculty member will begin their appointment, as negotiated during the offer process.']
  offer_accepted_date date [note: 'The date on which the candidate formally accepted the employment offer.']
  offer_date date [note: 'The date on which the formal employment offer was extended to the candidate.']
  prior_institution_name varchar [note: 'The name of the institution where the faculty member was employed immediately prior to this hire. Null for new PhDs or career changers.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this hire event record was first created in the source system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'The operational system from which this hire event record was sourced. Typically Workday HCM Recruiting or Slate CRM for candidate pipeline data.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this hire event record was last modified in the source system. Used for change tracking and incremental data loading.']
  relocation_assistance_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'The dollar amount provided to assist the faculty member with relocation expenses. May be taxable or non-taxable depending on institutional policy.']
  research_load_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of the faculty member\'s workload allocated to research and scholarly activity at the time of hire (typically 40-60% for research-intensive roles).']
  salary_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the initial salary (e.g., USD, CAD, EUR). Supports international faculty hires.']
  search_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the search process used to fill this position: national (open competitive search), internal (internal candidate only), emergency (expedited hire), targeted (specific candidate recruitment), failed_search_rehire (position reopened after failed search), or visiting (temporary appointment).']
  service_load_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of the faculty member\'s workload allocated to service activities (committee work, advising, outreach) at the time of hire.']
  startup_package_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The total dollar value of the startup package negotiated for research equipment, lab setup, graduate student support, and other initial resources. Common for STEM and research-intensive hires.']
  teaching_load_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of the faculty member\'s workload allocated to teaching responsibilities at the time of hire (typically 40-100% for teaching-focused roles).']
  tenure_track_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the position is on the tenure track, already tenured at hire, or a non-tenure track appointment (clinical, research, or teaching-focused).']
  terminal_degree_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member holds a terminal degree in their field (PhD, MFA, JD, MD, etc.) at the time of hire. Critical for accreditation qualification tracking.']
  visa_sponsorship_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the institution is sponsoring a work visa (H-1B, J-1, O-1, etc.) for this international faculty hire. Used for compliance tracking and immigration reporting.']
  visa_type varchar [note: 'The type of work authorization or visa status for international hires. Null or not_applicable for US citizens and permanent residents. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: h1b|j1|o1|tn|green_card|citizen|not_applicable — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Captures the formal faculty hiring transaction including position requisition reference, search type (national, internal, emergency hire), offer date, accepted date, negotiated start date, initial rank offered, initial salary offered, hiring department, search committee chair, and whether the hire was a diversity hire tracked under institutional equity goals. Sourced from Workday HCM Recruiting module and Slate CRM for candidate pipeline data. Supports CUPA-HR reporting and EEO compliance.'
}

Table faculty.compensation {
  compensation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the faculty compensation record. Primary key for the compensation data product.']
  appointment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to faculty.appointment. Business justification: compensation.appointment_period_id is BIGINT but not currently linked to any table. Compensation records are tied to specific appointment periods. The appointment table is the authoritative source for']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member to whom this compensation record applies. Links to the faculty master data product.']
  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research grant or sponsored project funding this compensation, if applicable. Links to the research grant master data. Null for non-grant-funded compensation.']
  salary_cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Faculty salary is the largest expense for academic departments; each compensation record must link to the cost center funding it for budget tracking, variance analysis, and financial reporting. Enable']
  accreditation_qualified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member meets the qualification standards of the relevant specialized accreditor (AACSB, ABET, ABA, etc.) at the time of this compensation record.']
  administrative_stipend_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Additional compensation paid for administrative duties such as department chair, program director, or other leadership roles.']
  appointment_type varchar [note: 'The type of faculty appointment. Common values include regular, visiting, adjunct, emeritus, postdoctoral, lecturer, clinical, or research faculty. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: regular|visiting|adjunct|emeritus|postdoc|lecturer|clinical|research — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  base_salary_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The base annual salary amount for the faculty member during this appointment period, excluding stipends, overload, and other supplemental compensation.']
  budget_account_code varchar [note: 'The general ledger account code or budget string from which this compensation is funded. Critical for financial reporting and budget tracking.']
  cip_code varchar [note: 'The six-digit CIP code representing the primary instructional discipline for this faculty member\'s compensation. Used for CUPA-HR salary benchmarking by discipline.']
  compensation_status varchar [note: 'The current status of this compensation record. Active indicates currently in effect; suspended or on_leave indicates temporary interruption; terminated indicates ended; pending indicates approved but not yet effective.']
  contract_months decimal(4,2) [note: 'The number of months covered by the faculty member\'s contract for this compensation period. Typically 9.0 for academic year appointments, 12.0 for calendar year appointments.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code indicating the currency in which compensation amounts are denominated. Typically USD for U.S. institutions.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this compensation arrangement becomes effective. Critical for tracking salary history and changes over time.']
  end_date date [note: 'The date on which this compensation arrangement ends or ended. Null for currently active compensation records.']
  fte decimal(5,4) [note: 'The full-time equivalent percentage for this compensation record. 1.0000 represents full-time; values less than 1.0 represent part-time appointments.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'The primary source of funds for this compensation. Common values include state appropriation, tuition revenue, endowment income, research grant, contract, auxiliary enterprise, or philanthropic gift. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: state_appropriation|tuition_revenue|endowment|grant|contract|auxiliary|gift — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  last_salary_action_date date [note: 'The date of the most recent salary action affecting this compensation record, such as a merit increase, promotion adjustment, or equity correction.']
  last_salary_action_type varchar [note: 'The type of the most recent salary action. Common values include merit increase, promotion, equity adjustment, cost-of-living adjustment, retention adjustment, or initial appointment.']
  market_equity_adjustment_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The dollar amount of any market equity adjustment applied to this compensation record. Null if no adjustment was made.']
  market_equity_adjustment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this compensation record includes a market equity adjustment to bring the faculty member\'s salary in line with external market benchmarks.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes providing additional context about this compensation record, such as special conditions, funding constraints, or administrative remarks.']
  overload_courses_count varchar [note: 'The number of courses taught as overload during this compensation period. Used in conjunction with overload_pay_rate to calculate total overload compensation.']
  overload_pay_rate decimal(15,2) [note: 'The per-course or per-credit-hour rate paid to faculty for teaching beyond their standard load. Null if no overload teaching occurred during this period.']
  pay_grade varchar [note: 'The institutional pay grade or salary band assigned to this faculty position. Used for internal equity analysis and compensation planning.']
  rank_at_compensation varchar [note: 'The academic rank of the faculty member at the time this compensation record was effective. Captured here for historical accuracy even if rank changes later. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: professor|associate_professor|assistant_professor|instructor|lecturer|adjunct|emeritus — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this compensation record was first created in the lakehouse silver layer. Used for data lineage and audit purposes.']
  record_current_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current version of the compensation record in the lakehouse. True for the current version, false for historical versions. Used for Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_effective_from_date date [note: 'The date from which this version of the compensation record is effective in the lakehouse. Used for Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_effective_to_date date [note: 'The date until which this version of the compensation record is effective in the lakehouse. Null for the current version. Used for Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'The name of the source system from which this compensation record was extracted. Typically Workday HCM Compensation module.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this compensation record was most recently updated in the lakehouse silver layer. Used for data lineage and audit purposes.']
  salary_action_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text explanation or justification for the most recent salary action. May reference performance evaluation, market analysis, or retention concerns.']
  salary_basis varchar [note: 'The time basis on which the base salary is calculated. Common values include 9-month (academic year), 10-month, 12-month (calendar year), or hourly for adjunct faculty.']
  salary_step varchar [note: 'The step within the pay grade, if the institution uses a step-based salary structure. Common in unionized environments.']
  summer_salary_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The total summer salary amount paid to the faculty member during this compensation period, typically funded by research grants or summer teaching assignments.']
  summer_salary_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member is eligible to receive additional summer salary compensation beyond their base contract period. Typically true for 9-month faculty.']
  tenure_track_status varchar [note: 'The tenure track status of the faculty member at the time of this compensation record. Critical for AACSB and other accreditation reporting.']
  terminal_degree_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member holds a terminal degree in their field (typically PhD, EdD, MFA, JD, MD, or equivalent) at the time of this compensation record.']
  total_compensation_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The total compensation amount for this period, including base salary, summer salary, administrative stipends, overload pay, and any other supplemental compensation.']

  Note: 'Stores faculty compensation records by appointment period, including base salary, salary basis (9-month, 10-month, 12-month), summer salary eligibility, administrative stipend amounts, overload pay rate, total compensation, pay grade, market equity adjustment flag, and last salary action date and type. Sourced from Workday HCM Compensation module. Supports CUPA-HR salary benchmarking, equity analysis, and budget planning. Distinct from payroll transaction records owned by the HR domain.'
}

Table faculty.leave_record {
  leave_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the faculty leave record. Primary key.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the HR administrator, department chair, or dean who approved the leave request. Links to employee or faculty master data.']
  leave_policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Leave requests (FMLA, medical, parental, sabbatical) must comply with institutional leave policies defining eligibility, duration, pay continuation, and tenure clock impacts. HR and department chairs ']
  primary_leave_instructor_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the faculty member taking leave. Links to the faculty master data product.']
  actual_return_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member actually returned to active duty. Null if leave is still in progress or faculty has not yet returned. Used to calculate actual leave duration and tenure clock impact.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the leave request was officially approved by the approving authority. Null if leave is still pending or was denied.']
  approved_start_date date [note: 'Date the leave was officially approved to begin. This is the authoritative start date for payroll, benefits, and tenure clock calculations.']
  benefits_continuation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether health and welfare benefits continued during the leave period (true) or were suspended (false). FMLA requires benefits continuation; unpaid leave may not.']
  college_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the college or school of the faculty member at the time of leave. Used for institutional reporting and resource allocation.']
  denial_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation provided when a leave request is denied. Null if leave was approved or is still pending. Confidential HR information.']
  department_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the academic department of the faculty member at the time of leave. Used for workload impact analysis and course coverage planning.']
  disability_accommodation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether ADA (Americans with Disabilities Act) accommodations were requested or provided in connection with this leave (true) or not (false).']
  expected_return_date date [note: 'Anticipated date the faculty member will return to active duty. Used for course scheduling, committee assignments, and workload planning.']
  fmla_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member was eligible for FMLA protection at the time of leave (true) or not (false). Eligibility requires 12 months of service and 1,250 hours worked.']
  fmla_hours_used decimal(6,2) [note: 'Number of FMLA-protected hours consumed by this leave event. FMLA provides up to 480 hours (12 weeks) of protected leave per rolling 12-month period.']
  hr_case_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number or identifier for the HR case file associated with this leave. Links to Workday HCM case management for documentation, approvals, and correspondence.']
  intermittent_leave_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is an intermittent leave arrangement (true) allowing periodic absences, or a continuous block of leave (false). Intermittent FMLA is common for chronic conditions or ongoing treatment.']
  leave_duration_days varchar [note: 'Total number of calendar days of approved leave. Calculated from approved start date to expected return date, or to actual return date if completed.']
  leave_duration_weeks decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total leave duration expressed in weeks (decimal). Supports FMLA reporting which is measured in 12-week increments.']
  leave_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments regarding the leave event. May include special arrangements, coverage plans, or administrative details. Confidential HR information.']
  leave_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the leave request. Requested indicates pending review, approved indicates authorization granted, denied indicates rejection, in_progress indicates leave is currently active, completed indicates faculty has returned, cancelled indicates withdrawal of request.']
  leave_subtype varchar [note: 'Detailed classification within the primary leave type (e.g., maternity, paternity, adoption, serious health condition, caregiver, short-term disability, long-term disability, jury duty, bereavement). Provides granular categorization for HR reporting and policy compliance.']
  leave_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the leave event. FMLA (Family and Medical Leave Act) for federally protected family/medical leave, medical for non-FMLA health-related leave, parental for childbirth or adoption, military for active duty or training, administrative for institutional suspension or investigation, unpaid for voluntary leave without pay.']
  medical_certification_received_date date [note: 'Date the required medical certification was received by HR. Null if not required or not yet received. Affects leave approval timeline.']
  medical_certification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether medical certification or documentation was required to support the leave request (true) or not (false). Required for FMLA and medical leave types.']
  paid_leave_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the leave is paid (true) or unpaid (false). Affects payroll processing and benefits continuation.']
  partial_pay_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of regular salary paid during leave (0-100). Null if fully paid or fully unpaid. Used for short-term disability or phased return arrangements.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this leave record was first created in the source system. Audit trail for data lineage and compliance.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this leave record was extracted. Typically Workday HCM Absence Management module.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this leave record was last modified in the source system. Tracks changes to leave status, dates, or other attributes.']
  reduced_schedule_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the leave involves a reduced work schedule (true) rather than full absence (false). Common for phased return or accommodation arrangements.']
  reduced_schedule_fte decimal(4,3) [note: 'FTE percentage during reduced schedule leave (0.000-1.000). For example, 0.500 indicates half-time work during leave period. Null if not a reduced schedule arrangement.']
  requested_start_date date [note: 'Date the faculty member initially requested to begin leave. May differ from approved start date if HR or department negotiated timing.']
  return_to_work_certification_received_date date [note: 'Date the return-to-work medical clearance was received by HR. Null if not required or not yet received. Must be on file before faculty can resume duties.']
  return_to_work_certification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether medical clearance is required before the faculty member can return to active duty (true) or not (false). Common for medical and disability leave.']
  teaching_coverage_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether teaching coverage or course substitution was required during the leave period (true) or not (false). Drives adjunct hiring and course reassignment decisions.']
  tenure_clock_extension_months varchar [note: 'Number of months the tenure clock was extended as a result of this leave. Typically 12 months for parental or medical leave. Null if no extension granted.']
  tenure_clock_stop_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the tenure probationary clock was stopped during this leave (true) or continued to run (false). Critical for promotion and tenure timeline calculations.']
  workers_compensation_claim_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the associated workers compensation claim. Null if leave is not workers compensation related. Links to risk management and insurance systems.']
  workers_compensation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this leave is related to a workers compensation claim for work-related injury or illness (true) or not (false).']

  Note: 'Tracks all faculty leave events beyond sabbatical, including FMLA leave, medical leave, parental leave, military leave, administrative leave, and unpaid leave. Captures leave type, requested start date, approved start date, expected return date, actual return date, leave approval status, HR case reference, and impact on tenure clock (whether a tenure clock extension was granted as a result). Sourced from Workday HCM Absence Management module.'
}

Table faculty.advising_assignment {
  advising_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the advising assignment record. Primary key for the advising assignment entity.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the person or office that approved this advising assignment, typically a department chair or graduate dean.']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the faculty member serving as advisor. References the faculty domain SSOT for faculty identity.']
  mentorship_match_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.mentorship_match. Business justification: Faculty academic advisors coordinate with alumni career mentors in formal mentorship programs for holistic student support. Real business process: mentorship program staff link faculty advisors to alu']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the student being advised. References the student domain SSOT for student identity.']
  academic_program_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the academic program in which the student is enrolled and for which this advising relationship applies.']
  accreditation_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this advising assignment must be reported for accreditation purposes, particularly for specialized program accreditation.']
  actual_end_date date [note: 'Actual date when the advising assignment concluded, which may differ from the expected end date due to early completion, transfer, or other circumstances.']
  advising_credit_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of credit hours or teaching equivalency units assigned to the faculty member for this advising assignment, used in workload calculations.']
  advising_load_count decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative measure of the advising workload credit assigned to this relationship, used for faculty workload calculation and resource allocation. May be fractional for committee memberships.']
  advising_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the advising relationship indicating the nature and scope of the faculty member\'s advisory role with the student.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the advising assignment was formally approved by the designated authority.']
  approval_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this advising assignment required formal approval from department chair, graduate school, or other authority.']
  assignment_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes providing additional context, special circumstances, or important details about this advising assignment.']
  assignment_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason or context for establishing this advising assignment, such as initial program assignment, advisor change, or committee formation.']
  assignment_start_date date [note: 'Date when the advising assignment officially began and the faculty member assumed advisory responsibilities for the student.']
  assignment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the advising assignment indicating whether the relationship is currently active or has ended.']
  college_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the college or school responsible for this advising assignment, providing higher-level organizational context.']
  committee_role varchar [note: 'Specific role the faculty member plays on a thesis or dissertation committee, applicable when advising_type indicates committee membership.']
  compensation_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member is eligible for additional compensation or stipend for this advising assignment beyond regular salary.']
  department_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the academic department responsible for this advising assignment, typically the department offering the student\'s program.']
  expected_end_date date [note: 'Anticipated date when the advising assignment is expected to conclude, typically aligned with student graduation or program completion.']
  last_contact_date date [note: 'Most recent date when documented contact or advising meeting occurred between the faculty advisor and student.']
  meeting_frequency_requirement varchar [note: 'Expected frequency of advising meetings between faculty advisor and student as defined by program policy or advising agreement.']
  primary_advisor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this faculty member is the student\'s primary academic advisor, as students may have multiple concurrent advising relationships.']
  qualified_advisor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member meets institutional and accreditation requirements to serve in this advising capacity, including terminal degree and expertise requirements.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or system process that created this advising assignment record.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this advising assignment record was first created in the system.']
  record_current_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the advising assignment record in a slowly changing dimension implementation.']
  record_effective_from_date date [note: 'Date from which this version of the advising assignment record is effective, supporting temporal data management and historical tracking.']
  record_effective_to_date date [note: 'Date until which this version of the advising assignment record is effective, supporting temporal data management and historical tracking.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this advising assignment record originated, such as SIS, graduate school system, or advising platform.']
  record_updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or system process that most recently updated this advising assignment record.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this advising assignment record was most recently updated or modified.']
  research_area varchar [note: 'Primary research area or field of study focus for this advising relationship, particularly relevant for thesis and dissertation advising.']
  student_level varchar [note: 'Academic level of the student at the time of advising assignment, distinguishing between undergraduate, graduate, and professional program students.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for ending the advising assignment, such as graduation, advisor change, student withdrawal, or faculty departure.']
  thesis_dissertation_title varchar [note: 'Title of the thesis, dissertation, or capstone project for which this advising relationship was established, applicable for graduate advising.']

  Note: 'Records formal faculty advising relationships with graduate and undergraduate students, including advisee student ID, advising type (academic advisor, thesis advisor, dissertation chair, dissertation committee member, capstone supervisor), assignment start date, expected end date, actual end date, and advising load count. Supports graduate program oversight, faculty workload calculation (advising credit), and accreditation reporting on student mentorship. Cross-references the student domain SSOT for student identity.'
}

Table faculty.professional_development {
  professional_development_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the professional development activity record. Primary key for the professional development product.']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.donor. Business justification: Professional development often donor-funded (conference travel, sabbatical supplements, certification programs). Stewardship requires attribution. Real business process: donor impact reports show facu']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the department chair, dean, or administrator who approved the faculty member\'s participation in the professional development activity.']
  grant_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research grant that funded the professional development activity, if applicable. Links to research administration systems.']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member who participated in the professional development activity. Links to the faculty master data.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Name of the accreditation agency or body for which this professional development activity provides qualifying evidence (e.g., AACSB, ABET, HLC, SACSCOC).']
  accreditation_relevant_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the professional development activity contributes to accreditation continuous improvement evidence or faculty qualification requirements.']
  activity_cost decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total cost or fee for the professional development activity, including registration, materials, and any associated expenses.']
  activity_name varchar [note: 'The full name or title of the professional development activity, workshop, conference, training program, or certification course.']
  activity_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about the professional development activity, including learning outcomes, reflections, or special circumstances.']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the professional development activity. Distinguishes between workshops, conferences attended (not presented), training programs, certifications earned, online courses completed, and institutional development programs. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: workshop|conference_attendance|training_program|certification|online_course|teaching_center_program|leadership_academy|seminar|symposium|webinar — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  annual_review_included_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this professional development activity was included in the faculty member\'s annual performance review documentation.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the professional development activity participation was officially approved by the appropriate authority.']
  approval_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether institutional or departmental approval was required before the faculty member could participate in the professional development activity.']
  certification_earned varchar [note: 'Name of the professional certification, credential, or certificate earned upon completion of the activity. Null if no formal certification was awarded.']
  certification_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the earned certification or credential expires and requires renewal. Null for certifications without expiration.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique certification or credential number issued by the provider upon successful completion. Used for verification and accreditation documentation.']
  ceu_earned decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of Continuing Education Units earned for the professional development activity. One CEU typically equals 10 contact hours of participation in an organized continuing education experience.']
  college_code varchar [note: 'Code of the college or school with which the professional development activity is associated.']
  completion_date date [note: 'The date when the faculty member completed the professional development activity or received certification. Null if activity is ongoing or incomplete.']
  completion_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the faculty member\'s participation in the professional development activity, tracking progression from registration through completion.']
  credit_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of credit hours or contact hours earned for completing the professional development activity. Used for tracking continuing education requirements.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the activity cost (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  department_code varchar [note: 'Code of the academic department with which the professional development activity is associated or that approved the participation.']
  discipline_area varchar [note: 'Academic discipline or subject area focus of the professional development activity (e.g., pedagogy, research methods, technology integration, leadership).']
  funding_account_code varchar [note: 'Financial account or budget code from which the professional development activity was funded. Links to institutional financial systems for expense tracking.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Source of funding that covered the cost of the professional development activity. Indicates whether the expense was institutional, grant-funded, departmental, personally paid, or externally sponsored.']
  location_city varchar [note: 'City where the professional development activity was held, if conducted in-person or hybrid. Null for fully online activities.']
  location_country varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the country where the professional development activity was held. Null for fully online activities.']
  location_state varchar [note: 'State or province where the professional development activity was held. Null for fully online activities.']
  location_type varchar [note: 'Classification of where the professional development activity took place: on-campus, off-campus, fully online, or hybrid format.']
  promotion_tenure_relevant_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this professional development activity is relevant to promotion and tenure review processes and dossier documentation.']
  provider_name varchar [note: 'Name of the organization, institution, or entity that provided or hosted the professional development activity.']
  provider_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the provider organization type, indicating whether the activity was provided by a university, professional association, commercial vendor, government agency, nonprofit, or internal institutional unit.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the person who created this professional development activity record.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this professional development activity record was first created in the system.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this professional development record originated (e.g., Workday HCM, faculty self-service portal, departmental tracking system).']
  record_updated_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the person who last updated this professional development activity record.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this professional development activity record was last modified or updated.']
  relevance_to_research boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the professional development activity is directly relevant to enhancing research skills, methodologies, or scholarly productivity.']
  relevance_to_service boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the professional development activity is directly relevant to institutional service, committee work, or administrative responsibilities.']
  relevance_to_teaching boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the professional development activity is directly relevant to improving teaching effectiveness and instructional practices.']
  start_date date [note: 'The date when the professional development activity began or was first attended by the faculty member.']

  Note: 'Tracks faculty participation in professional development activities including workshops, conferences attended (not presented), training programs, certifications earned, online courses completed, and institutional development programs (teaching center workshops, leadership academies). Captures activity name, provider, activity type, completion date, credit hours or CEUs earned, cost, and funding source (institutional, grant, personal). Supports annual review documentation and accreditation continuous improvement evidence.'
}

Table faculty.endowed_position {
  endowed_position_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the endowed or named faculty position record. Primary key.']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the donor record in the advancement system for stewardship reporting and relationship management.']
  endowment_finance_fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.finance_fund. Business justification: Endowed positions are funded by specific endowment funds with spending policies, distribution rules, and donor restrictions. Links endowed chair appointments to the financial fund for distribution tra']
  endowment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.endowment. Business justification: Endowed positions are funded by specific endowments. Business requires tracking market value, spending policy, and stewardship obligations. Real business process: annual endowment reports to donors sh']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the faculty member currently appointed to this endowed position. Null if the position is vacant.']
  primary_endowed_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the academic department that administratively houses this endowed position.']
  appointment_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the current appointment to this endowed position is scheduled to end. Null for indefinite appointments.']
  appointment_start_date date [note: 'The date on which the current faculty holder began their appointment to this endowed position.']
  appointment_term_years varchar [note: 'The standard term length in years for appointments to this endowed position as specified in the donor agreement or institutional policy.']
  approval_authority varchar [note: 'The institutional role or committee responsible for approving appointments to this endowed position (e.g., Provost, Board of Trustees, Dean).']
  cip_code varchar [note: 'Six-digit CIP code identifying the instructional program area aligned with this endowed position for federal reporting.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts associated with this endowed position (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  discipline_area varchar [note: 'The academic discipline or field of study that this endowed position is designated to support (e.g., Economics, Engineering, Medicine).']
  discretionary_fund_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Annual discretionary funding amount available to the position holder for research, travel, professional development, or other scholarly activities.']
  donor_recognition_level varchar [note: 'The institutional recognition tier assigned to the donor based on the gift amount establishing this endowed position, used for stewardship and engagement planning.']
  donor_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor agreement requires periodic reporting on the activities and accomplishments of the position holder.']
  establishment_date date [note: 'The date on which the endowed position was formally established by the institution, typically aligned with donor gift acceptance.']
  gift_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The original principal amount of the donor gift that established the endowment fund supporting this position.']
  gift_date date [note: 'The date on which the donor gift establishing the endowment was received and accepted by the institution.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'The date on which the endowed position and its holder were last reviewed for compliance with donor obligations and institutional standards.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next review of the endowed position and its holder for compliance with donor obligations and institutional standards.']
  position_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, historical context, or special considerations related to this endowed position.']
  position_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the endowed position indicating whether it is filled, vacant, or otherwise unavailable.']
  position_title varchar [note: 'The formal title of the endowed position as established by the donor or institution (e.g., \'John Smith Chair in Economics\', \'Distinguished Professor of Engineering\').']
  position_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the endowed position indicating the level and nature of the appointment.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this endowed position record was first created in the data platform.']
  record_current_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the endowed position record in a Type 2 slowly changing dimension implementation.']
  record_effective_from_date date [note: 'The date from which this version of the endowed position record is effective, supporting Type 2 slowly changing dimension tracking.']
  record_effective_to_date date [note: 'The date until which this version of the endowed position record is effective. Null for the current active record.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'The name of the source system from which this endowed position record originated (e.g., Blackbaud Raisers Edge, Workday HCM, custom endowment tracking system).']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this endowed position record was last modified in the data platform.']
  renewable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the appointment to this endowed position is eligible for renewal at the end of the term.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'The frequency with which stewardship reports must be provided to the donor regarding the endowed position holder and their activities.']
  research_requirement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the position holder is required to maintain an active research program as a condition of the endowed appointment.']
  salary_supplement_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Annual salary supplement or stipend provided to the position holder from the endowment distribution, above their base faculty salary.']
  selection_criteria varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the qualifications, expertise, and criteria required for faculty appointment to this endowed position as specified by the donor or institution.']
  service_requirement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the position holder is required to perform specific service activities (e.g., committee work, community engagement) as a condition of the endowed appointment.']
  special_obligations varchar [note: 'Detailed description of any unique obligations, expectations, or deliverables required of the position holder as specified in the donor agreement.']
  teaching_requirement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the position holder is required to maintain a teaching load as a condition of the endowed appointment.']

  Note: 'Tracks named and endowed faculty positions (endowed chairs, named professorships, distinguished professorships) including position title, endowment fund reference, donor name, award criteria, annual distribution amount, current holder faculty ID, appointment start date, and renewal terms. Supports advancement and donor stewardship reporting by linking faculty recognition to philanthropic gifts. Distinct from the standard appointment record as endowed positions carry unique donor obligations and reporting requirements.'
}

Table faculty.external_engagement {
  external_engagement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the external professional engagement record.']
  coi_policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: External engagements (consulting, board service, equity holdings) must comply with institutional conflict of interest policies. Faculty disclose engagements; compliance officers review against policy ']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.donor. Business justification: Faculty consulting/board service for donor organizations requires conflict-of-interest and stewardship tracking. Real business process: major gift officers review faculty external engagements with pro']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the faculty member participating in the external engagement.']
  primary_external_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the academic department to which the faculty member belongs at the time of this external engagement.']
  accreditation_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this external engagement qualifies as reportable intellectual contribution evidence for accreditation purposes (AACSB, ABET, etc.).']
  approval_conditions varchar [note: 'Any conditions, restrictions, or stipulations attached to the institutional approval of this external engagement.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when institutional approval was granted for this external engagement.']
  compensation_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary compensation amount disclosed by the faculty member for this external engagement. Null if no compensation or not disclosed.']

  end_date date [note: 'Date when the external engagement concluded or is scheduled to conclude. Null for ongoing engagements without a defined end date.']
  engagement_notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes, comments, or context regarding this external engagement.']
  engagement_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or reference number assigned to this external engagement for tracking and reporting purposes.']
  engagement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the external engagement indicating approval and activity state. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: pending_approval|approved|active|completed|declined|cancelled|suspended — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  engagement_type varchar [note: 'Category of external professional engagement. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: consulting|expert_witness|board_membership|advisory_board|media_appearance|policy_advisory|professional_service|editorial_board|peer_review|conference_organizer|grant_reviewer|accreditation_reviewer|other — promote to reference product]']
  estimated_time_commitment_hours decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated total number of hours the faculty member will dedicate to this external engagement over its duration.']
  impact_on_teaching_load_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this external engagement is expected to impact the faculty member\'s teaching load or course assignments.']
  institutional_approval_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether institutional approval is required for this type of external engagement per university policy.']
  institutional_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the institutional approval process for this external engagement.']
  institutional_resources_description varchar [note: 'Description of the institutional resources to be used in support of the external engagement, if applicable.']
  intellectual_contribution_category varchar [note: 'AACSB classification of the intellectual contribution type represented by this external engagement for accreditation reporting.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent institutional review or re-certification of this external engagement.']

  record_current_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the current active version of the external engagement record in a Type 2 slowly changing dimension.']

  record_effective_to_date date [note: 'End date of the validity period for this version of the external engagement record. Null for the current active version.']

  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this external engagement record was last modified or updated.']

  time_commitment_period varchar [note: 'Time period over which the estimated time commitment is measured or averaged.']
  use_of_institutional_resources_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the faculty member will use institutional resources (facilities, equipment, staff, intellectual property) in support of this external engagement.']

  Note: 'Records faculty external professional engagements including consulting agreements, expert witness roles, board memberships, industry advisory roles, media appearances, and policy advisory positions. Captures engagement type, organization name, role description, start and end dates, estimated time commitment, disclosed compensation (if any), conflict of interest disclosure status, and institutional approval status. Supports conflict of interest management, accreditation external engagement evidence, and AACSB intellectual contributions tracking.'
}

Table faculty.faculty_training_completion {
  faculty_training_completion_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for faculty_training_completion']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the compliance officer or system administrator who assigned this training to the instructor. Used for audit trail and accountability. May be system-generated for automatic assignments based on role or policy.']
  instructor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the instructor who completed or is assigned the training program']
  training_completion_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for this training completion record. Primary key for the association.']
  training_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the specific compliance training program completed or assigned']
  waived_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the compliance officer who approved the training waiver. Null unless completion_status is waived. Used for audit trail and accountability.']
  assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage score achieved by the instructor on the training assessment or quiz. Used to determine whether passing_score_percentage threshold was met. Null if training does not include assessment or has not been attempted.']
  assignment_date date [note: 'Date on which this training program was assigned to the instructor. Used to calculate due_date and track compliance timeline. Set when training is initially assigned or when recertification is triggered.']
  attempt_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number indicating which attempt this represents for this instructor-training combination. Increments when instructor retakes training for recertification or after previous failure. Used to track training history and identify instructors requiring additional support.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique certificate identifier issued upon successful completion of the training program. Used for audit verification and compliance reporting. Null if training does not issue certificates or has not been completed.']
  completion_date date [note: 'Date on which the instructor successfully completed the training program and met all requirements including passing assessment score. Null if training is assigned but not yet completed.']
  completion_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the training completion record. Assigned indicates training has been assigned but not started; in_progress indicates instructor has begun but not completed; completed indicates successful completion with passing score; expired indicates completion has passed recertification date; overdue indicates assigned training past due date; waived indicates training requirement waived by compliance officer.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which the instructor must complete the assigned training program. Calculated as assignment_date plus completion_deadline_days from the training program. Used to identify overdue training and escalate compliance issues.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which this training completion expires and recertification is required. Calculated as completion_date plus recertification_frequency_months from the training program. Used to trigger recertification notifications and compliance reporting.']
  last_access_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent time the instructor accessed the training content. Used to identify stalled or abandoned training attempts and trigger follow-up reminders.']
  last_notification_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent reminder notification sent to the instructor. Used to manage notification frequency and avoid over-communication.']
  notification_sent_count varchar [note: 'Number of reminder notifications sent to the instructor regarding this training assignment. Used to track communication attempts and escalation procedures.']
  time_spent_minutes varchar [note: 'Total time in minutes the instructor spent on the training content, tracked by the LMS or training platform. Used for engagement analysis and to verify minimum time requirements if applicable.']
  waiver_date date [note: 'Date on which the training waiver was approved. Null unless completion_status is waived. Used for compliance reporting and audit documentation.']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the training requirement was waived for this instructor. Null unless completion_status is waived. Used for compliance documentation and audit purposes.']

  Note: 'This association product represents the completion event between instructor and training_program. It captures the compliance training completion lifecycle for faculty members, including completion status, assessment results, certification details, and recertification tracking. Each record links one instructor to one training_program with attributes that exist only in the context of this specific completion instance.. Existence Justification: In higher education compliance operations, instructors are required to complete multiple mandatory training programs (Title IX, FERPA, research ethics, cybersecurity, safety) throughout their employment, and each training program is completed by many instructors across the institution. The business actively manages training completion as a distinct operational entity with lifecycle tracking (assigned, in-progress, completed, expired, overdue), assessment results, certification issuance, and recertification scheduling. Compliance officers query and manage these completion records to ensure regulatory adherence and generate audit reports.'
}

Table faculty.event_participation {
