  prospect_rating varchar [note: 'Fundraising capacity rating assigned to the award recipient following the award conferral. May be updated based on research into the recipients professional success and philanthropic capacity.']
  publication_issue varchar [note: 'Specific issue or edition of the alumni publication in which the recipient was featured. Includes publication name, volume, and issue number.']
  recipient_acceptance_date date [note: 'Date on which the alumnus formally accepted the award. Triggers planning for presentation ceremony and public announcement.']
  recipient_acceptance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the selected alumnus has formally accepted the award. Some recipients may decline due to personal or professional reasons.']
  recipient_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier for this award recipient record. Used in communications, certificates, and external reporting. Format may include award year and sequence.']
  recognition_level varchar [note: 'Scope or tier of the award indicating whether it is institution-wide, college-specific, department-level, or broader (national/international). Used for prospect qualification and engagement scoring. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: institutional|college|department|chapter|regional|national|international — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  selection_committee_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the selection committee formally reviewed and evaluated the nomination. Represents a key milestone in the award decision process.']
  selection_decision_date date [note: 'Date on which the selection committee or governing body made the final decision to confer the award to this recipient.']
  selection_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the award recipient record in the selection and conferral lifecycle. Tracks progression from nomination through final award presentation.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the system user who created this award recipient record. Supports audit and accountability requirements.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an alumnus receiving a specific institutional award in a given year. Captures award reference, alumnus reference, nomination date, nomination source, selection committee decision date, award presentation date, award ceremony event reference, citation text, press release issued flag, and whether the recipient was featured in alumni publications. Enables recognition tracking and advancement prospect qualification.'
}

Table advancement.outreach_communication {
  outreach_communication_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the outreach communication record. Primary key.']
  alumnus_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the alumnus who received this communication. Links to the alumnus master record.']
  appeal_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific fundraising appeal or solicitation associated with this communication, if applicable.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the fundraising or engagement campaign associated with this communication, if applicable.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the alumni relations or advancement staff member who sent or initiated the communication.']
  enterprise_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.enterprise_application. Business justification: Communications sent via specific platforms (Constant Contact, Mailchimp, Slate) require system attribution for deliverability tracking, bounce analysis, CAN-SPAM compliance reporting, and vendor perfo']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Outreach communications occur in specific fiscal periods for campaign tracking and cost allocation. Creating outreach_communication.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based r']
  bounce_reason varchar [note: 'The reason provided by the delivery system for why the communication bounced or failed to deliver (e.g., invalid address, mailbox full).']
  clicked_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the recipient clicked on any link within the digital communication. True if clicked, False if not clicked or not tracked.']
  clicked_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the recipient first clicked on a link within the digital communication, if tracked.']
  communication_date date [note: 'The date on which the communication was sent or initiated to the alumnus.']
  communication_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments about this communication, including context, special circumstances, or staff observations.']
  communication_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier or tracking number for this outreach communication, used for reference and audit purposes.']
  communication_status varchar [note: 'The current lifecycle status of the communication record (draft, scheduled, sent, completed, cancelled).']
  communication_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise date and time when the communication was sent or initiated, including time zone information.']
  communication_type varchar [note: 'The medium or channel through which the communication was sent (email, letter, phone call, text message, social media direct message, postcard).']
  cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The cost incurred to send this communication (e.g., postage, printing, SMS fees, email service fees).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this communication record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the cost amount (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  delivery_status varchar [note: 'The delivery status of the communication indicating whether it was successfully sent, delivered, bounced, or failed.']
  delivery_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the communication was confirmed as delivered to the recipient, if applicable.']
  ferpa_compliant_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this communication was logged and handled in compliance with FERPA regulations. True if compliant, False otherwise.']
  follow_up_date date [note: 'The scheduled or target date for follow-up action related to this communication.']
  follow_up_notes varchar [note: 'Notes or instructions regarding the required follow-up action for this communication.']
  follow_up_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether follow-up action is required by advancement staff based on this communication or its response. True if follow-up needed, False otherwise.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this communication record was last updated or modified in the system.']
  message_body varchar [note: 'The full text content or body of the communication sent to the alumnus.']
  opened_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the digital communication (email, text) was opened by the recipient. True if opened, False if not opened or not tracked.']
  opened_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the digital communication was first opened by the recipient, if tracked.']
  opt_out_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the alumnus opted out of future communications as a result of this outreach. True if opted out, False otherwise.']
  package_code varchar [note: 'A code identifying the specific communication package or template used for this outreach (e.g., annual fund letter package A, reunion email template B).']
  response_date date [note: 'The date on which a response was received from the alumnus, if applicable.']
  response_received_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a response was received from the alumnus following this communication. True if response received, False otherwise.']
  response_type varchar [note: 'The type or nature of the response received from the alumnus (e.g., gift, pledge, inquiry, opt-out request, complaint).']
  segment_code varchar [note: 'A code identifying the alumni segment or target audience group for this communication (e.g., major gift prospects, young alumni, reunion class).']
  sender_email varchar [note: 'The email address from which the communication was sent, if applicable.']
  sender_name varchar [note: 'The name of the staff member or office that appears as the sender of the communication.']
  solicitation_code varchar [note: 'A code or identifier used to track the specific solicitation strategy or segment associated with this communication.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The name of the source system or platform from which this communication record originated (e.g., Blackbaud Raisers Edge, Slate CRM, email marketing platform).']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this communication record in the source system of record.']
  subject varchar [note: 'The subject line or topic of the communication (e.g., email subject, letter title, call purpose).']

  Note: 'Transactional record of each outbound communication sent to an alumnus by alumni relations or advancement staff. Captures communication type (email, letter, phone call, text message, social media direct message), communication date, subject or topic, associated campaign or appeal, staff sender, delivery status (sent, delivered, bounced, undelivered), open/click flag for digital communications, response received flag, and follow-up action required. Supports communication history, FERPA-compliant contact logging, and outreach effectiveness tracking.'
}

Table advancement.donor {
  donor_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the donor record. Primary key for the donor entity. Serves as the system-of-record identifier in Blackbaud Raisers Edge.']
  alumnus_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.alumnus. Business justification: Donors who are alumni require direct linkage for comprehensive constituent relationship management, lifetime giving analysis, and integrated advancement operations. Enables single-view reporting acros']
  constituent_id varchar [note: 'External constituent identifier from Blackbaud Raisers Edge. Business-facing identifier used for donor lookup and correspondence.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the advancement officer or gift officer assigned to manage the relationship with this donor. Used for portfolio management and accountability.']
  identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.identity_account. Business justification: Donors with institutional accounts (online giving portals, event registration, donor dashboards) require identity linkage for SSO authentication, personalized giving history displays, and secure docum']
  primary_spouse_donor_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the donor\'s spouse if the spouse is also a constituent in the database. Used for household giving analysis and joint recognition.']
  address_verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of address validation through USPS NCOA or other verification services. Indicates deliverability and accuracy of mailing address.']
  alternate_email varchar [note: 'Secondary email address for donor contact. Used when primary email is unavailable or for specific communication preferences.']
  consecutive_giving_years varchar [note: 'Number of consecutive fiscal years the donor has made a gift. Used to identify loyal donors for recognition societies and retention strategies.']
  constituent_classification varchar [note: 'CASE-compliant constituent classification indicating primary relationship to the institution. Used for segmentation and reporting to CASE and VSE surveys.']
  deceased_date date [note: 'Date of death for deceased donors. Used for memorial gift processing and estate settlement tracking.']
  deceased_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor is deceased. When true, suppresses all solicitation communications and triggers estate/planned giving protocols.']
  do_not_contact_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates the donor has requested no contact from the institution. When true, suppresses all solicitation, marketing, and non-essential communications. Overrides all other communication preferences.']
  do_not_solicit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates the donor has requested no fundraising solicitations. When true, suppresses appeals and solicitation calls but allows stewardship and informational communications.']
  donor_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the donor record. Active donors have given within the last 24 months. Lapsed donors have not given recently but have historical giving. Deceased and do-not-contact statuses suppress solicitation.']
  donor_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the donor entity type. Determines applicable tax treatment, reporting requirements, and stewardship protocols.']
  fiscal_year_giving_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total giving from this donor in the current fiscal year. Used for annual fund reporting and donor recognition society qualification.']
  giving_capacity_rating varchar [note: 'Prospect research rating indicating the donor\'s estimated philanthropic capacity. Used for major gift identification and portfolio assignment. Proprietary rating scale from wealth screening vendor.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the donor as it appears on official documents, tax receipts, and gift agreements. For individuals: full legal name. For organizations: registered legal entity name.']
  mobile_phone varchar [note: 'Mobile telephone number for SMS communications and mobile-first outreach. Subject to TCPA consent requirements for text messaging.']
  ncoa_update_date date [note: 'Date when the donor\'s address was last updated through USPS National Change of Address processing. Used to maintain address accuracy and reduce returned mail.']
  portfolio_assignment varchar [note: 'Fundraising portfolio to which the donor is assigned. Indicates which advancement officer or team is responsible for donor cultivation and solicitation.']
  preferred_name varchar [note: 'Name the donor prefers to be addressed by in communications, event materials, and donor recognition. May differ from legal name.']
  primary_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the donor\'s primary mailing address (street number and name). Used for gift acknowledgments, tax receipts, and solicitation mailings.']
  primary_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the donor\'s primary mailing address (apartment, suite, unit, building). Optional field for additional address details.']
  primary_affiliation varchar [note: 'Primary institutional affiliation of the donor (e.g., College of Engineering, School of Business, Athletics). Used for targeted appeals and recognition.']
  primary_city varchar [note: 'City name for the donor\'s primary mailing address. Used for geographic segmentation and regional campaign targeting.']
  primary_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the donor\'s primary mailing address. Used for international donor segmentation and tax compliance.']
  primary_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for donor communications, gift acknowledgments, and electronic correspondence. Subject to CAN-SPAM compliance.']
  primary_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone contact number for the donor. Used for solicitation calls, event invitations, and stewardship outreach.']
  primary_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the donor\'s primary mailing address. Used for address validation, NCOA processing, and geographic analysis.']
  primary_state_province varchar [note: 'State or province code for the donor\'s primary mailing address. Two-letter abbreviation for US states or equivalent for international addresses.']
  record_created_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this donor record was first created in the system. Used for data lineage and audit trail.']
  record_last_modified_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this donor record was last updated. Used for data quality monitoring and change tracking.']
  salutation varchar [note: 'Formal salutation used in correspondence and communications (e.g., Dr., Mr., Mrs., Ms., The Honorable). Respects donor preferences for formal address.']
  stewardship_tier varchar [note: 'Donor stewardship level based on cumulative giving, giving capacity, and engagement. Determines frequency and type of personalized outreach and recognition.']
  wealth_screening_date date [note: 'Date when the donor\'s wealth and capacity rating was last updated through electronic screening or prospect research. Used to ensure rating currency.']
  work_phone varchar [note: 'Business telephone number for corporate donors or individual donors who prefer work contact. Includes extension if applicable.']

  Note: 'Master record for all donors and prospective donors (individuals, corporations, foundations, and organizations). SSOT for donor identity, biographical data, contact information, addresses, communication preferences, giving capacity ratings, relationship classification, and inter-constituent relationships (spouse, employer, parent-child). Sourced from Blackbaud Raisers Edge. Tracks donor type, primary affiliation, CASE-compliant constituent classification, stewardship tier, and portfolio assignment to gift officers. Includes contact details (addresses, phones, emails with type and preference flags) and relationship graph data previously modeled separately.'
}

Table advancement.gift {
  gift_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the gift transaction. Primary key for the gift record.']
  advancement_fund_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the institutional fund or account to which the gift is designated. Links to the fund master record for tracking gift allocation and endowment stewardship.']
  appeal_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.appeal. Business justification: gift has a STRING attribute \'appeal_code\' that should be normalized to a FK relationship. Gifts are often made in response to specific fundraising appeals. The appeal entity already exists in the doma']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fundraising campaign associated with this gift. Used for campaign performance tracking and goal attainment reporting.']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the alumnus or external donor who made the gift. Links to the donor master record in the advancement system.']
  enterprise_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.enterprise_application. Business justification: Gifts processed through specific payment platforms (Blackbaud Merchant Services, Stripe, PayPal) require system attribution for payment reconciliation, PCI-DSS compliance auditing, transaction fee ana']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Gifts are recorded in specific fiscal periods for revenue recognition and financial reporting. Creating gift.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  gift_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member, volunteer, or alumnus who solicited or facilitated the gift. Used for crediting and performance tracking.']
  gift_officer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the advancement staff member responsible for managing the donor relationship and processing this gift. Used for portfolio management and performance tracking.']
  ipeds_submission_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.ipeds_submission. Business justification: Gifts are reported in IPEDS Finance component (private gifts/grants revenue) and IPEDS Endowment component. Direct link required for data integrity, audit reconciliation, and to support IPEDS keyholde']
  pledge_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the pledge record if this gift is a payment toward a multi-year pledge commitment. Links to the pledge master record for tracking fulfillment.']
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_filing. Business justification: Major gifts trigger IRS Form 990 reporting, UBIT filings, and state charitable solicitation registrations. Link required for audit trail verification and to support annual compliance filing reconcilia']
  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award. Business justification: Gifts often designated for specific research awards or labs. Critical for stewardship reporting, impact metrics, and fund accounting. Advancement must track which gifts support which research for dono']
  revenue_ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Gifts post to specific revenue ledger accounts for GL accounting. Creating gift.revenue_ledger_account_id to link to finance.ledger_account for revenue recognition and financial reporting.']
  acknowledgment_date date [note: 'The date the acknowledgment letter or receipt was sent to the donor. Required for IRS substantiation requirements and donor stewardship tracking.']
  acknowledgment_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether a thank-you acknowledgment letter or receipt has been sent to the donor. Critical for donor stewardship and IRS compliance.']
  amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The monetary value of the gift in the transaction currency. For in-kind gifts, this represents the fair market value as appraised or declared.']
  amount_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'The gift amount converted to US Dollars using the exchange rate on the gift date. Used for consolidated reporting and CASE VSE compliance.']
  anonymous_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor has requested anonymity for this gift. When true, donor identity is not disclosed in public recognition or reporting.']
  case_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this gift qualifies for inclusion in CASE Voluntary Support of Education (VSE) reporting. Based on CASE counting standards and gift type.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this gift record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the gift amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for international gift processing and multi-currency reporting.']
  deposit_date date [note: 'The date the gift funds were deposited into the institutional bank account. Used for cash flow tracking and financial reconciliation.']
  first_gift_date date [note: 'Date of the donor\'s first recorded gift to the institution. Used to calculate donor tenure and loyalty metrics. [Moved from donor: This attribute represents the date of the first gift transaction, which is a derived value from the gift association. It should be calculated from gift.gift_date rather than stored redundantly on the donor record.]']
  gift_date date [note: 'The date the gift was received or postmarked, representing the official transaction date for accounting and reporting purposes. This is the primary business event timestamp for the gift.']
  gift_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the gift transaction, typically a human-readable sequential or formatted number assigned by the advancement office for tracking and reference purposes.']
  gift_source varchar [note: 'Classification of the donor type: individual, corporation, foundation, organization, or other entity. Used for CASE VSE reporting and donor segmentation.']
  gift_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the gift transaction indicating whether it has been received, is pending processing, or has been cancelled or adjusted.']
  gift_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the gift based on its nature: outright gift, pledge payment, matching gift, gift-in-kind, securities transfer, or planned giving instrument.']
  in_kind_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the donated property, goods, or services for in-kind gifts. Required for IRS substantiation and institutional asset management.']
  ipeds_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this gift must be included in IPEDS Finance Survey reporting to the U.S. Department of Education.']
  largest_gift_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of the largest single gift received from this donor. Used for major gift benchmarking and upgrade solicitation strategies. [Moved from donor: This attribute represents the amount of the largest gift transaction, which is a derived value from the gift association. It should be calculated from gift.gift_amount rather than stored redundantly on the donor record.]']
  last_gift_date date [note: 'Date of the donor\'s most recent gift. Used to identify lapsed donors and calculate recency metrics for predictive modeling. [Moved from donor: This attribute represents the date of the most recent gift transaction, which is a derived value from the gift association. It should be calculated from gift.gift_date rather than stored redundantly on the donor record.]']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this gift record was most recently updated. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and data synchronization.']
  lifetime_giving_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative total of all gifts received from this donor since the first gift date. Includes cash, pledges paid, and gifts-in-kind at fair market value. Excludes pledge balances. [Moved from donor: This attribute represents the cumulative sum of all gift amounts, which is a derived aggregate from the gift association. It should be calculated from SUM(gift.gift_amount) rather than stored redundantly on the donor record.]']
  matching_gift_company_name varchar [note: 'Name of the corporation or employer that may provide a matching gift for this donation. Used for matching gift claim processing.']
  matching_gift_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this gift is eligible for corporate matching gift programs. Used to trigger matching gift solicitation workflows.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing additional context, special instructions, or donor communications related to the gift. Used for stewardship and internal coordination.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'The instrument or mechanism used to make the gift: cash, check, credit card, wire transfer, ACH, stock transfer, property donation, or other method. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cash|check|credit_card|wire_transfer|ach|stock|property|other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  payment_reference_number varchar [note: 'External reference number from the payment processor, bank, or credit card transaction. Used for reconciliation and audit trail.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Free-text description of the donors intended use or purpose for the gift. Captures donor intent for restricted gifts and stewardship reporting.']
  receipt_number varchar [note: 'Unique receipt number issued to the donor for tax purposes. Required for gifts above IRS thresholds and for donor record-keeping.']
  restriction_type varchar [note: 'Classification of gift restrictions per FASB/GASB accounting standards: unrestricted, temporarily restricted, or permanently restricted (endowment).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system from which this gift record originated (e.g., Blackbaud Raisers Edge, manual entry). Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this gift record in the source operational system. Used for data lineage, reconciliation, and bi-directional synchronization.']
  stock_shares decimal(15,4) [note: 'Number of shares transferred for securities gifts. Used in conjunction with stock price to calculate gift value.']
  stock_symbol varchar [note: 'Ticker symbol for securities gifts. Used for tracking stock transfers and calculating fair market value at the time of transfer.']
  tax_deductible_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The portion of the gift amount that qualifies as tax-deductible under IRS regulations. May differ from gift amount for quid pro quo gifts or benefits received.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of every completed gift received by the institution, including outright gifts, matching gifts, gifts-in-kind, and securities transfers. Captures gift date, amount, fund designation, gift type (cash, check, credit card, wire, stock, in-kind), campaign attribution, appeal code, acknowledgment status, and receipting information. SSOT for gift history and the primary source for CASE VSE (Voluntary Support of Education) reporting and IPEDS finance reporting. Sourced from Blackbaud Raiser\'s Edge gift module.'
}

Table advancement.pledge {
  pledge_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the pledge record. Primary key.']
  advancement_fund_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the designated fund or endowment to which the pledge is directed.']
  appeal_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific fundraising appeal or solicitation effort that resulted in this pledge.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fundraising campaign associated with this pledge.']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the alumnus or constituent who made the pledge commitment.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the advancement staff member, volunteer, or alumnus who solicited this pledge.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Pledges are recorded in specific fiscal periods for receivable tracking and financial reporting. Creating pledge.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  receivable_ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Pledges post to pledge receivable ledger accounts for GL accounting. Creating pledge.receivable_ledger_account_id to link to finance.ledger_account for receivable tracking and financial reporting.']
  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award. Business justification: Pledges designated for research need linkage to specific awards for fulfillment tracking, stewardship, and financial planning. Advancement tracks pledge payments against research funding commitments f']
  acknowledgment_date date [note: 'The date on which the pledge acknowledgment letter or receipt was sent to the donor.']
  acknowledgment_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal acknowledgment letter or receipt has been sent to the donor for this pledge.']
  amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The total committed amount of the pledge across all installments, representing the donor\'s full commitment.']
  amount_paid decimal(15,2) [note: 'The cumulative amount that has been paid against the pledge to date, calculated from completed installment payments.']
  anonymous_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor has requested that this pledge remain anonymous in public recognition and reporting.']
  balance_outstanding decimal(15,2) [note: 'The remaining unpaid balance on the pledge, calculated as pledge_amount minus amount_paid minus write_off_amount.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this pledge record was first created in the data platform.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the pledge amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  designation varchar [note: 'The specific purpose, program, or project to which the pledge is designated, such as scholarship fund, building project, or unrestricted support.']
  final_installment_date date [note: 'The due date for the final scheduled installment payment, representing the expected completion date of the pledge.']
  first_installment_date date [note: 'The due date for the first scheduled installment payment.']
  installment_frequency varchar [note: 'The recurring schedule on which pledge installments are due, such as monthly, quarterly, or annually.']
  installments_paid varchar [note: 'The count of installments that have been successfully paid to date.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this pledge record was most recently updated in the data platform.']
  last_payment_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The amount of the most recent installment payment received.']
  last_payment_date date [note: 'The date on which the most recent installment payment was received.']
  matching_gift_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this pledge is eligible for corporate matching gift programs.']
  next_installment_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The scheduled payment amount for the next upcoming installment.']
  next_installment_date date [note: 'The due date for the next upcoming installment payment, used for reminder workflows and aging analysis.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing additional context, special conditions, donor preferences, or stewardship considerations related to the pledge.']
  number_of_installments varchar [note: 'The total number of scheduled installment payments for this pledge.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'The preferred or default payment instrument the donor will use to fulfill pledge installments, such as check, credit card, or electronic funds transfer (EFT). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: check|credit_card|eft|wire|stock|cash|payroll_deduction — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  pledge_date date [note: 'The date on which the donor formally committed to the pledge. This is the principal business event timestamp for the pledge origination.']
  pledge_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier or reference number for the pledge, often used in donor communications and receipts.']
  pledge_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the pledge commitment indicating whether it is active, fulfilled, or terminated.']
  pledge_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the pledge based on its structure and conditions, such as outright, multi-year installment, or conditional commitment.']
  reminder_date date [note: 'The date on which a payment reminder should be sent to the donor for an upcoming installment.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The name of the operational system from which this pledge record was sourced, typically Blackbaud Raiser\'s Edge.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this pledge record in the source operational system.']
  tax_deductible_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The portion of the pledge that qualifies as a tax-deductible charitable contribution under IRS regulations.']
  write_off_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The portion of the pledge that has been written off as uncollectible, reducing the expected receivable.']
  write_off_date date [note: 'The date on which the pledge or a portion thereof was written off as uncollectible.']
  write_off_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or justification for writing off the pledge amount, such as donor financial hardship, death, or inability to contact.']

  Note: 'Record of a donor\'s formal commitment to make a future gift, including multi-year pledge schedules with individual installment detail (due dates, scheduled amounts, payment status per installment), pledge balance, installment frequency, reminder dates, and fulfillment status. Tracks pledge origination date, total amount, amount paid to date, outstanding balance, write-off amounts, and installment-level aging. Supports pledge reminder workflows, automated installment tracking, and aging analysis. Sourced from Blackbaud Raisers Edge pledge module. Distinct from gift (completed transactions) and planned_gift (deferred/estate commitments).'
}

Table advancement.campaign {
  campaign_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the fundraising campaign or donor recognition program. Primary key.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Campaigns often align with academic cost centers for budget allocation and expense tracking. Creating campaign.cost_center_id to link to finance.cost_center for financial reporting and stewardship.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Staff member responsible for coordinating and managing the campaign.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Campaigns span fiscal periods and are reported by period for fundraising progress tracking. Creating campaign.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  owning_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.org_unit. Business justification: Campaigns are institutional fundraising initiatives requiring org hierarchy linkage for budget ownership, gift allocation reporting, campaign performance dashboards by college/unit, and stewardship ac']
  parent_campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent campaign if this is a sub-campaign within a larger comprehensive campaign hierarchy.']
  active_membership_count varchar [note: 'Current number of active members in a recognition society. Null for fundraising campaigns.']
  amount_raised decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount raised to date, including gifts, pledges, and planned gifts counted toward the campaign goal.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total budget allocated for campaign operations, marketing, events, and staffing.']
  campaign_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the campaign purpose, objectives, and intended impact.']
  campaign_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the fundraising campaign or recognition society.']
  campaign_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for the campaign, used in communications and reporting.']
  campaign_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the campaign: planning (pre-launch), quiet_phase (leadership gifts), public_phase (broad solicitation), active (ongoing), completed (goal achieved), suspended (temporarily paused), or cancelled (terminated). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: planning|quiet_phase|public_phase|active|completed|suspended|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  campaign_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the campaign: comprehensive (institution-wide), capital (facilities/infrastructure), annual (yearly giving), endowment (permanent funds), emergency (crisis response), or recognition_society (donor club/giving circle).']
  case_reporting_classification varchar [note: 'CASE standard classification code for reporting purposes (e.g., comprehensive campaign, capital campaign).']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for campaign inquiries and donor communications.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for campaign office or coordinator.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this campaign record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this campaign (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  donor_count varchar [note: 'Total number of unique donors who have contributed to this campaign.']
  end_date date [note: 'Planned or actual end date of the campaign. Null for ongoing recognition societies.']
  gift_counting_rules varchar [note: 'Description of which gift types are counted toward campaign totals (e.g., outright gifts, pledges, planned gifts, matching gifts).']
  goal_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Target fundraising amount for the campaign in the specified currency.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this campaign record was last updated.']
  member_benefits_description varchar [note: 'Description of benefits provided to members of a recognition society (e.g., event invitations, publications, naming opportunities).']
  minimum_giving_threshold decimal(18,2) [note: 'Minimum cumulative or annual giving amount required for membership in a recognition society. Null for fundraising campaigns.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or internal documentation about the campaign.']
  phase varchar [note: 'Current operational phase: planning (pre-launch), quiet (leadership solicitation), public (broad outreach), or completion (wrap-up and stewardship).']
  priority varchar [note: 'Institutional priority level assigned to this campaign for resource allocation and strategic focus.']
  public_launch_date date [note: 'Date when the campaign transitioned from quiet phase to public phase and broad solicitation began.']
  quiet_phase_goal_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Target amount to be raised during the quiet phase before public launch, typically from leadership donors.']
  recognition_tier varchar [note: 'Tier or level within a recognition society hierarchy (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum). Applicable to recognition societies.']
  start_date date [note: 'Official start date when the campaign becomes active for gift counting and solicitation.']
  stewardship_plan varchar [note: 'Description of donor stewardship activities and recognition plans for campaign contributors.']
  success_metrics varchar [note: 'Key performance indicators and success criteria for evaluating campaign effectiveness beyond dollar goals.']
  visibility_status varchar [note: 'Controls who can view campaign information: public (all), internal (institution only), or confidential (restricted access).']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL for the campaign with information, updates, and online giving portal.']

  Note: 'Master record for fundraising campaigns and donor recognition programs. For campaigns: captures campaign name, type (comprehensive, capital, annual, endowment, emergency), start/end dates, goal amount, amount raised, donor count, phase, sub-campaign hierarchy, and CASE reporting classification. For recognition societies/giving clubs: captures society name, minimum giving threshold, tier, member benefits, and active membership roster. SSOT for campaign definitions and recognition program structures used across gift, pledge, and appeal records.'
}

Table advancement.advancement_fund {
  advancement_fund_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the advancement fund. Primary key for the fund master record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Advancement funds map to academic cost centers for stewardship reporting and budget alignment. Creating advancement_fund.cost_center_id to link to finance.cost_center for financial and operational rep']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Advancement funds are reported and valued by fiscal period for financial reporting. Creating advancement_fund.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Advancement funds (endowments, scholarships, capital campaigns) map to general ledger accounts for financial tracking and reporting. This FK links advancement_fund to the finance ledger_account master']
  manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'FK to hr.employee']
  owning_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.org_unit. Business justification: Advancement funds are budget entities requiring org hierarchy linkage for financial accountability, NACUBO/IPEDS reporting, stewardship reporting, and institutional budget roll-ups. Owning_college_sch']
  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award. Business justification: Endowed funds distribute to specific research awards annually. Critical for fund accounting, stewardship reporting, and demonstrating research impact to donors. Links gift-funded endowments to the res']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date the fund was permanently closed to new gifts and distributions ceased. Applicable for term endowments that have expired or funds that have been fully expended per donor intent.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this fund record was first created in the advancement system. Used for data lineage and audit trail.']
  current_market_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current total market value of the fund including principal, accumulated income, and investment gains/losses. Updated periodically based on investment pool valuation cycles.']
  donor_advised_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund allows donor advisory privileges for distribution recommendations. True if donor retains advisory rights per gift agreement; false for fully institutionally-controlled funds.']
  donor_recognition_level varchar [note: 'Recognition tier or society membership associated with the fund based on gift size (e.g., Presidents Circle, Founders Society, Legacy Society). Used for donor engagement and event invitations.']
  establishment_date date [note: 'Date the fund was officially established and began accepting gifts. Corresponds to board approval date or execution of gift agreement.']
  facilities_support_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund supports capital projects, building maintenance, or facility improvements. True for facilities funds; false otherwise.']
  faculty_support_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund supports faculty positions, research, or professional development (e.g., endowed chairs, professorships, research grants). True for faculty support funds; false otherwise.']
  first_distribution_date date [note: 'Date of the first distribution from the fund to support its designated purpose. May differ from establishment date if fund needed to reach minimum threshold or had a waiting period.']
  fund_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique alphanumeric code identifying the fund in financial systems and donor communications. Used for gift designation and general ledger mapping.']
  fund_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the fund as established by donor agreement or institutional policy. Used in donor reports, gift receipts, and stewardship communications.']
  fund_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the fund. Active funds accept gifts and make distributions; inactive funds are temporarily not accepting gifts; closed funds are permanently closed; suspended funds are under review; pending-establishment funds are awaiting final approval or minimum threshold.']
  fund_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the fund based on spending restrictions and permanence. Endowed funds maintain principal in perpetuity; expendable funds can be fully spent; restricted funds have donor-imposed purpose restrictions; unrestricted funds have no donor restrictions; quasi-endowments are board-designated; term endowments revert after a specified period.']
  gift_agreement_document_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the executed gift agreement or memorandum of understanding that established the fund and specifies donor restrictions and institutional obligations.']
  gift_restriction_terms varchar [note: 'Detailed text of donor-imposed restrictions on fund use, including purpose restrictions, eligibility criteria for beneficiaries, geographic limitations, time restrictions, and any other conditions specified in the gift agreement.']
  investment_pool_assignment varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the investment pool in which the fund assets are invested (e.g., Long-Term Investment Pool, Balanced Pool, Fixed Income Pool). Determines investment strategy and return profile.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this fund record was most recently updated. Used for change tracking and data quality monitoring.']
  last_valuation_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent market valuation used to update the current market value. Typically corresponds to fiscal quarter-end or year-end investment pool valuation.']
  market_value_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the current market value (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  minimum_endowment_threshold decimal(15,2) [note: 'Minimum principal balance required to establish or maintain the fund as an endowment. Funds below this threshold may be held in a pooled fund until the minimum is reached.']
  nacubo_classification varchar [note: 'Standardized fund classification per NACUBO reporting taxonomy. Used for endowment surveys, peer benchmarking, and financial statement preparation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, special handling instructions, historical background, or operational notes relevant to fund administration and stewardship.']
  original_gift_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount of the original gift(s) that established the fund, representing the historical principal. Used for UPMIFA historic dollar value calculations and endowment preservation compliance.']
  program_support_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund supports academic programs, departmental operations, or institutional initiatives. True for program support funds; false otherwise.']
  purpose_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the intended use of fund distributions, including eligible expenditure categories, beneficiary populations, and programmatic objectives as specified in the gift agreement or board resolution.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency of stewardship reports to be provided to donors or fund beneficiaries, as specified in the gift agreement or institutional policy.']
  scholarship_fund_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund is designated for student financial aid (scholarships, fellowships, or awards). True for scholarship funds; false for other purposes.']
  spending_calculation_method varchar [note: 'Methodology used to calculate annual distributions. Total-return applies rate to smoothed market value; income-only distributes actual investment income; hybrid combines approaches; unit-value uses pooled fund units.']
  spending_policy_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Annual distribution rate applied to the fund balance to calculate available spending, typically expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.0450 for 4.5%). May be institution-wide policy or fund-specific per donor agreement.']
  stewardship_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund requires periodic stewardship reports to donors or their designees. True if donor agreement specifies reporting obligations; false otherwise.']
  threshold_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the minimum endowment threshold amount (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  underwater_status_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund current market value has fallen below the historic dollar value (original gift amount), creating an underwater endowment. True if underwater; false if market value exceeds or equals historic value. Critical for UPMIFA compliance and spending decisions.']
  variance_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fund requires institutional approval or board notification for expenditures that deviate from the stated purpose or exceed normal spending policy. True if variance reporting is required per gift agreement or policy; false otherwise.']

  Note: 'Master record for a designated fund that receives and holds gift revenue for a specific institutional purpose. Captures fund name, code, type (endowed, expendable, restricted, unrestricted, quasi-endowment), purpose description, college/unit designation, minimum endowment threshold, fund status, NACUBO classification, and gift restriction terms (purpose restrictions, eligibility criteria, donor-imposed conditions, reporting requirements). SSOT for fund definitions and restriction compliance. Primary dimension for gift designation reporting. Linked to finance domain general ledger accounts.'
}

Table advancement.appeal {
  appeal_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the fundraising appeal or solicitation effort. Primary key.']
  advancement_fund_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary fund or designation that gifts from this appeal are directed toward (e.g., scholarship fund, capital project, unrestricted annual fund).']
  affinity_group_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the affinity group or alumni chapter associated with this appeal, if targeted to a specific group.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent fundraising campaign under which this appeal is organized.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member, volunteer, or external vendor responsible for executing this appeal.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Appeals run in specific fiscal periods for fundraising tracking and ROI analysis. Creating appeal.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the academic college or school benefiting from or sponsoring this appeal.']
  appeal_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier code for the appeal used in tracking and reporting. Typically alphanumeric code assigned by advancement office.']
  appeal_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the appeal purpose, messaging strategy, and intended outcomes.']
  appeal_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the fundraising appeal or solicitation effort (e.g., Annual Fund Spring Mail, Homecoming Phonathon, President\'s Circle Dinner).']
  appeal_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the appeal indicating whether it is planned, active, completed, cancelled, or suspended.']
  appeal_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the solicitation method used for this appeal (direct mail, email, phone, event, digital, personal ask, social media). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: direct_mail|email|phone|event|digital|personal_ask|social_media — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  ask_amount_high decimal(15,2) [note: 'Highest suggested gift amount presented to prospects in this appeal.']
  ask_amount_low decimal(15,2) [note: 'Lowest suggested gift amount presented to prospects in this appeal.']
  ask_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the ask amounts (e.g., USD, GBP, CAD).']
  average_gift_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Average gift amount received per responding donor for this appeal, calculated as total_revenue_amount / response_count.']
  case_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this appeal and its results are included in CASE reporting and benchmarking surveys.']
  cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the solicitation cost amount (e.g., USD, GBP, CAD).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this appeal record was first created in the system.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this appeal record was last updated in the system.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, observations, or lessons learned from executing this appeal, used for future planning and continuous improvement.']
  owning_office varchar [note: 'Name of the advancement office or unit responsible for managing this appeal (e.g., Annual Giving, Major Gifts, Alumni Relations, Development Office).']
  package_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the specific solicitation package or creative treatment used in this appeal (e.g., letter version, email template, script version).']
  response_count varchar [note: 'Number of individuals or households who responded to this appeal with a gift or pledge.']
  response_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of targeted individuals who responded to the appeal, calculated as (response_count / target_count) * 100.']
  reunion_class_year varchar [note: 'Graduation year of the alumni class targeted for reunion giving in this appeal, if applicable.']
  revenue_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the total revenue amount (e.g., USD, GBP, CAD).']
  roi_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Return on investment for this appeal expressed as a percentage, calculated as ((total_revenue_amount - solicitation_cost_amount) / solicitation_cost_amount) * 100.']
  solicitation_cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cost incurred to execute this appeal including printing, postage, event costs, staff time, and vendor fees.']
  solicitation_end_date date [note: 'Date when the appeal solicitation effort ends or is scheduled to end.']
  solicitation_start_date date [note: 'Date when the appeal solicitation effort begins or began. Represents the principal business event timestamp for this appeal.']
  target_audience_segment varchar [note: 'Description of the donor or prospect segment targeted by this appeal (e.g., alumni class of 2010, LYBUNT donors, major gift prospects, parents of current students).']
  target_count varchar [note: 'Number of individuals or households targeted for solicitation in this appeal.']
  total_revenue_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenue generated from gifts and pledges attributed to this appeal.']

  Note: 'Master record for a specific fundraising solicitation or outreach effort within a campaign, such as a direct mail piece, email solicitation, phonathon, or event ask. Captures appeal name, appeal code, appeal type (mail, email, phone, event, digital, personal ask), associated campaign, solicitation date range, target audience segment, cost of solicitation, response rate, and total revenue generated. Enables ROI analysis at the appeal level and supports CASE reporting on solicitation methods.'
}

Table advancement.major_gift_proposal {
  major_gift_proposal_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the major gift proposal record. Primary key for the major gift proposal entity.']
  advancement_fund_id varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to the institutional fund or campaign master record. Used for gift allocation and financial reporting integration.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the fundraising campaign or initiative to which this major gift proposal is attributed. Links to campaign master data for performance tracking and goal measurement.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Major gift proposals often support specific academic units/cost centers for budget planning. Creating major_gift_proposal.cost_center_id to link to finance.cost_center for proposal tracking and budget']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Major gift proposals are tracked by fiscal period for pipeline reporting and forecasting. Creating major_gift_proposal.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  primary_major_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the major gifts officer or fundraiser assigned to manage and steward this proposal through the solicitation lifecycle.']
  actual_close_date date [note: 'Date when the prospect made a final commitment decision (accepted or declined). Null until the proposal reaches a closed-won or closed-lost stage.']
  ask_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The monetary amount being requested from the prospect in this major gift solicitation. Represents the target gift size for pipeline forecasting and capacity planning.']
  ask_date date [note: 'Date when the formal solicitation ask was made to the prospect. Represents the key milestone when the proposal moved from cultivation to active solicitation.']
  board_approval_date date [note: 'Date when the board of trustees or governing body formally approved acceptance of the major gift. Null if board approval is not required or has not yet occurred.']
  board_approval_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the major gift proposal requires formal approval from the board of trustees or institutional leadership before acceptance. Typically true for gifts above a certain threshold or with special conditions.']
  committed_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Actual amount committed by the prospect if the proposal was accepted. May differ from the original ask amount due to negotiation. Null if proposal was declined or is still open.']
  confidential_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the major gift proposal contains sensitive or confidential information requiring restricted access. Used for data security and privacy compliance in advancement operations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp recording when the major gift proposal record was first created in the advancement database. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the ask amount (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR). Required for international fundraising and multi-currency gift tracking.']
  decline_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or category code for why the prospect declined the major gift proposal. Used for prospect intelligence and future cultivation strategy. Null if proposal was not declined.']
  expected_close_date date [note: 'Anticipated date when the prospect is expected to make a commitment decision on the major gift proposal. Used for pipeline forecasting and fiscal year revenue projections.']
  fund_designation varchar [note: 'Name or code of the institutional fund, endowment, or program to which the major gift will be directed (e.g., \'Engineering Scholarship Fund\', \'Athletics Capital Campaign\', \'Unrestricted Annual Fund\').']
  gift_agreement_date date [note: 'Date when the formal gift agreement was executed by all parties. Used for legal compliance and stewardship reporting. Null if no agreement is required or has not been executed.']
  gift_agreement_executed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal gift agreement or memorandum of understanding has been signed by both the donor and the institution. Required for endowments and restricted gifts with specific terms.']
  gift_purpose varchar [note: 'Primary purpose or use category for the proposed major gift (e.g., endowment, capital project, program operating support, scholarship, research funding, unrestricted support). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: endowment|capital|program-support|scholarship|research|unrestricted|faculty-support|student-support — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  last_contact_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent substantive contact or interaction with the prospect regarding this proposal. Used for tracking cultivation activity and ensuring timely follow-up.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp recording when the major gift proposal record was most recently updated. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and data synchronization.']
  naming_opportunity varchar [note: 'Description of any building, room, endowment, or program naming rights associated with the major gift proposal. Null if no naming opportunity is part of the solicitation.']
  next_action_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next planned action or follow-up activity related to the proposal. Used for gift officer task management and pipeline velocity tracking.']
  next_action_description varchar [note: 'Description of the next planned action or step in the solicitation process (e.g., \'Schedule site visit\', \'Send proposal document\', \'Follow-up call with spouse\').']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form text field for gift officers to record additional context, strategy notes, prospect preferences, or other relevant information about the major gift proposal that does not fit structured fields.']
  probability_percentage varchar [note: 'Estimated likelihood (0-100%) that the proposal will result in a closed-won outcome. Used for weighted pipeline forecasting and revenue projections. Typically increases as proposal advances through stages.']
  proposal_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the major gift proposal, including the case for support, impact statement, and specific use of funds. Used for proposal documentation and stewardship reporting.']
  proposal_document_url varchar [note: 'Link or file path to the formal written proposal document, case statement, or presentation materials. Used for document management and proposal version control.']
  proposal_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the major gift proposal, typically a human-readable code or number used by gift officers and advancement staff to reference the proposal in communications and reports.']
  proposal_outcome varchar [note: 'Final disposition of the major gift proposal. Indicates whether the prospect accepted, declined, deferred the decision, or the proposal was withdrawn. Null until proposal reaches a terminal stage.']
  proposal_stage varchar [note: 'Current stage of the major gift proposal in the fundraising pipeline. Tracks progression from initial identification through cultivation, ask, and closure. Used for pipeline management and forecasting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: identification|qualification|cultivation|solicitation|negotiation|stewardship|closed-won|closed-lost — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  proposal_start_date date [note: 'Date when the major gift proposal was formally created and entered into the advancement system. Marks the beginning of the proposals lifecycle for tracking and reporting.']
  proposal_status varchar [note: 'Operational status of the proposal indicating whether it is actively being pursued, on hold, withdrawn, or completed. Complements proposal_stage with administrative state information. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: active|pending|on-hold|withdrawn|declined|accepted|completed — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  proposal_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title or name of the major gift proposal, summarizing the purpose or focus of the solicitation (e.g., \'Endowed Chair in Computer Science\', \'New Engineering Building Campaign\').']
  proposal_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the major gift proposal by gift instrument or structure (e.g., outright cash gift, multi-year pledge, planned/deferred gift, foundation grant, corporate sponsorship, in-kind donation).']
  recognition_level varchar [note: 'Donor recognition tier or giving society level associated with the proposed gift amount (e.g., \'Presidents Circle\', \'Founders Society\', \'Legacy Circle\'). Used for stewardship planning and benefits fulfillment.']
  weighted_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Calculated value representing ask_amount multiplied by probability_percentage, used for realistic pipeline forecasting and expected revenue modeling.']

  Note: 'Tracks a formal major gift solicitation proposal from cultivation through ask to close, representing the primary workflow record for major gifts officers. Captures proposal title, ask amount, ask date, expected close date, actual close date, proposal stage (identification, qualification, cultivation, solicitation, stewardship, closed-won, closed-lost), assigned gift officer, primary prospect, fund designation, and proposal outcome. Supports pipeline management and major gifts forecasting. Sourced from Blackbaud Raiser\'s Edge proposal module.'
}

Table advancement.planned_gift {
  planned_gift_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the planned gift record. Primary key.']
  advancement_fund_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the institutional fund or endowment that will receive the planned gift proceeds upon maturity. Links to fund master record.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the fundraising campaign under which this planned gift commitment was secured, if applicable. Used for campaign reporting and goal tracking.']
  donor_alumnus_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the alumnus who has made the planned gift commitment. Links to the alumnus master record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the advancement staff member or planned giving officer who cultivated and secured this commitment. Used for performance tracking and relationship continuity.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Planned gifts are tracked by fiscal period for pipeline reporting and estate planning. Creating planned_gift.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_filing. Business justification: Planned gifts (bequests, charitable remainder trusts, gift annuities) trigger IRS Form 8282, 990 Schedule D, and state insurance department filings for gift annuity reserves. Direct link required for ']
  research_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.research_award. Business justification: Planned gifts often designated for research (bequests for endowed chairs, estate gifts for research programs). Advancement tracks intended beneficiary awards for stewardship, financial planning, and e']
  actual_maturity_date date [note: 'Actual date when the planned gift matured and assets were transferred to the institution. Populated when commitment status reaches matured.']
  anonymous_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor has requested complete anonymity for this planned gift commitment. Overrides all recognition and publication settings.']
  commitment_date date [note: 'Date when the donor formally communicated or documented their planned gift intention. Principal business event timestamp for this commitment.']
  commitment_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique identifier or reference number for the planned gift commitment, used in donor communications and legal documentation.']
  commitment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the planned gift commitment. Tracks progression from initial intention through legal execution to maturity or revocation.']
  contingent_beneficiary_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the institution is named as a contingent (secondary) beneficiary rather than primary beneficiary. Affects probability of realization and pipeline valuation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this planned gift record was first created in the data platform. Audit trail for data lineage.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the estimated value amount (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).']
  designation_purpose varchar [note: 'Intended use or purpose of the planned gift proceeds as specified by the donor (e.g., scholarship endowment, faculty chair, unrestricted support, capital project).']
  documentation_date date [note: 'Date when legal documentation was executed or verified. Distinct from commitment date, which may precede formal documentation.']
  estate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the donor\'s estate designated for the institution in bequest commitments. Null for fixed-amount or non-bequest vehicles.']
  estimated_value_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated present or future value of the planned gift at maturity, used for pipeline reporting and stewardship tier assignment. Subject to periodic revaluation.']
  expected_maturity_date date [note: 'Anticipated date when the planned gift will be realized and transferred to the institution. May be estimated based on actuarial tables for life-contingent gifts.']
  fixed_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Specific dollar amount designated in the planned gift commitment. Used for fixed bequests and annuity contracts. Null for percentage-based commitments.']
  gift_vehicle_type varchar [note: 'The legal instrument or vehicle through which the planned gift will be realized. Determines tax treatment, timing, and stewardship approach.']
  last_contact_date date [note: 'Date of most recent stewardship contact or engagement activity with the donor regarding this planned gift commitment.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this planned gift record was most recently updated in the data platform. Audit trail for change tracking.']
  legal_documentation_status varchar [note: 'Level of legal formalization of the planned gift commitment. Tracks progression from verbal intention through executed legal instruments to institutional verification.']
  next_contact_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for next stewardship contact or follow-up activity. Used for relationship management and stewardship workflow.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing additional context, special conditions, donor preferences, or stewardship considerations for this planned gift commitment.']
  primary_beneficiary_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary beneficiary organization as documented in the legal instrument. Typically the institution\'s legal name or a specific college/school within it.']
  prospect_rating varchar [note: 'Prospect research rating indicating the donor\'s overall giving capacity and engagement level. Used for portfolio assignment and cultivation strategy.']
  recognition_name varchar [note: 'Name(s) to be used for donor recognition purposes in planned giving society materials, honor rolls, and stewardship communications. May differ from legal name.']
  recognition_published_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor has consented to public recognition of their planned gift commitment in institutional publications and honor rolls.']
  revaluation_date date [note: 'Date when the estimated value was last reviewed and updated. Planned gifts should be periodically revalued based on market conditions and actuarial updates.']
  revocable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor retains the legal right to revoke or modify the planned gift commitment. True for most bequests; false for irrevocable trusts and executed annuities.']
  revocation_date date [note: 'Date when the donor formally revoked or withdrew the planned gift commitment. Populated when commitment status changes to revoked.']
  revocation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or reason provided for revocation of the planned gift commitment. Used for relationship management and program improvement analysis.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system from which this planned gift record originated (e.g., Blackbaud Raisers Edge, custom planned giving database).']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for this planned gift record in the source operational system. Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  stewardship_tier varchar [note: 'Recognition and stewardship tier assigned based on estimated gift value, donor relationship, and institutional priorities. Determines engagement strategy and benefits.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method by which the institution verified the existence and terms of the planned gift commitment.']

  Note: 'Record of a deferred or estate gift commitment (bequest intention, charitable remainder trust, charitable gift annuity, life insurance assignment, retained life estate) made by a donor. Captures gift vehicle type, estimated value, estate percentage or fixed amount, maturity date, legal documentation status, revocability, and stewardship tier. Distinct from pledge (which is a binding near-term commitment) and from gift (which is a completed transaction). Supports planned giving program management and estate pipeline reporting.'
}

Table advancement.prospect_rating {
  prospect_rating_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the prospect rating record. Primary key for the prospect rating entity.']
  alumnus_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the alumnus or donor being rated. Links to the alumnus master record.']
  fiscal_period_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.fiscal_period. Business justification: Prospect ratings are done in specific fiscal periods for pipeline tracking and forecasting. Creating prospect_rating.fiscal_period_id to link to finance.fiscal_period for period-based reporting.']
  primary_prospect_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the advancement staff member (major gifts officer or prospect manager) assigned to manage this prospect based on the rating.']
  affinity_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical score (0-100) representing the prospect\'s emotional connection and engagement with the institution, based on attendance, volunteerism, event participation, and communication responsiveness.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the rating was formally approved for use in major gifts officer portfolio assignment and solicitation strategy.']
  assigned_rating_tier varchar [note: 'Portfolio management tier assigned for major gifts officer workload distribution: tier 1 (highest capacity/priority), tier 2, tier 3, tier 4, or unassigned.']
  board_memberships varchar [note: 'Corporate and nonprofit board memberships held by the prospect, indicating leadership capacity and network connections.']
  business_interests_value decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated value of private business ownership, partnerships, and closely-held company interests based on business valuation data and public filings.']
  capacity_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all capacity amounts (e.g., USD, CAD, GBP).']
  capacity_rating varchar [note: 'Overall giving capacity tier assigned to the prospect: major (100K-999K), principal (1M+), planned (estate gift potential), annual (under 100K), or unrated.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the prospect rating record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical score (0-100) representing the completeness and reliability of the underlying data used to generate the rating, often provided by wealth screening vendors.']
  estimated_annual_income decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated annual income from all sources including salary, bonuses, investment income, and business income, derived from compensation disclosures and wealth screening data.']
  estimated_capacity_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated total giving capacity in dollars based on wealth indicators, typically representing a lifetime giving potential or single major gift capacity.']
  estimated_capacity_range_high decimal(15,2) [note: 'Upper bound of the estimated giving capacity range in dollars.']
  estimated_capacity_range_low decimal(15,2) [note: 'Lower bound of the estimated giving capacity range in dollars.']
  estimated_net_worth decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total estimated net worth calculated as sum of all assets (real estate, stocks, business interests, other investments) minus estimated liabilities.']
  foundation_affiliations varchar [note: 'Names of private foundations where the prospect serves as trustee, officer, or donor, sourced from IRS Form 990 filings.']
  inclination_rating varchar [note: 'Qualitative assessment of the prospect\'s likelihood to give based on past giving behavior, philanthropic interests, and engagement patterns.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the prospect rating record was last updated, supporting audit trail and data lineage requirements.']
  last_reviewed_date date [note: 'Date when the rating was last reviewed and validated by prospect research staff, ensuring currency and accuracy.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next rating review and refresh, typically 12-24 months from last review per CASE best practices.']
  philanthropic_interests varchar [note: 'Known philanthropic interests and giving priorities of the prospect based on past giving history, foundation grants, board memberships, and public statements.']
  political_contributions_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect has made political contributions disclosed in Federal Election Commission (FEC) records, signaling capacity and civic engagement.']
  portfolio_assignment_date date [note: 'Date when the prospect was assigned to a major gifts officer portfolio based on this rating.']
  propensity_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Predictive score (0-100) indicating likelihood of making a gift, often generated by statistical modeling or machine learning algorithms based on historical donor behavior.']
