  conditions_summary varchar [note: 'Summary text of formal conditions, stipulations, or requirements issued by the accrediting body that the institution or program must address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this accreditation review record was first created in the system.']
  financial_impact_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated or actual financial impact of the accreditation review process, including self-study preparation costs, site visit expenses, consultant fees, and remediation costs. Expressed in US dollars.']
  interim_report_due_date date [note: 'Deadline for submission of the required interim progress report to the accrediting body. Null if no interim report is required.']
  interim_report_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the institution or program is required to submit an interim progress report before the next full review cycle (True) or not (False).']
  interim_report_submitted_date date [note: 'Actual date the interim progress report was submitted to the accrediting agency. Null if not yet submitted or not required.']
  next_review_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next comprehensive accreditation review cycle to commence.']
  public_disclosure_date date [note: 'Date the accreditation status and any conditions were publicly disclosed on the institutional website or through official channels.']
  public_disclosure_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the accreditation status and any conditions must be publicly disclosed per regulatory requirements (True) or not (False).']
  recommendations_issued_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether the accrediting body issued advisory recommendations for improvement (True) or not (False). Recommendations are non-binding guidance.']
  recommendations_summary varchar [note: 'Summary text of advisory recommendations for improvement issued by the accrediting body. These are non-binding suggestions for enhancement.']
  review_coordinator_notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes and observations from the institutional accreditation coordinator regarding the review process, challenges, lessons learned, and follow-up actions.']
  review_cycle_type varchar [note: 'Type of accreditation review cycle being conducted: initial (first-time accreditation), reaffirmation (renewal), focused visit (targeted review), interim monitoring (progress check), substantive change (major institutional change), or comprehensive (full evaluation).']
  review_period_end_date date [note: 'Date marking the conclusion of the accreditation review cycle or evaluation period.']
  review_period_start_date date [note: 'Date marking the beginning of the accreditation review cycle or evaluation period.']
  self_study_due_date date [note: 'Deadline for submission of the institutional or programmatic self-study report to the accrediting body.']
  self_study_lead_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the faculty or administrative leader responsible for coordinating the self-study process and report preparation.']
  self_study_submitted_date date [note: 'Actual date the self-study report was submitted to the accrediting agency.']
  site_visit_end_date date [note: 'Scheduled end date for the accreditation site visit. Null for single-day visits.']
  site_visit_scheduled_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the accreditation site visit by the peer review team. Represents the start date for multi-day visits.']
  site_visit_team_chair varchar [note: 'Full name of the peer reviewer serving as chair of the site visit evaluation team.']
  site_visit_team_size varchar [note: 'Number of peer reviewers on the site visit evaluation team.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this accreditation review record was last modified in the system.']

  Note: 'Master record for institutional and programmatic accreditation review cycles. Captures accrediting body (HLC, SACSCOC, ABET, AACSB, ABA, LCME, MSCHE), accreditation type (institutional, programmatic), review cycle type (initial, reaffirmation, focused visit, interim monitoring), review period start and end dates, self-study lead, site visit date, accreditation status (accredited, probation, show-cause, withdrawn), conditions or recommendations issued, and next review date. Central governance record for all accreditation activities.'
}

Table compliance.accreditation_standard {
  accreditation_standard_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for accreditation_standard']
  accrediting_body_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the accrediting agency or body that issued this standard. Links to the accrediting organization responsible for oversight (e.g., HLC, SACSCOC, AACSB, ABET).']
  responsible_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.org_unit. Business justification: Accreditation standards assign organizational accountability for compliance evidence collection and maintenance. Enables workload distribution reporting, evidence request routing, and organizational c']
  accreditor_guidance_url varchar [note: 'Web link to the accrediting body\'s official guidance, handbook, or resource page for this standard, providing authoritative reference material.']
  applicability_level varchar [note: 'Indicates whether this standard applies at the institutional level (entire university), program level (specific degree programs), or other organizational unit.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for institutional notes, observations, or context regarding compliance status, challenges, corrective actions, or improvement plans for this standard.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current institutional compliance status for this accreditation standard, reflecting the most recent self-study or review outcome.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this accreditation standard record was first created in the institutional compliance system.']
  criterion_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the accreditation criterion, including expectations, requirements, and evidence guidelines as defined by the accrediting body.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date on which this version of the accreditation standard became effective and institutions were required to demonstrate compliance.']
  evidence_requirement_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of the types of evidence, documentation, or artifacts required to demonstrate compliance with this standard (e.g., policies, data reports, assessment results, meeting minutes).']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which this version of the standard is superseded or no longer in effect. Null if the standard remains current.']
  is_core_requirement boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this standard is a core or foundational requirement (true) versus a supplementary or optional criterion (false). Core requirements are typically non-negotiable for accreditation.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'The date on which this standard was most recently reviewed by the institution or the accrediting body during a site visit, self-study, or interim report.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next formal review or assessment of compliance with this standard, typically aligned with accreditation cycles.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Internal institutional priority assigned to this standard based on risk, resource requirements, or strategic importance for accreditation maintenance.']
  standard_category varchar [note: 'The thematic category or domain to which this standard belongs, grouping related criteria for organizational and reporting purposes. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: mission|governance|faculty|curriculum|student_support|financial_resources|assessment|institutional_effectiveness|educational_quality|integrity — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  standard_number varchar [note: 'The official alphanumeric identifier assigned by the accrediting body to this standard or criterion (e.g., \'Criterion 3.A\', \'Standard 4.2\', \'Principle II.B\').']
  standard_title varchar [note: 'The official title or short name of the accreditation standard as published by the accrediting body.']
  standard_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the standard, as accrediting bodies periodically revise and update their criteria. Tracks which edition of the standard is in effect.']
  standard_weight decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric weight or scoring factor assigned to this standard by the accrediting body or institution, used in aggregate compliance scoring or risk assessment models.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this accreditation standard record was most recently updated, reflecting changes to compliance status, notes, or standard details.']

  Note: 'Catalog of accreditation standards and criteria from each accrediting body applicable to the institution or its programs. Captures accrediting body, standard number, standard title, criterion description, standard category (mission, governance, faculty, curriculum, student support, financial resources, assessment), applicability (institutional or program-level), and current compliance status. Used to map self-study evidence and corrective actions to specific accreditation criteria.'
}

Table compliance.corrective_action {
  corrective_action_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the corrective action plan record. Primary key.']
  accreditation_review_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.accreditation_review. Business justification: Corrective action plans are frequently issued in response to accreditation review findings (conditions, recommendations, or areas needing improvement). When finding_source indicates accreditation, thi']
  audit_finding_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the audit finding, accreditation condition, or regulatory citation that triggered this corrective action plan.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the employee designated as the primary owner of the corrective action plan, typically a director, dean, or vice president.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the department, division, or organizational unit responsible for implementing the corrective action plan.']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the institutional policy that was violated or requires revision as part of the corrective action plan.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: corrective_action currently has regulatory_framework as a STRING field. While corrective_action already links to audit_finding (which links to regulatory_requirement), many corrective actions are issu']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Date on which the corrective action plan was actually completed and all remediation activities were finalized. Null if still in progress.']
  actual_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Actual financial cost incurred to implement the corrective action plan. Null if implementation is not yet complete or costs have not been fully reconciled.']
  board_notification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the board of trustees must be formally notified of this corrective action plan due to materiality, reputational risk, or governance requirements.']
  cap_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the corrective action plan, typically assigned by the compliance office or audit management system.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date on which the corrective action plan was officially closed by the auditor, accreditor, or regulatory agency, indicating full resolution of the finding.']
  closure_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the corrective action plan has been officially closed by the auditor, accreditor, or regulatory agency. Open means still active; pending verification means awaiting final review; verified means accepted but not yet formally closed; closed means officially resolved; reopened means previously closed but reactivated due to recurrence.']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the corrective actions to be taken to remediate the finding, including specific steps, process changes, policy revisions, training programs, or system enhancements.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the corrective action plan. Draft indicates initial planning; submitted means plan has been sent to auditors/accreditors; in progress indicates active implementation; under review means awaiting validation; completed means actions finished; closed means finding officially resolved; overdue indicates missed target date. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|in_progress|under_review|completed|closed|overdue — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the corrective action plan record was first created in the system.']
  escalation_date date [note: 'Date on which the corrective action plan was escalated to senior leadership or the board of trustees. Null if no escalation occurred.']
  escalation_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the corrective action plan requires escalation to senior leadership, the board of trustees, or external authorities due to severity, cost, or strategic impact.']
  estimated_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated financial cost to implement the corrective action plan, including personnel time, technology investments, consulting fees, training expenses, and other resources.']
  evidence_of_remediation varchar [note: 'Documentation or artifacts demonstrating that the corrective action has been implemented and the finding has been remediated. May include policy documents, training records, system screenshots, process flowcharts, or audit reports.']
  external_report_date date [note: 'Date on which the corrective action plan was reported to external agencies. Null if external reporting has not yet occurred or is not required.']
  external_reporting_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the corrective action plan must be reported to external agencies such as the U.S. Department of Education, accreditors, state regulators, or other oversight bodies.']
  finding_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the audit finding, accreditation condition, regulatory citation, or compliance deficiency that this corrective action plan addresses.']
  finding_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the finding that necessitated this corrective action. Indicates whether the issue was identified by external auditors, internal auditors, accreditation bodies, regulatory agencies, institutional self-assessment, or peer review.']
  implementation_plan varchar [note: 'Structured plan outlining the phases, milestones, resources, and timeline for executing the corrective action. May include project management details and dependencies.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the corrective action plan record was most recently modified, reflecting the latest status, milestone completion, or other updates.']
  milestone_count varchar [note: 'Total number of implementation milestones or checkpoints defined in the corrective action plan. Used to track progress granularity.']
  milestones_completed varchar [note: 'Number of implementation milestones that have been successfully completed to date. Used to calculate progress percentage.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the corrective action and related processes will be monitored post-implementation to ensure sustained compliance and prevent recurrence.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments, context, or observations related to the corrective action plan, including challenges encountered, lessons learned, or recommendations for future improvements.']
  recurrence_risk varchar [note: 'Assessment of the likelihood that the finding will recur after the corrective action is implemented. High risk indicates systemic issues requiring ongoing monitoring; low risk indicates isolated incidents unlikely to repeat.']
  responsible_officer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the institutional officer or administrator responsible for overseeing the corrective action plan implementation.']
  responsible_unit_name varchar [note: 'Name of the department, division, or organizational unit accountable for executing the corrective action plan (e.g., Financial Aid Office, Registrar, Human Resources, Athletics).']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Classification of the finding severity based on risk to institutional compliance, financial impact, or reputational harm. Critical findings require immediate action; low findings may be addressed over longer timeframes.']
  target_completion_date date [note: 'Planned date by which the corrective action plan is expected to be fully implemented and the finding remediated. Often negotiated with auditors or accreditors.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which the corrective action was verified as complete by the auditor, accreditor, or compliance officer. Null if verification has not yet occurred.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used by auditors, accreditors, or compliance officers to verify that the corrective action has been successfully implemented and the finding resolved.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the auditor, accreditor, compliance officer, or other authority who verified the completion and effectiveness of the corrective action.']

  Note: 'Tracks corrective action plans (CAPs) issued in response to audit findings, accreditation conditions, regulatory citations, or internal compliance reviews. Captures finding source (external audit, internal audit, accreditor, regulatory agency), finding description, severity level, responsible unit, corrective action description, implementation milestones, target completion date, actual completion date, evidence of remediation, and closure status. Supports ongoing monitoring of institutional compliance remediation.'
}

Table compliance.audit_finding {
  audit_finding_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the audit finding record. Primary key.']
  accreditation_review_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.accreditation_review. Business justification: Audit findings can arise from accreditation site visits and reviews. When audit_type indicates an accreditation review, this FK links the finding to the specific review cycle. FK will be NULL for non-']
  audit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent audit engagement or review that produced this finding.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Audit findings must cite the specific regulatory requirement or standard that was violated. The criteria field (text description of the standard) becomes redundant when we can FK to the authoritative ']
  verified_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Audit finding resolution requires independent verification by qualified personnel. Links verifier identity for accountability, enables verification workload tracking, and provides audit trail required']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'The date on which the corrective action was actually completed and verified, if applicable.']
  affected_program varchar [note: 'The name of the academic program, administrative unit, or operational area to which the finding applies.']
  affected_unit varchar [note: 'The specific department, division, or organizational unit responsible for the area where the finding was identified.']
  audit_period_end_date date [note: 'The ending date of the period under audit review.']
  audit_period_start_date date [note: 'The beginning date of the period under audit review.']
  audit_type varchar [note: 'The type of audit or review that generated this finding (internal audit, external audit, federal program review, A-133/Uniform Guidance single audit, accreditation review, NCAA certification, Title IV program review, state audit). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: internal|external|federal_program_review|single_audit|accreditation_review|ncaa_certification|title_iv_program_review|state_audit — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  auditing_entity varchar [note: 'The name of the organization or body that conducted the audit and issued the finding (e.g., internal audit department, external CPA firm, U.S. Department of Education, regional accreditor, state auditor).']
  cause varchar [note: 'The underlying reason or root cause that led to the condition—why the deficiency occurred (e.g., lack of training, inadequate controls, resource constraints).']
  cfda_number varchar [note: 'The five-digit CFDA number (now known as Assistance Listings number) identifying the federal program to which the finding relates, if applicable (format: XX.XXX).']
  condition varchar [note: 'A statement of what was found during the audit—the actual state or practice observed that deviates from the criteria.']
  corrective_action_plan varchar [note: 'Detailed plan outlining the specific steps, resources, timelines, and responsible parties for addressing and resolving the audit finding.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this audit finding record was first created in the system.']
  effect varchar [note: 'The actual or potential impact or consequence of the finding on the institution, program, or stakeholders (e.g., financial loss, compliance risk, reputational harm).']
  federal_program_name varchar [note: 'The name of the federal program associated with the CFDA number, if applicable (e.g., Federal Pell Grant Program, Federal Work-Study, NIH Research Grants).']
  finding_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the severity and nature of the finding per audit standards (material weakness, significant deficiency, noncompliance, observation, best practice recommendation, control deficiency).']
  finding_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the condition identified, the criteria or standard that was not met, the cause of the deficiency, and the effect or potential impact on the institution.']
  finding_issued_date date [note: 'The date on which the audit finding was formally issued or communicated to management in the audit report.']
  finding_number varchar [note: 'The externally-known unique identifier or reference number assigned to this finding within the audit report (e.g., 2024-A133-001).']
  finding_title varchar [note: 'A concise, descriptive title summarizing the nature of the audit finding.']
  finding_type varchar [note: 'The functional domain or regulatory area to which the finding pertains (financial, compliance, operational, information technology, Title IV financial aid, research administration, NCAA athletics, FERPA privacy, Clery Act campus safety, Title IX equity). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: financial|compliance|operational|information_technology|title_iv|research|ncaa|ferpa|clery_act|title_ix — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  management_response varchar [note: 'The institution\'s official response to the finding, including agreement or disagreement with the finding, planned corrective actions, responsible parties, and target completion dates.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, context, or supplementary information related to the finding, corrective actions, or follow-up activities.']
  prior_finding_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the prior audit finding if this is a repeat finding, enabling tracking of unresolved issues across audit cycles.']
  questioned_costs_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The dollar amount of costs questioned by the auditor due to noncompliance, lack of supporting documentation, or unallowability under federal or state regulations.']
  questioned_costs_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for questioned costs (typically USD for U.S. institutions).']
  recommendation varchar [note: 'The auditor\'s recommended corrective action or improvement to address the finding and prevent recurrence.']
  repeat_finding_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finding was previously identified in a prior audit period and has not been fully resolved (True = repeat finding, False = new finding).']
  reported_to_federal_agency_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finding was reported to a federal oversight agency such as the U.S. Department of Education or federal awarding agency (True = reported, False = not reported).']
  reported_to_governing_board_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finding was reported to the institution\'s Board of Trustees or governing body (True = reported, False = not reported).']
  resolution_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the finding in the corrective action lifecycle (open, in progress, pending verification, resolved, closed, overdue).']
  responsible_party varchar [note: 'The name or title of the individual, department, or unit responsible for implementing the corrective action plan.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'The assessed level of risk or priority associated with the finding based on potential impact and likelihood (critical, high, medium, low).']
  target_completion_date date [note: 'The planned or committed date by which the corrective action is expected to be fully implemented and the finding resolved.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this audit finding record was last modified or updated.']
  verification_date date [note: 'The date on which the corrective action was verified as complete and effective by internal audit or other oversight body.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'The method or process used to verify that the corrective action has been effectively implemented (e.g., follow-up audit, management certification, testing of controls).']

  Note: 'Records findings from internal audits, external audits (federal program reviews, A-133/Uniform Guidance single audits), and accreditation reviews. Captures audit type, auditing entity, audit period, finding number, finding category (material weakness, significant deficiency, noncompliance, observation), affected program or unit, federal program CFDA number if applicable, questioned costs, management response, and resolution status. Feeds corrective action planning and regulatory reporting.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_filing {
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory filing record. Primary key for the regulatory filing entity.']
  compliance_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation. Business justification: Regulatory filings are the deliverable for many tracked compliance obligations. The obligation record tracks the due date, responsible party, and status; the filing record captures the actual submissi']
  original_filing_regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the original regulatory filing that this amended filing is correcting. Null for original filings. Links amended filings to their predecessors for audit trail purposes.']
  preparer_identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.identity_account. Business justification: Regulatory filings (IPEDS, Title IV, state reports) are prepared and submitted by authenticated users via institutional identity systems. Audit trails for federal compliance require linking submission']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Each regulatory filing satisfies a specific federal, state, or accreditation requirement. For example, an A-133 audit filing satisfies federal single audit requirements; a state authorization renewal ']
  reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Regulatory filings (IPEDS, state reports) require documented internal review before submission. Links reviewer for accountability, enables workload tracking, and provides audit trail for data quality ']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'The academic year to which this filing pertains, typically expressed in format YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024). Used for organizing filings by academic cycle.']
  acceptance_date date [note: 'The date on which the regulatory body officially accepted the filing as complete and compliant. Marks the successful completion of the filing obligation.']
  certification_date date [note: 'The date on which the authorized institutional official certified the accuracy and completeness of the filing. Must precede or match the submission date.']
  certification_statement varchar [note: 'The text of the certification or attestation statement signed by the authorized institutional official, affirming the accuracy and completeness of the filing. Required for many federal and accreditation filings.']
  certifying_official_name varchar [note: 'The name of the institutional official (e.g., President, CFO, Compliance Officer) who certified the accuracy of the filing. This individual assumes legal responsibility for the submission.']
  certifying_official_title varchar [note: 'The job title or position of the institutional official who certified the filing (e.g., President, Chief Financial Officer, Vice President for Compliance).']
  confirmation_reference varchar [note: 'The confirmation number, receipt identifier, or tracking code provided by the regulatory body upon successful submission. Serves as proof of filing and is used for follow-up inquiries.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this regulatory filing record was first created in the system. Part of the audit trail for record lifecycle tracking.']
  document_repository_path varchar [note: 'The file path or location in the institutional document management system where supporting documentation and the final filing package are stored. Used for audit trail and historical reference.']
  due_date date [note: 'The regulatory deadline by which this filing must be submitted to remain in compliance. Used to track on-time vs. late submissions.']
  filing_description varchar [note: 'A detailed description of the filing content, purpose, and scope. May include notes about special circumstances, data sources, or methodology used in preparing the filing.']
  filing_number varchar [note: 'The externally-known reference number or tracking identifier assigned to this regulatory filing by the institution or regulatory body. Used for correspondence and audit trail purposes.']
  filing_period_end_date date [note: 'The ending date of the reporting period covered by this regulatory filing. Defines the temporal scope of data included in the submission.']
  filing_period_start_date date [note: 'The beginning date of the reporting period covered by this regulatory filing. For annual filings, typically the start of the academic or fiscal year.']
  filing_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory filing. Tracks the filing through its workflow from initial draft through final acceptance or rejection by the regulatory body. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|in_review|submitted|accepted|rejected|under_review|resubmitted|withdrawn — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  filing_type varchar [note: 'The category or type of regulatory filing. Identifies the specific compliance requirement being addressed (e.g., IPEDS for Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System, Clery ASR for Annual Security Report, Title IV PPA for Program Participation Agreement, NCAA APR for Academic Progress Rate, NCAA GSR for Graduation Success Rate, FISAP for Fiscal Operations Report and Application to Participate). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: IPEDS|Clery ASR|Title IV PPA|NCAA APR|NCAA GSR|State Authorization|Gainful Employment|90/10 Rule|FISAP|Accreditation Self-Study — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  filing_url varchar [note: 'The web address or portal link where the filing was submitted or can be accessed for review. Provides direct access to the regulatory body submission system.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'The fiscal year to which this filing pertains, expressed as a four-digit year (e.g., 2024 for FY2024). Used for financial and budgetary filings.']
  is_amended_filing boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this filing is an amendment or correction to a previously accepted filing. True if this is a corrected resubmission, False for original filings.']
  is_late_filing boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the filing was submitted after the regulatory deadline. True if submission_date is after due_date, False otherwise. Used for compliance monitoring and risk assessment.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the system user who last modified this regulatory filing record. Used for accountability and audit purposes.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this regulatory filing record was last modified. Updated whenever any attribute of the filing is changed. Part of the audit trail for data lineage.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form text field for additional notes, comments, or context about the filing. May include information about data challenges, special circumstances, or follow-up actions required.']
  preparer_email varchar [note: 'The email address of the staff member who prepared the filing. Used for regulatory body follow-up and internal audit trail.']
  preparer_name varchar [note: 'The name of the institutional staff member who prepared the regulatory filing. Used for accountability and follow-up questions.']
  preparer_phone varchar [note: 'The contact phone number of the staff member who prepared the filing. Provided to regulatory bodies for clarification requests.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'The name of the federal, state, or accreditation agency to which this filing is submitted (e.g., U.S. Department of Education, HLC, SACSCOC, NCAA, State Higher Education Commission).']
  regulatory_body_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code or abbreviation for the regulatory body (e.g., ED for Department of Education, HLC for Higher Learning Commission, SACSCOC for Southern Association of Colleges and Schools Commission on Colleges).']
  rejection_date date [note: 'The date on which the regulatory body rejected the filing. Used to track the timeline for corrective action and resubmission.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'The reason provided by the regulatory body for rejecting the filing. Includes specific data quality issues, missing information, or compliance deficiencies that must be corrected before resubmission.']
  resubmission_count varchar [note: 'The number of times this filing has been resubmitted after initial rejection. Used to track data quality issues and process improvement opportunities.']
  review_date date [note: 'The date on which the filing was reviewed and approved by the designated reviewer. Documents the internal approval workflow.']
  submission_date date [note: 'The date on which the filing was officially submitted to the regulatory body. This is the business event date that determines compliance with filing deadlines.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'The mechanism or channel through which the filing was submitted to the regulatory body (e.g., online portal, email, postal mail, electronic data exchange, API integration). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: online_portal|email|postal_mail|fax|electronic_data_exchange|api|manual_upload — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The precise date and time when the filing was submitted to the regulatory body, including time zone information. Used for audit trail and deadline verification purposes.']
  submitting_office varchar [note: 'The institutional office or department responsible for preparing and submitting this regulatory filing (e.g., Office of Institutional Research, Compliance Office, Financial Aid Office, Athletics Compliance).']

  Note: 'Tracks all mandatory regulatory filings and submissions to federal, state, and accreditation bodies. Captures filing type (IPEDS, Clery ASR, Title IV Program Participation Agreement, NCAA APR/GSR, state authorization, gainful employment, 90/10 rule), filing period, submitting office, submission date, submission method, filing status (draft, submitted, accepted, rejected, under review), regulatory body, and confirmation reference. Serves as the institutional calendar and audit trail for all external compliance submissions.'
}

Table compliance.training_program {
  training_program_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_program']
  certificate_template_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the certificate template used to generate completion certificates for this training program. References the document management or certificate generation system. Null if no certificate is issued.']
  enterprise_application_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.enterprise_application. Business justification: Compliance training (Title IX, FERPA, cybersecurity awareness) is delivered via enterprise LMS platforms (Canvas, Blackboard). Accreditors and auditors require tracking which system hosts each trainin']
  identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the system user or administrator who created this training program record. Used for accountability and audit purposes.']
  owner_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.org_unit. Business justification: Compliance training programs are owned and maintained by specific organizational units (HR, Title IX, EHS). Links owner for content update accountability, budget allocation, and organizational trainin']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Many compliance training programs are mandated by specific federal regulations (Title IX training, Clery Act training, FERPA training, export control training, etc.). The regulatory_basis text field b']
  updated_by_user_identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the system user or administrator who last modified this training program record. Used for accountability and audit purposes.']
  accessibility_compliant_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the training content meets ADA (Americans with Disabilities Act) and WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) accessibility standards for learners with disabilities. True if compliant; false if not verified or non-compliant.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Name of the professional or accreditation organization that recognizes or awards credit for this training program (e.g., AACSB, ABET, state bar association, medical board). Null if no external accreditation applies.']
  accreditation_credit_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of continuing education or professional development credit hours awarded for completion of this training, if applicable. Used for professional licensure and accreditation reporting. Null if no credit is awarded.']
  audit_trail_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether detailed audit trails of participant access, progress, and completion must be maintained for regulatory or accreditation purposes. True if audit trail is required; false for standard tracking only.']
  certificate_issued_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a certificate of completion is issued to participants who successfully complete the training. True if certificate is issued; false if no certificate is provided.']
  completion_deadline_days varchar [note: 'Number of days from assignment date by which the training must be completed. Used to calculate individual due dates when training is assigned to users. Null if no specific deadline applies.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the department or individual responsible for questions, support, and administration of this training program. Used for participant inquiries and technical support.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the department or individual responsible for questions, support, and administration of this training program. Used for participant inquiries and technical support.']
  content_url varchar [note: 'Web address or LMS (Learning Management System) link where the training content is hosted and accessible to assigned users. Used for direct navigation to training materials.']
  content_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the training content, updated when material is revised to reflect regulatory changes, policy updates, or content improvements. Follows semantic versioning convention (e.g., v1.0, v2.1).']
  cost_per_learner decimal(10,2) [note: 'Cost in USD charged per learner for access to or completion of the training program. Used for budgeting and financial planning. Null for internally-developed training with no per-learner cost.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this training program record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  delivery_modality varchar [note: 'Method by which the training content is delivered to participants. Online training is completed via LMS (Learning Management System) or web portal; in-person training is conducted in physical sessions; hybrid combines online and in-person components; self-paced allows learners to complete at their own schedule; instructor-led requires scheduled sessions with a facilitator.']
  duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Expected time in minutes required to complete the training program, including all modules, assessments, and required activities. Used for scheduling and compliance tracking.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which this training program version is no longer effective or available for new assignments. Null for programs with no planned end date. Used to manage training content lifecycle and version transitions.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date on which this training program version became or will become effective and available for assignment. Used to manage training content transitions and regulatory compliance effective dates.']
  ipeds_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether completion data for this training program must be included in IPEDS (Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System) reporting to the U.S. Department of Education. True if IPEDS reporting is required; false otherwise.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code (optionally with ISO 3166-1 country code) indicating the primary language in which the training content is delivered (e.g., en for English, es for Spanish, en-US for US English).']
  learning_objectives varchar [note: 'Specific, measurable learning outcomes that participants are expected to achieve upon completion of the training. Aligned with regulatory requirements and institutional policy goals.']
  mobile_compatible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the training content is optimized for and accessible on mobile devices (smartphones, tablets). True if mobile-compatible; false if desktop-only.']
  passing_score_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum percentage score required on the training assessment to achieve completion status. Null if the training does not include a graded assessment. Expressed as a percentage (e.g., 80.00 represents 80%).']
  recertification_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months after completion before the training must be retaken to maintain compliance. Common values include 12 (annual), 24 (biennial), or 36 (triennial). Null if the training is one-time only and does not require recertification.']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Description of the population required to complete this training program. Examples include all employees, faculty only, student-athletes, new students, researchers with human subjects protocols, department chairs, Title IX coordinators, or other role-based or attribute-based cohorts.']
  training_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code for the training program used in communications, reporting, and system integrations. Typically follows institutional coding standards.']
  training_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the compliance training program as displayed to users and in institutional documentation.']
  training_program_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the training program content, learning objectives, and compliance purpose. Provides context for administrators and participants about what the training covers and why it is required.']
  training_program_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the training program. Active programs are available for assignment and completion; inactive programs are temporarily unavailable; under_review programs are being evaluated for content or policy updates; archived programs are retained for historical record but no longer assigned; draft programs are in development and not yet published.']
  training_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the training program based on institutional requirement level. Mandatory training is required by law or policy; recommended training is strongly encouraged; optional training is available but not required; conditional training is required for specific roles or circumstances.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this training program record was last modified. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and data quality monitoring.']
  vendor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the external vendor or content provider that developed or supplies the training program, if applicable. Null for internally-developed training. Used for vendor management and contract tracking.']

  Note: 'Master record for mandatory compliance training programs required by federal law, accreditation standards, or institutional policy. Captures training program name, regulatory basis (Title IX, Clery, FERPA, HIPAA, research ethics, conflict of interest, ADA), target audience (all employees, faculty, student-athletes, new students, researchers), delivery modality (online, in-person, hybrid), completion deadline, recertification frequency, and training content version. Distinct from course catalog — these are compliance-mandated training obligations.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_training_completion {
  compliance_training_completion_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance training completion record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the individual who completed the training. Links to employee, faculty, student, or contractor records depending on trainee type.']
  identity_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.identity_account. Business justification: Training completion records must link to institutional identity (NetID) for audit trails, SSO authentication, and cross-system reporting. OCR audits and accreditation reviews require verifiable identi']
  lms_course_shell_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the course in the Learning Management System (Canvas LMS or similar platform).']
  training_program_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance training program completed.']
  accreditation_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this training completion can be used as evidence for accreditation self-studies and regulatory audits (True) or not (False).']
  assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical score achieved by the trainee on the training assessment, typically expressed as a percentage (0.00 to 100.00).']
  assignment_date date [note: 'Date when the training was assigned to the trainee.']
  attempt_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number indicating which attempt this represents if the trainee took the training multiple times.']
  audit_trail_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments related to the training completion for audit and compliance tracking purposes.']
  browser_type varchar [note: 'Web browser used by the trainee to access and complete the training.']
  certificate_issue_date date [note: 'Date when the completion certificate was officially issued to the trainee.']
  certificate_issued_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a completion certificate was issued to the trainee (True) or not (False).']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique certificate identifier issued upon successful completion of the training program.']
  completion_date date [note: 'Date when the trainee successfully completed the compliance training program.']
  completion_method varchar [note: 'Delivery method through which the training was completed.']
  completion_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the training completion record indicating whether the trainee successfully met all requirements.']
  completion_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise date and time when the trainee completed the training, including time zone information for audit trail purposes.']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory or compliance domain that this training addresses. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: title_ix|clery_act|ferpa|hipaa|irb|research_ethics|data_security|harassment_prevention — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this training completion record originated (e.g., Canvas LMS, Workday HCM, third-party compliance training platform).']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used by the trainee to complete the training.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which the trainee was required to complete the training.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the training completion expires and recertification is required, if applicable.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'IP address from which the trainee accessed and completed the training, captured for security and audit purposes.']
  mandatory_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this training was mandatory (True) or voluntary (False) for the trainee.']
  overdue_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the training was completed after the due date (True) or on time (False).']
  pass_fail_indicator boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the trainee passed (True) or failed (False) the training assessment.']
  passing_score_required decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum score required to pass the training assessment at the time of completion, captured for historical accuracy.']
  recertification_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required recertifications for this training program.']
  recertification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether periodic recertification is required (True) or not (False) for this training program.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this completion record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this completion record was last modified in the system.']
  supervisor_notification_date date [note: 'Date when the supervisor was notified of the training completion.']
  supervisor_notified_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the trainee\'s supervisor was notified of the completion (True) or not (False).']
  trainee_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the individual completing the training based on their relationship to the institution.']
  training_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Total time in minutes the trainee spent completing the training program.']
  training_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the organization or vendor that provided the training content and platform.']
  training_version varchar [note: 'Version number or identifier of the training content completed, important for tracking content updates and ensuring compliance with current regulations.']
  waiver_approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the individual who approved the training waiver.']
  waiver_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a waiver was granted exempting the trainee from completing this training (True) or not (False).']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why a training waiver was granted, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of individual compliance training completions by employees, faculty, students, and contractors. Captures trainee identifier, trainee type, training program, completion date, assessment score, pass/fail status, certificate issued flag, completion method, and expiration date for recertification. Supports Title IX, Clery, FERPA, and research compliance training mandates and provides evidence for accreditation self-studies and regulatory audits.'
}

Table compliance.state_authorization {
  state_authorization_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the state authorization record. Primary key for tracking institutional compliance with state authorization requirements for distance education and physical presence activities.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: State authorization for distance education and physical presence is mandated by federal regulations (34 CFR 600.9) and varies by state. Each state authorization record fulfills a specific regulatory r']
  responsible_staff_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: State authorization compliance requires designated institutional contact for agency communication. Enables accountability tracking, workload analysis, and ensures continuity when staff transitions. Re']
  agency_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary contact person at the state agency for authorization communications.']
  agency_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person at the state agency for authorization inquiries and correspondence.']
  agency_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Telephone number of the primary contact person at the state agency for authorization inquiries.']
  agency_website_url varchar [note: 'Web address of the state agency responsible for authorization. Provides access to application forms, requirements, and regulatory guidance.']
  annual_report_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the institution must submit the annual report to the state agency. Null if no annual report is required.']
  annual_report_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the state requires the institution to submit an annual report or data filing to maintain authorization. True if annual reporting is required; false if not required.']
  application_date date [note: 'Date the institution submitted the authorization application to the state agency. Establishes timeline for processing and compliance tracking.']
  authorization_fee_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of the application or renewal fee charged by the state agency for authorization. Null if no fee is required.']
  authorization_number varchar [note: 'Official reference number or certificate number issued by the state agency granting authorization. Used for verification and audit purposes.']
  authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the state authorization. Authorized indicates active compliance; pending indicates application submitted; expired indicates lapsed authorization requiring renewal; denied indicates rejected application; withdrawn indicates institution voluntarily ceased activity; not required indicates exemption or exclusion applies.']
  authorization_type varchar [note: 'Category of activity requiring state authorization. Distance education covers online program delivery; physical presence includes offices, classrooms, or administrative sites; clinical placement applies to healthcare and education programs; recruiting covers admissions activities; field experience and internship cover supervised learning activities in the state.']
  authorized_program_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of academic programs or CIP codes specifically authorized for delivery in this state. Some states require program-level authorization rather than blanket institutional authorization.']
  complaint_disclosure_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the institution has published the required student complaint process disclosure for this state. Disclosed indicates compliance; not disclosed indicates missing disclosure; not required indicates no disclosure obligation.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for documenting special conditions, restrictions, or institutional notes related to this state authorization. Used for tracking unique requirements or historical context.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time this state authorization record was first created in the institutional system. Used for audit trail and data lineage purposes.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the state authorization becomes active and the institution is legally permitted to conduct the specified activities in the state.']
  enrolled_student_count varchar [note: 'Number of students enrolled in programs or courses delivered in this state under this authorization. Used for reporting and fee calculation purposes in some states.']
  exemption_basis varchar [note: 'Legal or regulatory basis for exemption from state authorization requirements. Describes the specific statute, regulation, or policy provision granting the exemption.']
  exemption_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the institution qualifies for an exemption from state authorization requirements in this state. True if exempt under state law or regulation; false if authorization is required.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the state authorization expires and the institution must cease activities or submit a renewal application. Null for perpetual authorizations.']
  fee_payment_date date [note: 'Date the institution paid the authorization or renewal fee to the state agency. Used for financial reconciliation and compliance tracking.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this state authorization record is currently active and in use. True for active records; false for historical or superseded records.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time this state authorization record was most recently updated. Used for audit trail and change tracking purposes.']
  last_report_submission_date date [note: 'Date the institution most recently submitted an annual report or compliance filing to the state agency for this authorization.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent institutional review or audit of this state authorization record for compliance verification purposes.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next institutional compliance review of this state authorization to ensure ongoing adherence to state requirements.']
  physical_location_address varchar [note: 'Street address of the physical presence location in the state, if applicable. Required for physical presence authorizations; null for distance education-only authorizations.']
  physical_location_city varchar [note: 'City of the physical presence location in the state, if applicable.']
  physical_location_postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP or postal code of the physical presence location in the state, if applicable.']
  renewal_date date [note: 'Target date by which the institution must submit a renewal application to maintain continuous authorization. Typically set in advance of expiration date to allow processing time.']
  responsible_office varchar [note: 'Name of the institutional office or department responsible for managing this state authorization and ensuring ongoing compliance. Typically the Office of Compliance, Office of the Registrar, or Office of Distance Education.']
  sara_participation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the institution relies on SARA membership for authorization in this state. True if SARA provides reciprocal authorization; false if state-specific authorization is required.']
  state_agency_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the state agency responsible for granting and overseeing authorization. Typically a state board of higher education, department of education, or professional licensing board.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter postal abbreviation for the state in which authorization is required. Identifies the jurisdiction for compliance tracking and reporting purposes.']
  state_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the state requiring authorization for institutional operations or distance education delivery.']
  student_complaint_process_url varchar [note: 'Web address where students can access information about filing complaints with the state agency. Required disclosure under 34 CFR 668.43(b) for distance education programs.']

  Note: 'Tracks state authorization compliance for distance education and physical presence activities in states other than the institution\'s home state. Captures state, authorization type (distance education, physical presence, clinical placement, recruiting), application status, authorization number, effective date, expiration date, renewal date, authorized program list, student complaint process disclosure status, and state agency contact. Required under 34 CFR 600.9 and SARA (State Authorization Reciprocity Agreement) participation.'
}

Table compliance.internal_review {
  internal_review_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for internal_review']
  lead_reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Internal compliance reviews require documented reviewer assignment for accountability and conflict-of-interest tracking. Enables reviewer workload balancing, qualification verification, and audit trai']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: internal_review currently has related_policy_reference as a STRING field (likely free text or policy number). Adding policy_id FK provides structured linkage to the policy master table, enabling preci']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the primary regulatory requirement or compliance obligation being assessed in this review.']
  responsible_org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.org_unit. Business justification: Compliance reviews target specific organizational units for scope definition and accountability. Enables review workload distribution, organizational compliance scoring, and risk-based audit planning ']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this compliance review record is currently active and relevant for reporting and tracking purposes.']
  compliance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative compliance score or rating assigned based on review results, typically expressed as a percentage or index value.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level assigned to the review and its findings, governing access and distribution.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this compliance review record was first created in the system.']
  documentation_location varchar [note: 'File path, URL, or repository location where the full review documentation, workpapers, and evidence are stored.']
  external_reporting_date date [note: 'Date when findings were reported to external regulatory or accreditation bodies, if applicable.']
  external_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether findings from this internal review must be reported to external regulatory bodies or accreditation agencies.']
  findings_count varchar [note: 'Total number of discrete findings or issues identified during the review.']
  findings_summary varchar [note: 'Executive summary of the review findings, including key observations, compliance gaps, and areas of concern.']
  follow_up_due_date date [note: 'Target date by which follow-up actions or verification review should be completed.']
  follow_up_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether follow-up actions or a subsequent review is required to verify remediation of findings.']
  follow_up_status varchar [note: 'Current status of follow-up actions or verification activities related to this review.']
  methodology_description varchar [note: 'Description of the review methodology employed, including sampling approach, data sources, interview protocols, and analytical techniques.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the individual who last modified this compliance review record.']

  recommendations_count varchar [note: 'Total number of discrete recommendations issued to address findings.']
  recommendations_issued varchar [note: 'Summary of corrective actions, process improvements, or policy changes recommended as a result of the review.']
  report_issued_date date [note: 'Date when the formal compliance review report was issued to stakeholders.']
  report_recipients varchar [note: 'List of individuals, offices, or committees to whom the review report was distributed (e.g., President, Board of Trustees, Compliance Committee).']
  responsible_officer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual (e.g., department head, dean, director) accountable for remediation of findings.']
  review_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the compliance review, typically formatted as type-year-sequence (e.g., FERPA-2024-00123, NCAA-2024-00045).']
  review_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance review was completed and findings finalized.']
  review_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name or title of the compliance review (e.g., \'FY2024 FERPA Records Audit\', \'Title IX Program Review - Athletics\').']
  review_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, context, or observations recorded by the review team that provide supplementary information.']
  review_period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the period being reviewed (the timeframe of activities/records under examination).']
  review_period_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the period being reviewed (the timeframe of activities/records under examination).']
  review_start_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance review activity commenced (distinct from the period being reviewed).']
  review_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the compliance review.']
  review_team_members varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list or narrative description of additional team members who participated in the review.']
  review_type varchar [note: 'Category of internal compliance review being conducted. Aligns with major regulatory frameworks and institutional compliance domains. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FERPA Audit|Title IX Program Review|NCAA Compliance Review|Financial Aid Program Review|Research Compliance Review|Clery Act Review|ADA Accommodations Review|HIPAA Compliance Review|IRB Protocol Review|Export Control Review|Conflict of Interest Review|Data Privacy Review|Other — 13 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating assigned to the review findings, reflecting the severity and potential impact of identified compliance gaps.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of records, cases, or transactions sampled during the review, if applicable.']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the review scope, including departments, processes, systems, or populations covered by the review.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the individual who created this compliance review record.']

  Note: 'Records internal compliance reviews, program reviews, and self-assessments conducted by the compliance office or designated compliance officers. Captures review type (FERPA audit, Title IX program review, NCAA compliance review, financial aid program review, research compliance review), scope, review period, lead reviewer, methodology, findings summary, risk rating, recommendations issued, and follow-up action status. Distinct from external audit_finding — this captures internally initiated compliance monitoring activities.'
}

Table compliance.risk_assessment {
  risk_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance risk assessment record. Primary key for the risk assessment entity.']
  identity_account_id varchar [note: 'System user identifier of the compliance staff member who created this risk assessment record.']
  modified_by_user_identity_account_id varchar [note: 'System user identifier of the compliance staff member who last modified this risk assessment record.']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the institutional policy that governs or addresses this compliance risk area.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the specific regulatory requirement or compliance obligation that this risk relates to, if applicable.']
  risk_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Enterprise risk management requires designated risk owner with accountability for mitigation. Links owner for escalation workflows, enables risk portfolio analysis by personnel, and provides governanc']
  superseded_risk_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on risk_assessment (superseded_risk_assessment_id)']
  accreditation_impact_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether this compliance risk could affect institutional or programmatic accreditation status if not properly managed.']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether this risk assessment is currently active and relevant for compliance monitoring, or has been archived/closed.']
  affected_population varchar [note: 'Description of the institutional stakeholder groups impacted by this risk, such as students, faculty, staff, alumni, research participants, or external partners.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the formal risk assessment analysis was completed, including likelihood and impact evaluation.']
  board_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether this risk assessment must be reported to the Board of Trustees Audit Committee based on severity and institutional governance requirements.']
  control_effectiveness varchar [note: 'Assessment of how well the current mitigation controls are functioning to reduce the risk to acceptable levels.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp indicating when this risk assessment record was first created in the compliance management system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the estimated financial impact, typically USD for U.S. higher education institutions.']
  estimated_financial_impact decimal(15,2) [note: 'Projected monetary cost to the institution if the risk materializes, including potential fines, penalties, legal costs, remediation expenses, and lost revenue.']
  external_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of whether this risk must be disclosed to external regulatory bodies, accreditors, or government agencies.']
  identification_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance risk was first identified and entered into the institutional risk register.']
  inherent_impact_rating varchar [note: 'Severity assessment of the consequences if the risk materializes without any mitigation controls, rated on a five-point scale from insignificant to catastrophic.']
  inherent_likelihood_rating varchar [note: 'Probability assessment of the risk occurring without any mitigation controls in place, rated on a five-point scale from rare to almost certain.']
  inherent_risk_score varchar [note: 'Calculated numerical score representing the inherent risk level before mitigation, typically derived from likelihood multiplied by impact (scale 1-25).']
  last_board_report_date date [note: 'Date when this risk was most recently presented to the Board of Trustees or Audit Committee for review and oversight.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp indicating when this risk assessment record was most recently updated, used for audit trail and data currency tracking.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent periodic review of this risk assessment, used to track currency of risk evaluation.']
  mitigation_strategy varchar [note: 'Comprehensive description of the controls, processes, policies, and actions implemented or planned to reduce the likelihood or impact of the risk.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review of this risk assessment, based on review frequency and risk level.']
  residual_impact_rating varchar [note: 'Severity assessment of the consequences if the risk materializes after considering existing mitigation controls, rated on a five-point scale.']
  residual_likelihood_rating varchar [note: 'Probability assessment of the risk occurring after considering existing mitigation controls and strategies, rated on a five-point scale.']
  residual_risk_score varchar [note: 'Calculated numerical score representing the residual risk level after mitigation controls are applied, used to prioritize compliance monitoring activities (scale 1-25).']
  responsible_office varchar [note: 'Name of the institutional department or office with primary responsibility for monitoring and mitigating this compliance risk.']
  review_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between scheduled reviews of this risk assessment, typically ranging from 3 to 12 months based on risk severity.']
  risk_appetite_threshold varchar [note: 'Institutional tolerance level for this risk category, expressed as a numerical score. Residual risk scores above this threshold require escalation and additional mitigation.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Primary classification of the risk type: regulatory (compliance with laws/regulations), financial (monetary impact), reputational (institutional image), operational (process/system failures), strategic (mission alignment), or legal (litigation exposure).']
  risk_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the compliance risk, including the nature of the risk, potential triggers, and context within institutional operations.']
  risk_notes varchar [note: 'Additional contextual information, observations, or commentary about the risk assessment, mitigation progress, or special considerations.']
  risk_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing unique identifier for the risk assessment, formatted as RISK-XXXXXX for external communication and tracking.']
  risk_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the risk assessment: identified (newly discovered), assessed (analysis complete), active (requires ongoing attention), mitigated (controls implemented), closed (resolved), or monitoring (under surveillance).']
  risk_subcategory varchar [note: 'Secondary classification providing granular detail within the primary risk category, such as Title IX, FERPA, Clery Act, NCAA, accreditation, financial aid, research compliance, or data privacy.']
  risk_title varchar [note: 'Concise title or name of the identified compliance risk for quick reference and reporting.']
  risk_trend varchar [note: 'Directional indicator of how the risk profile is changing over time based on comparison of current and historical assessments.']

  Note: 'Institutional compliance risk register tracking identified compliance risks, risk categories (regulatory, financial, reputational, operational), likelihood and impact ratings, risk owners, mitigation strategies, residual risk scores, review frequency, and risk trend over time. Used by the Chief Compliance Officer to prioritize compliance monitoring activities, allocate resources, and report to the Board Audit Committee on institutional risk posture. Feeds enterprise risk management reporting and accreditation self-studies.'
}

Table compliance.ipeds_submission {
  ipeds_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each IPEDS survey submission record. Primary key for the ipeds_submission product.']
  amended_ipeds_submission_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on ipeds_submission (amended_ipeds_submission_id)']
  original_submission_ipeds_submission_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the original submission record if this is a revision, creating an audit trail of data corrections and resubmissions.']
  primary_ipeds_preparer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Internal employee identifier for the staff member who prepared the IPEDS submission, linking to the institutional human resources system.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: IPEDS (Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System) submissions are mandatory federal reporting requirements under the Higher Education Opportunity Act (HEOA). Each survey component (enrollment, fi']
  acceptance_date date [note: 'The date on which NCES officially accepted the submission as complete and compliant, closing the reporting obligation for this survey component and year.']
  certification_date date [note: 'The date on which the IPEDS Keyholder certified the accuracy and completeness of the submission data, fulfilling the institutional attestation requirement.']
  certification_statement varchar [note: 'The official certification text affirming that the submitted data is accurate, complete, and compliant with NCES reporting standards, as required for submission.']
  collection_period varchar [note: 'The seasonal collection window during which this survey component is due. IPEDS operates on a three-cycle annual collection schedule.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp recording when this IPEDS submission record was first created in the institutional compliance tracking system.']
  data_extraction_date date [note: 'The date on which the source data was extracted from institutional systems for IPEDS reporting, establishing the data snapshot point for compliance verification.']
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Internal institutional assessment score reflecting the completeness, accuracy, and consistency of the submission data prior to NCES submission, used for quality assurance.']
  due_date date [note: 'The official deadline by which the institution must submit this IPEDS survey component to NCES to maintain compliance with federal reporting requirements.']
  edit_report_error_count varchar [note: 'Number of errors identified in the NCES edit report that must be resolved before the submission can be accepted, indicating data quality issues.']
  edit_report_warning_count varchar [note: 'Number of warnings flagged in the NCES edit report that require institutional explanation or verification but do not block submission acceptance.']
  imputation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator showing whether NCES applied statistical imputation to fill missing data elements in this submission, affecting data reliability and comparability.']
  imputation_summary varchar [note: 'Description of which data elements were imputed by NCES and the methodology used, providing transparency for institutional data quality review.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this submission record is the current active version or has been superseded by a revision, supporting historical data management.']
  is_late_submission boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the submission was filed after the official NCES deadline, which may trigger compliance warnings or affect institutional standing.']
  is_revision boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this submission is a revision of previously submitted data, typically required when errors are discovered post-acceptance.']
