  transfer_student_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is a transfer student from another institution.']

  Note: 'Tracks NCAA or NAIA athletic eligibility status for student-athletes. Captures sport, division level (NCAA DI/DII/DIII, NAIA), eligibility year (1st–5th year), seasons of competition used, seasons remaining, full-time enrollment verification, minimum credit hour compliance, GPA eligibility threshold met flag, progress-toward-degree percentage, transfer eligibility status, medical hardship waiver status, and eligibility certification date. Supports compliance reporting to the NCAA Eligibility Center.'
}

Table athletics.sport {
  sport_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sport program record. Primary key.']
  compliance_accreditation_standard_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.accreditation_standard. Business justification: Some sports programs (athletic training, exercise science) subject to specialized accreditation standards (CAATE, CoAES). Real business process: programs track compliance with accreditation standards ']
  parent_sport_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sport (parent_sport_id)']
  championship_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sport program is currently eligible to compete in conference and national championship events.']
  competition_end_date date [note: 'Official date when the regular season and championship competition ends for the current or upcoming season.']
  competition_start_date date [note: 'Official date when the team may begin competing in sanctioned contests for the current or upcoming season.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for sport-specific compliance notes, waivers, sanctions, or special conditions affecting the program.']
  conference_affiliation varchar [note: 'Name of the athletic conference to which this sport program belongs (e.g., Big Ten, ACC, Ivy League). Null for independent programs.']
  contact_sport_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sport involves physical contact between participants, used for insurance and medical clearance requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sport record was first created in the system.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'Competitive division level for intercollegiate sports (NCAA Division I/II/III, NAIA, NJCAA).']
  eada_reporting_code varchar [note: 'Federal reporting code used for EADA compliance submissions to the U.S. Department of Education.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date when the sport program was discontinued or suspended. Null for active programs.']
  gender_classification varchar [note: 'Gender designation for the sport program, used for Title IX compliance and roster management.']
  governing_body_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the primary athletic governing body for this sport program.']
  ipeds_sport_code varchar [note: 'IPEDS standardized sport code used for federal athletics data reporting.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sport record was most recently modified.']
  maximum_contests_allowed varchar [note: 'Maximum number of contests (games, matches, meets) the team may participate in during a season, as defined by governing body rules.']
  maximum_roster_size varchar [note: 'Maximum number of student-athletes allowed on the active roster for this sport, as defined by governing body rules.']
  maximum_scholarship_equivalencies decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum number of full scholarship equivalencies allowed for this sport under NCAA/NAIA rules. For head-count sports, this equals the maximum number of scholarships.']
  minimum_roster_size varchar [note: 'Minimum number of student-athletes required to field a competitive team for this sport.']
  ncaa_sport_classification varchar [note: 'NCAA classification indicating whether the sport has a national championship, is an emerging sport, or is non-championship.']
  practice_start_date date [note: 'Official date when organized team practices may begin for the current or upcoming season, as defined by governing body rules.']
  primary_facility_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary home facility where this sport program competes and practices.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this version of the sport record is effective, supporting historical tracking and temporal queries.']
  revenue_producing_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sport program generates significant revenue through ticket sales, media rights, or sponsorships.']
  scholarship_model varchar [note: 'NCAA scholarship allocation model: head-count (full scholarships only) or equivalency (partial scholarships allowed).']
  season_type varchar [note: 'Primary competitive season for the sport program, used for scheduling and eligibility tracking.']
  sport_code varchar [note: 'Standardized short code for the sport (e.g., MBBALL for Men\'s Basketball, WSOC for Women\'s Soccer). Used for reporting and system integration.']
  sport_name varchar [note: 'Full official name of the sport program (e.g., Men\'s Basketball, Women\'s Soccer, Co-Ed Swimming and Diving).']
  sport_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the sport program within the institution.']
  sport_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the sport program by competitive level and organizational structure.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date when the institution first sponsored this sport program.']
  team_sport_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sport is a team sport (true) or an individual sport (false). Used for roster management and scholarship allocation.']
  title_ix_countable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sport program counts toward Title IX gender equity participation and scholarship calculations.']
  varsity_level_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is a varsity-level program (true) or sub-varsity/junior varsity (false).']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public-facing website URL for the sport program, used for recruiting and fan engagement.']

  Note: 'Master catalog record for every intercollegiate and intramural sport program offered by the institution. Captures sport code, sport name, gender classification (men/women/mixed/co-ed), sport type (intercollegiate/intramural/club), NCAA/NAIA sport classification, governing body code, season type (fall/winter/spring/year-round), team sport flag, head count vs equivalency scholarship model, maximum roster size, maximum scholarship equivalencies allowed, sport status (active/inactive/suspended), and sport-level compliance notes.'
}

Table athletics.team {
  team_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the athletic team. Primary key for the team entity.']
  athletic_facility_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the facilities management system identifying the primary home venue for the team.']
  head_coach_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the staff member serving as head coach of the team.']
  operating_budget_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.budget. Business justification: Each team has an annual operating budget covering travel, equipment, recruiting, and game-day expenses. Budget vs. actual tracking is essential for financial management, variance analysis, and ensurin']
  operating_cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Athletic teams are organizational units with operating budgets tracked in finance systems. Budget officers monitor team expenditures (travel, equipment, recruiting) by cost center for financial report']
  predecessor_team_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on team (predecessor_team_id)']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'Academic year in which the team competes, formatted as YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2024-2025).']
  apr_score decimal(6,2) [note: 'The team\'s Academic Progress Rate (APR) score, a metric measuring academic eligibility and retention of student-athletes. Calculated as a multi-year rate out of 1000.']
  assistant_coach_count varchar [note: 'Number of assistant coaches assigned to the team.']
  compliance_certification_date date [note: 'Date on which the team\'s compliance certification was last completed or renewed.']
  compliance_certification_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance certification status of the team with respect to NCAA, NAIA, or NJCAA rules and institutional policies (Certified, Pending, Non-Compliant, Under Review).']
  conference_affiliation varchar [note: 'Name of the athletic conference to which the team belongs (e.g., Big Ten, SEC, ACC, Patriot League, Independent).']
  conference_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code for the athletic conference (e.g., B1G for Big Ten, SEC for Southeastern Conference, ACC for Atlantic Coast Conference).']
  conference_losses varchar [note: 'Number of losses in conference competition during the academic year.']
  conference_standing varchar [note: 'Final standing or rank of the team within its conference for the academic year (1 = first place).']
  conference_wins varchar [note: 'Number of wins in conference competition during the academic year.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'Competitive division level at which the team competes (e.g., NCAA Division I, NCAA Division II, NCAA Division III, NAIA, NJCAA, USCAA, Club, Intramural). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: NCAA-DI|NCAA-DII|NCAA-DIII|NAIA|NJCAA-DI|NJCAA-DII|NJCAA-DIII|USCAA|Club|Intramural — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  established_date date [note: 'Date when the team was first established or added to the institution\'s athletics program.']
  gender varchar [note: 'Gender classification of the team: M (Men\'s), F (Women\'s), C (Coed/Mixed).']
  gsr_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'The team\'s Graduation Success Rate (GSR), measuring the percentage of student-athletes who graduate within six years. Expressed as a percentage (0-100).']
  home_venue_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary facility where the team plays home competitions (e.g., Memorial Stadium, Smith Arena, Johnson Field).']
  losses varchar [note: 'Total number of losses recorded by the team in the academic year.']
  next_compliance_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next compliance review or certification audit of the team.']
  nickname varchar [note: 'Informal or abbreviated team name used in communications and media (e.g., Eagles, Wildcats, Bulldogs).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or context about the team (e.g., special achievements, sanctions, coaching changes, facility renovations).']
  operating_budget decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total operating budget allocated to the team for the academic year, including coaching salaries, travel, equipment, recruiting, and other operational expenses.']
  postseason_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the team is eligible to participate in postseason competition (conference tournament, NCAA tournament, bowl games). True if eligible, False if ineligible due to sanctions, APR penalties, or other restrictions.']
  postseason_participation varchar [note: 'Description of postseason competitions the team participated in during the academic year (e.g., Conference Tournament, NCAA Tournament Round of 32, Bowl Game).']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the team record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the team record was last updated in the system.']
  revenue_generated decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenue generated by the team during the academic year, including ticket sales, sponsorships, media rights, and donations.']
  roster_limit varchar [note: 'Maximum number of student-athletes allowed on the roster per governing body rules (NCAA, NAIA, NJCAA).']
  roster_size varchar [note: 'Total number of student-athletes on the team roster for the academic year.']
  scholarship_limit decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum number of full-time equivalent (FTE) athletic scholarships allowed for the team per governing body rules.']
  scholarships_awarded decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total full-time equivalent (FTE) athletic scholarships awarded to student-athletes on the team for the academic year.']
  season varchar [note: 'Primary competition season for the team within the academic year (Fall, Winter, Spring, Summer).']
  team_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the team, typically including institution mascot and sport (e.g., Eagles Men\'s Basketball, Wildcats Women\'s Soccer).']
  team_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the team (Active, Inactive, Suspended, Probation, Discontinued).']
  ties varchar [note: 'Total number of tie games recorded by the team in the academic year (applicable to sports that allow ties).']
  title_ix_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the team is in compliance with Title IX gender equity requirements. True if compliant, False if non-compliant or under review.']
  wins varchar [note: 'Total number of wins recorded by the team in the academic year.']

  Note: 'Master record for each athletic team fielded by the institution in a given academic year. Represents the operational unit of competition — e.g., Men\'s Basketball 2024-25. Captures team name, sport reference, academic year, competitive division (NCAA DI/DII/DIII, NAIA, NJCAA), conference affiliation, home venue, head coach assignment, team status (active/inactive/suspended), win-loss-tie record, conference standing, postseason eligibility flag, and team-level compliance certification status.'
}

Table athletics.roster {
  roster_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the roster record. Primary key for the roster entity.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the athletics compliance staff member who certified this roster entry.']
  prior_roster_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on roster (prior_roster_id)']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student-athlete assigned to this roster slot.']
  team_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the athletic team for which this roster entry applies.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'The academic year for which this roster assignment is valid, formatted as YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024).']
  add_date date [note: 'The date the student-athlete was officially added to the team roster.']
  captain_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete serves as a team captain during this roster period.']
  certification_date date [note: 'The date this roster entry was certified for compliance with NCAA or NAIA regulations.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'The compliance certification status of this roster entry for NCAA or NAIA reporting requirements.']
  compliance_hold_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether there is a compliance hold preventing the student-athlete from competing.']
  compliance_hold_reason varchar [note: 'Description of the reason for any compliance hold placed on the student-athlete.']
  drop_date date [note: 'The date the student-athlete was officially removed from the team roster, if applicable. Null if still active.']
  eligibility_year varchar [note: 'The year of athletic eligibility being used by the student-athlete during this roster period.']
  eligibility_years_remaining varchar [note: 'The number of years of athletic eligibility remaining for the student-athlete after this roster period.']
  height_inches varchar [note: 'The student-athlete\'s height in inches as recorded for roster publication.']
  high_school_name varchar [note: 'The name of the high school or preparatory institution the student-athlete attended prior to enrollment.']
  home_state varchar [note: 'The two-letter state code representing the student-athlete\'s home state or region.']
  hometown varchar [note: 'The hometown or city of origin of the student-athlete, typically used for roster publication and media guides.']
  injury_status varchar [note: 'Current injury or health status of the student-athlete affecting their roster participation.']
  jersey_number varchar [note: 'The jersey number assigned to the student-athlete for this roster period.']
  medical_redshirt_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is taking a medical redshirt year due to injury or medical condition.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments regarding this roster assignment, including special circumstances or administrative details.']
  one_time_transfer_exception_used boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete has used their one-time transfer exception for immediate eligibility.']
  position_code varchar [note: 'The abbreviated code representing the position or role the student-athlete plays on the team (e.g., QB, PG, MF).']
  position_name varchar [note: 'The full descriptive name of the position or role the student-athlete plays on the team (e.g., Quarterback, Point Guard, Midfielder).']
  practice_squad_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is on the practice squad rather than the active competition roster.']
  previous_institution_name varchar [note: 'The name of the previous college or university attended by the student-athlete if they are a transfer student.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this roster record was first created in the system.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this roster record is considered effective for reporting and compliance purposes.']
  record_expiration_date date [note: 'The date after which this roster record is no longer considered active or valid. Null if currently active.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this roster record was last modified in the system.']
  recruiting_class_year varchar [note: 'The year the student-athlete was recruited and signed to join the program (e.g., 2023).']
  redshirt_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is redshirting during this roster period (true) or actively competing (false).']
  roster_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the student-athlete on the roster, indicating their participation and funding classification.']
  scholarship_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage of full scholarship funding awarded to the student-athlete for this roster period (0.00 to 100.00).']
  scholarship_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is receiving athletic scholarship funding and the level of that funding.']
  starter_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is designated as a starting player for the team.']
  term_code varchar [note: 'The academic term code for this roster assignment (e.g., 202410 for Fall 2024).']
  transfer_eligibility_status varchar [note: 'The eligibility status of a transfer student-athlete under NCAA transfer rules.']
  transfer_student_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete transferred from another institution and is subject to transfer eligibility rules.']
  weight_pounds varchar [note: 'The student-athlete\'s weight in pounds as recorded for roster publication.']

  Note: 'Transactional record associating a student-athlete with a specific team for a specific academic year and term. Represents the official roster slot. Captures student-athlete reference, team reference, academic year, roster status (active/redshirt/medical redshirt/walk-on/scholarship/non-scholarship), jersey number, position, eligibility year used (freshman/sophomore/junior/senior/graduate), years of eligibility remaining, roster add date, roster drop date, and roster certification status for NCAA/NAIA compliance.'
}

Compliance officers verify program enrollment an']
  ada_accommodation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.ada_accommodation. Business justification: Student-athletes may request disability accommodations affecting athletic participation (modified practice schedules, equipment modifications, academic accommodations). Real business process: disabili']

Business justification: Athletics compliance officers verify student-athletes have no account holds (registration, transcript, financial) before certifying eligibility. Real business process: pre-competition eligibility veri']
  training_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.training_program. Real business process: compliance office assigns required training,']
  transfer_student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on student_athlete (transfer_student_athlete_id)']

  athletic_scholarship_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student athlete receives an athletic scholarship. True if scholarship awarded, False otherwise.']
  compliance_hold_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a compliance hold has been placed on the student athlete preventing competition. True if hold exists, False otherwise.']
  compliance_hold_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation of why a compliance hold was placed on the student athlete (e.g., missing documentation, academic deficiency, rules violation investigation).']

  height_inches varchar [note: 'The student athlete\'s height measured in inches. Used for roster information and sport-specific requirements.']
  high_school_name varchar [note: 'Name of the high school the student athlete attended prior to enrollment.']
  hometown varchar [note: 'The student athlete\'s hometown (city and state/province) for roster and media guide purposes.']
  initial_eligibility_certified_date date [note: 'Date when the student athlete\'s initial eligibility was certified by the NCAA Eligibility Center or equivalent governing body.']
  jersey_number varchar [note: 'The jersey number assigned to the student athlete for competition.']
  medical_hardship_season varchar [note: 'The season for which a medical hardship waiver was granted or requested (e.g., Fall 2022, Spring 2023).']
