  one_time_transfer_exception_used boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student athlete has used their one-time transfer exception allowing immediate eligibility. True if used, False if not.']
  position varchar [note: 'The primary playing position of the student athlete within their sport (e.g., Forward, Goalkeeper, Pitcher, Setter).']
  previous_institution_name varchar [note: 'Name of the previous institution from which the student athlete transferred, if applicable.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the student athlete record was first created in the athletics system.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the current version of the student athlete record became effective. Used for historical tracking and compliance reporting.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the student athlete record was last updated in the athletics system.']
  recruitment_class_year varchar [note: 'The academic year in which the student athlete was recruited and entered the institution (e.g., 2023 for Fall 2023 recruits).']
  redshirt_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the student athlete is redshirting (preserving a year of eligibility by not competing). Includes standard redshirt, medical redshirt, or non-redshirt status.']
  redshirt_year varchar [note: 'Academic term when the student athlete took a redshirt year (format: YYYYTT where TT is 10=Fall, 20=Spring, 30=Summer).']
  scholarship_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of athletic scholarship awarded, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 75.00 for 75% scholarship). Used for equivalency sports.']
  scholarship_type varchar [note: 'Type of athletic scholarship awarded: full (covers full cost of attendance), partial (covers portion of costs), or none.']
  secondary_sport_code varchar [note: 'Optional secondary sport code for multi-sport athletes. Uses standard NCAA sport codes.']
  team_roster_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the student athlete on the team roster. Indicates whether they are actively competing, injured, suspended, or no longer on the team.']
  total_eligibility_years_granted varchar [note: 'Total number of years of athletic eligibility granted to the student athlete. Typically 4 years for NCAA, but may be extended with waivers.']
  transfer_eligibility_status varchar [note: 'Current eligibility status for transfer student athletes. Indicates whether transfer eligibility requirements have been met.']
  transfer_student_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student athlete transferred from another institution. True if transfer, False if not.']
  weight_pounds varchar [note: 'The student athlete\'s weight measured in pounds. Used for roster information and sport-specific requirements.']

  Note: 'Master record for every student who participates or has participated in an intercollegiate or intramural athletic program. Serves as the athletics-domain identity anchor, extending the student.profile with athletics-specific attributes. Captures student reference, sport(s) of participation, recruitment class year, athletic scholarship flag, initial eligibility certification date, eligibility clock start term, total eligibility years granted, transfer eligibility status, medical hardship waiver history, and athletics department advising assignment.'
}

Table athletics.eligibility_certification {
  eligibility_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the eligibility certification record. Primary key for this transactional record of NCAA or NAIA eligibility certification conducted for a student-athlete.']
  academic_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to curriculum.academic_program. Business justification: Eligibility certification documents must reference the specific academic program to calculate degree_applicable_credits_earned and progress_toward_degree_percentage. Required for NCAA compliance repor']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance staff member or faculty athletics representative who certified this eligibility determination.']
  prior_eligibility_certification_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on eligibility_certification (prior_eligibility_certification_id)']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Eligibility certifications document compliance with specific regulatory requirements (NCAA bylaws, conference rules). Real business process: certification records must reference the specific regulator']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.sport. Business justification: eligibility_certification certifies eligibility for a specific sport. Currently uses sport_code/sport_name but lacks FK to sport master table. Adding sport_id enables JOIN to retrieve sport_name and o']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the student-athlete undergoing eligibility certification. Links to the student-athlete master record.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'The academic year for which this eligibility certification applies, formatted as YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024).']
  amateurism_certification_status varchar [note: 'Status of the student-athlete\'s amateurism certification, confirming they have not violated amateur status rules.']
  athletic_scholarship_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is receiving athletically-related financial aid during this certification period.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date when this eligibility certification was officially completed and approved by the certifying official.']
  certification_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or documentation related to this eligibility certification, including any special circumstances or conditions.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or reference number assigned to this eligibility certification event. May be used for tracking and audit purposes.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the eligibility certification process indicating whether the student-athlete has been certified, denied, or is awaiting review or waiver decision.']
  certification_term varchar [note: 'The specific academic term or period for which eligibility is certified (fall, spring, summer, or full academic year).']
  certification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this eligibility certification record was created in the system, representing the business event time of the certification action.']
  certifying_official_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the compliance staff member or faculty athletics representative who certified this eligibility determination.']
  compliance_hold_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a compliance hold has been placed on the student-athlete\'s eligibility pending resolution of a compliance issue.']
  compliance_hold_reason varchar [note: 'Description of the reason for any compliance hold placed on the student-athlete\'s eligibility.']
  credit_hours_enrolled decimal(5,2) [note: 'Number of credit hours in which the student-athlete is enrolled for the certification term.']
  cumulative_gpa decimal(4,3) [note: 'The student-athlete\'s cumulative grade point average at the time of certification.']
  degree_applicable_credits_earned decimal(6,2) [note: 'Total number of degree-applicable credit hours earned by the student-athlete toward their declared degree program.']
  degree_applicable_credits_required decimal(6,2) [note: 'Minimum number of degree-applicable credit hours required to be earned by this point in the student-athlete\'s academic career for eligibility certification.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'The competitive division level under which the student-athlete competes (NCAA Division I, II, III, NAIA, NJCAA, or other).']
  eligibility_year varchar [note: 'The year of eligibility being used by the student-athlete for this certification period (typically 1 through 5, representing freshman through fifth-year eligibility).']
  full_time_enrollment_verified boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the student-athlete\'s full-time enrollment status has been verified for the certification period.']
  gpa_requirement_met boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the student-athlete meets the minimum GPA requirement for eligibility.']
  initial_eligibility_certified_date date [note: 'Date when the student-athlete\'s initial eligibility was certified by the NCAA Eligibility Center or NAIA Eligibility Center upon first enrollment.']
  initial_eligibility_clearance_source varchar [note: 'The organization or process that provided initial eligibility clearance for the student-athlete (NCAA Eligibility Center, NAIA Eligibility Center, or institutional review).']
  medical_hardship_waiver_status varchar [note: 'Status of any medical hardship waiver request that may affect the student-athlete\'s eligibility or season of competition count.']
  minimum_credit_hours_met boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the student-athlete meets the minimum credit hour requirement for eligibility.']
  minimum_credit_hours_required decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum number of credit hours required for full-time enrollment status and eligibility certification based on NCAA or NAIA rules.']
  minimum_gpa_required decimal(4,3) [note: 'Minimum cumulative GPA required for eligibility certification based on NCAA or NAIA academic progress rules.']
  next_eligibility_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next eligibility review or certification for this student-athlete.']
  one_time_transfer_exception_used boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the student-athlete has used their one-time transfer exception allowing immediate eligibility after transfer.']
  progress_toward_degree_met boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the student-athlete meets the progress toward degree requirement for eligibility.']
  progress_toward_degree_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of degree requirements completed by the student-athlete at the time of certification, used to assess satisfactory academic progress.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this eligibility certification record was first inserted into the data system for audit and lineage tracking.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this eligibility certification record was last modified in the data system for audit and lineage tracking.']
  redshirt_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is using a redshirt year (practicing but not competing to preserve a year of eligibility).']
  seasons_competed varchar [note: 'Total number of seasons the student-athlete has competed in this sport prior to this certification period.']
  seasons_remaining varchar [note: 'Number of seasons of eligibility remaining for the student-athlete after this certification period.']
  term_gpa decimal(4,3) [note: 'The student-athlete\'s grade point average for the most recently completed term prior to certification.']
  transfer_eligibility_status varchar [note: 'Status of transfer eligibility clearance for student-athletes who transferred from another institution, indicating whether they are immediately eligible or subject to transfer restrictions.']
  transfer_institution_name varchar [note: 'Name of the previous institution from which the student-athlete transferred, if applicable.']
  transfer_student_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete is a transfer student from another institution, which may affect eligibility rules and certification requirements.']
  waiver_case_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number or identifier for any waiver case submitted on behalf of the student-athlete related to this eligibility certification.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of the formal NCAA or NAIA eligibility certification conducted for a student-athlete each academic year. Captures certification period (academic year/term), certifying official, certification status (certified/not certified/pending/waiver pending), eligibility year being used, full-time enrollment verification, minimum credit hour progress rule compliance, GPA compliance flag, transfer eligibility clearance status, initial eligibility clearance source (NCAA Eligibility Center/NAIA Eligibility Center), certification date, and any waiver case references.'
}

Table athletics.athletic_scholarship {
  athletic_scholarship_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the athletic scholarship award record.']
  expense_ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Scholarship expenses must post to specific general ledger accounts for financial statement preparation, EADA reporting (athletically-related student aid by gender), and NCAA financial reporting. Requi']
  financial_aid_award_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to aid.award. Business justification: Athletic scholarships are a type of financial aid award. This FK links athletic_scholarship to the aid award master, enabling unified financial aid tracking and compliance reporting (NCAA, Title IX, I']
  funding_finance_fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.finance_fund. Business justification: Athletic scholarships are funded from specific restricted endowments, unrestricted operating funds, or donor-designated funds. Required for fund accounting, donor stewardship reporting, endowment spen']
  nli_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.nli. Business justification: athletic_scholarship references nli_reference_number and nli_signed_date, indicating a relationship to the nli (National Letter of Intent) table. Adding nli_id FK enables JOIN to retrieve full NLI det']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Institutional scholarship policies govern award processes, renewal criteria, and reduction/cancellation procedures beyond NCAA minimums. Real business process: scholarship award approval workflow requ']
  primary_athletic_employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the compliance staff member who verified the scholarship award. Null if verification is pending.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Scholarship awards must comply with specific NCAA regulations (equivalency limits, counter rules, financial aid bylaws). Real business process: compliance officers verify each scholarship against spec']
  renewed_athletic_scholarship_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on athletic_scholarship (renewed_athletic_scholarship_id)']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  student_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.student_account. Business justification: Athletic scholarships post as credits to student billing accounts. Financial aid office reconciles athletic aid with account balances for compliance reporting, billing statement generation, and 1098-T']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the student-athlete receiving the scholarship award.']
  tuition_charge_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.tuition_charge. Business justification: Athletic scholarships offset specific tuition charges. Business must track which charges are covered by athletic aid for revenue recognition, 1098-T reporting, and NCAA compliance verification of scho']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'Academic year for which the scholarship is awarded, formatted as YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024).']
  aid_type varchar [note: 'Primary classification of the financial aid: athletic (based on athletic ability), academic (based on academic achievement), need_based (based on financial need), merit_based (based on non-athletic merit), or combined (multiple criteria).']
  appeal_decision_date date [note: 'Date when the final decision on the appeal was rendered. Null if appeal is pending or no appeal was filed.']
  appeal_filed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete has filed an appeal regarding scholarship reduction or cancellation (true) or no appeal has been filed (false).']
  appeal_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the student-athlete\'s appeal: pending (under review), approved (appeal granted), denied (appeal rejected), or withdrawn (appeal retracted by student-athlete). Null if no appeal has been filed.']
  award_approval_date date [note: 'Date when the scholarship award was officially approved by the authorized staff member or committee.']
  award_end_date date [note: 'Date when the scholarship award period ends. May be null for multi-year awards pending annual renewal.']
  award_start_date date [note: 'Date when the scholarship award period begins and financial aid becomes effective.']
  cancellation_date date [note: 'Date when the scholarship cancellation became effective. Null if no cancellation has occurred.']
  cancellation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship has been cancelled before the end of the award period (true) or remains in effect (false).']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation for why the scholarship was cancelled, including reference to applicable NCAA bylaws or institutional policies. Null if no cancellation has occurred.']
  compliance_verified_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance office completed verification of the scholarship award. Null if verification is pending.']
  compliance_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship has been verified by the compliance office to meet all NCAA/NAIA regulations and institutional policies (true) or verification is pending (false).']
  counter_exemption_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the scholarship is exempt from counting toward team limits (e.g., medical hardship waiver, academic honor award, need-based aid). Null if scholarship counts as a counter.']
  counter_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this scholarship counts toward the team\'s NCAA/NAIA equivalency or head count limit (true) or is exempt from counting (false).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the scholarship record was first created in the system.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'Athletic division level under which the scholarship is governed: NCAA Division I, II, or III, NAIA, or NJCAA (National Junior College Athletic Association).']
  equivalency_value decimal(5,4) [note: 'Numeric value representing the scholarship as a fraction of a full equivalency (e.g., 0.5000 for half scholarship, 1.0000 for full). Used for NCAA/NAIA equivalency limit calculations.']
  fund_source varchar [note: 'Source of funding for the scholarship (e.g., athletic department budget, endowment, donor-funded, institutional aid, conference grant).']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the scholarship record was last modified in the system.']
  multi_year_award_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship is a multi-year award guaranteed beyond a single academic year (true) or a one-year renewable award (false).']
  multi_year_duration_years varchar [note: 'Number of years for which a multi-year scholarship is guaranteed. Null for one-year renewable awards.']
  nli_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the National Letter of Intent signed by the student-athlete committing to the institution. Null if no NLI was signed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special conditions related to the scholarship award.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date when this version of the scholarship record became effective for reporting and compliance purposes.']
  reduction_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dollar amount by which the scholarship was reduced. Null if no reduction has occurred.']
  reduction_date date [note: 'Date when the scholarship reduction became effective. Null if no reduction has occurred.']
  reduction_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the scholarship award amount has been reduced during the award period (true) or remains at the original amount (false).']
  reduction_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation for why the scholarship was reduced, including reference to applicable NCAA bylaws or institutional policies. Null if no reduction has occurred.']
  renewal_status varchar [note: 'Status of scholarship renewal for the subsequent academic year: renewed (approved for continuation), not_renewed (not extended), pending_review (under evaluation), or ineligible (student-athlete does not meet renewal criteria).']
  scholarship_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the scholarship award: active (currently in effect), renewed (extended for another period), reduced (amount decreased), cancelled (terminated before completion), completed (award period ended normally), or pending (approved but not yet effective).']
  scholarship_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the scholarship award: full (covers full cost of attendance), partial (covers portion of costs), equivalency (counted toward team equivalency limit), or head_count (counted as one full scholarship regardless of amount).']

  Note: 'Master record for each athletic scholarship award granted to a student-athlete. Captures scholarship type (full/partial/equivalency), award amount, award period (academic year), sport, scholarship equivalency value, National Letter of Intent (NLI) reference, scholarship renewal status, reduction or cancellation flag, reason for reduction/cancellation, appeal status, counters toward team equivalency limit flag, and compliance with NCAA/NAIA scholarship limits.'
}

Table athletics.nli {
  nli_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the National Letter of Intent agreement record.']
  nli_compliance_officer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the athletics compliance officer who reviewed and certified the NLI for NCAA compliance.']
  nli_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member (coach or recruiting coordinator) who managed the recruitment and NLI process for this prospect.']
  prospect_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the recruiting prospect record if the athlete has not yet enrolled.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: National Letter of Intent process governed by specific NCAA regulations and NLI program rules. Real business process: compliance officers review NLI signings against specific regulatory requirements (']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  student_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.student_account. Business justification: National Letter of Intent commits institution to multi-year scholarship funding. Financial aid office links NLI to student account for tracking scholarship commitment fulfillment, ensuring promised ai']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the prospective student-athlete who signed the NLI agreement.']
  superseded_nli_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on nli (superseded_nli_id)']
  academic_year_commitment varchar [note: 'Academic year for which the prospective student-athlete commits to enroll and compete (e.g., 2024-2025).']
  compliance_certification_date date [note: 'Date on which the athletics compliance office certified that the NLI and recruitment process met all NCAA regulations.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'Athletic division level under which the NLI was signed.']
  document_number varchar [note: 'Official document number assigned to the signed NLI by the NCAA Eligibility Center or institutional athletics compliance office.']
  enrollment_term varchar [note: 'Academic term in which the student-athlete is expected to enroll under the NLI commitment.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the NLI commitment expires if the student-athlete does not enroll by the specified term.']
  initial_eligibility_status varchar [note: 'Status of the prospect\'s initial eligibility certification by the NCAA Eligibility Center at the time of NLI signing.']
  institutional_signatory_name varchar [note: 'Name of the institutional representative (typically Director of Athletics or designee) who signed the NLI on behalf of the institution.']
  institutional_signatory_title varchar [note: 'Official title of the institutional representative who signed the NLI (e.g., Director of Athletics, Compliance Officer).']
  institutional_signature_date date [note: 'Date on which the institutional representative signed the NLI, completing the binding agreement.']
  ncaa_eligibility_center_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned to the prospective student-athlete by the NCAA Eligibility Center for tracking initial eligibility certification.']
  nli_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the NLI agreement indicating whether it is active, voided, released, expired, or pending institutional acceptance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special circumstances related to the NLI agreement, including any exceptions or unique conditions.']
  parent_guardian_signature_date date [note: 'Date on which the parent or legal guardian signed the NLI, if required.']
  parent_guardian_signature_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a parent or legal guardian signature was required on the NLI due to the prospect being a minor at the time of signing.']
  penalty_waiver_date date [note: 'Date on which the penalty waiver decision was rendered by the NCAA or institutional authority.']
  penalty_waiver_status varchar [note: 'Status of any waiver request to reduce or eliminate penalties associated with breaking the NLI commitment.']
  program_year varchar [note: 'NCAA NLI program year under which the agreement was executed, governing the applicable rules and regulations.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier of the person or process that created the NLI record.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the NLI record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier of the person or process that last updated the NLI record.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the NLI record was last modified in the system.']
  release_approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the institution approved or denied the student-athlete\'s release request.']
  release_approval_status varchar [note: 'Status of the institutional decision on the student-athlete\'s request for release from the NLI.']
  release_conditions varchar [note: 'Any conditions or restrictions placed on the release from the NLI (e.g., restrictions on contacting specific institutions, geographic limitations).']
  release_request_date date [note: 'Date on which the student-athlete formally requested release from the NLI commitment.']
  release_request_reason varchar [note: 'Documented reason provided by the student-athlete for requesting release from the NLI (e.g., coaching change, personal circumstances, academic program unavailability).']
  scholarship_duration_years decimal(3,1) [note: 'Number of years for which the athletic scholarship is guaranteed under the NLI agreement.']
  scholarship_offered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an athletic scholarship was offered as part of the NLI agreement.']
  scholarship_type varchar [note: 'Type of athletic scholarship offered (full, partial, or none) as part of the NLI commitment.']
  signing_date date [note: 'Date on which the prospective student-athlete signed the National Letter of Intent.']
  signing_period varchar [note: 'Designated NCAA signing period during which the NLI was executed (Early, Regular, or Late).']
  void_date date [note: 'Date on which the NLI was officially voided.']
  void_reason varchar [note: 'Documented reason for voiding the NLI (e.g., failure to meet admission requirements, NCAA eligibility issues, institutional program discontinuation).']

  Note: 'Master record for a National Letter of Intent (NLI) agreement signed by a prospective student-athlete committing to attend the institution. Captures prospect/student-athlete reference, sport, signing date, academic year of enrollment commitment, NLI status (signed/voided/released/expired), release request date, release approval status, penalty waiver status, NLI program year, and institutional signatory. Governs the binding commitment between the institution and the prospective athlete.'
}

Table athletics.recruit {
  recruit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the prospective student-athlete recruit record. Primary key.']
  assigned_recruiting_coach_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the coaching staff member assigned as the primary recruiter for this prospect.']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.sport. Business justification: recruit is being recruited for a specific sport. Currently uses sport_code/sport_name but lacks FK to sport master table. Adding sport_id enables JOIN to retrieve sport_name and other sport attributes']
  transfer_recruit_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on recruit (transfer_recruit_id)']
  academic_eligibility_status varchar [note: 'Pre-screening status of the prospect\'s academic eligibility for NCAA competition based on high school coursework and standardized test scores.']
  act_score varchar [note: 'Prospect\'s ACT composite score, used in conjunction with GPA for NCAA initial eligibility determination.']
  first_contact_date date [note: 'Date of the initial permissible contact between coaching staff and the prospect.']
  gpa decimal(3,2) [note: 'Cumulative high school grade point average of the prospect on a 4.0 scale, used for initial eligibility determination.']
  height_inches varchar [note: 'Prospect\'s height measured in total inches, relevant for sport-specific evaluation.']
  high_school_city varchar [note: 'City where the prospect\'s high school or secondary institution is located.']
  high_school_graduation_year varchar [note: 'Year the prospect is expected to graduate from high school or secondary institution.']
  high_school_name varchar [note: 'Name of the high school, preparatory school, or junior college the prospect currently attends or most recently attended.']
  high_school_state_province varchar [note: 'State or province where the prospect\'s high school or secondary institution is located.']
  last_contact_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent permissible contact between coaching staff and the prospect or their family.']
  national_letter_of_intent_signed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect has signed a National Letter of Intent committing to the institution.']
  nli_signed_date date [note: 'Date on which the prospect signed the National Letter of Intent, if applicable.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and observations from coaching staff regarding the prospect\'s skills, character, fit, and recruiting interactions.']
  official_visit_count varchar [note: 'Number of official visits the prospect has taken to the institution. NCAA limits official visits per sport and division.']
  position varchar [note: 'Primary playing position or role of the prospective student-athlete within the sport (e.g., Point Guard, Setter, Midfielder).']
  prospect_address_line1 varchar [note: 'Street address line 1 of the prospective student-athlete\'s residence.']
  prospect_city varchar [note: 'City of the prospective student-athlete\'s residence.']
  prospect_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code of the prospective student-athlete\'s residence (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX).']
  prospect_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for contacting the prospective student-athlete during the recruiting process.']
  prospect_first_name varchar [note: 'First or given name of the prospective student-athlete being recruited.']
  prospect_last_name varchar [note: 'Last or family name of the prospective student-athlete being recruited.']
  prospect_middle_name varchar [note: 'Middle name or initial of the prospective student-athlete, if applicable.']
  prospect_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for contacting the prospective student-athlete or their guardian.']
  prospect_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the prospective student-athlete\'s residence.']
  prospect_rating varchar [note: 'Recruiting service rating or ranking assigned to the prospect (e.g., 5-star, 4-star, 3-star, or numerical ranking).']
  prospect_state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the prospective student-athlete\'s residence.']
  rating_source varchar [note: 'Name of the recruiting service or organization that provided the prospect rating (e.g., 247Sports, Rivals, ESPN).']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this recruit record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this recruit record was last modified.']
  recruiting_class_year varchar [note: 'Academic year in which the prospect is expected to enroll and begin competing (e.g., 2025 for Fall 2025 enrollment).']
  recruiting_status varchar [note: 'Current stage of the recruiting process for this prospect. Tracks progression from initial identification through commitment or withdrawal. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: identified|contacted|evaluated|offered|committed|signed|declined|withdrawn — promote to reference product]']
  recruiting_status_date date [note: 'Date when the current recruiting status was assigned or last updated.']
  recruiting_territory varchar [note: 'Geographic region or territory assigned to the recruiting coach responsible for this prospect (e.g., Southeast, Midwest, California).']
  sat_score varchar [note: 'Prospect\'s SAT composite score, used in conjunction with GPA for NCAA initial eligibility determination.']
  scholarship_offer_date date [note: 'Date on which an athletic scholarship offer was extended to the prospect, if applicable.']
  scholarship_offer_extended boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an athletic scholarship offer has been extended to the prospect.']
  unofficial_visit_count varchar [note: 'Number of unofficial visits the prospect has made to the institution at their own expense.']
  weight_pounds varchar [note: 'Prospect\'s weight measured in pounds, relevant for sport-specific evaluation.']

  Note: 'Master record for a prospective student-athlete being actively recruited by the athletics department. Captures prospect identity, sport of interest, recruiting class year, recruiting status (identified/contacted/evaluated/offered/committed/signed/declined/withdrawn), position, high school or junior college, graduation year, academic eligibility pre-screening status, official visit count, unofficial visit count, recruiting territory, assigned recruiting coach, and prospect rating/ranking source.'
}

Table athletics.recruiting_contact {
  recruiting_contact_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each recruiting contact interaction record. Primary key for the recruiting contact transaction.']
  followup_recruiting_contact_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on recruiting_contact (followup_recruiting_contact_id)']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Institutional recruiting policies may impose restrictions beyond NCAA rules (e.g., contact approval processes, prohibited activities). Real business process: compliance officers review recruiting acti']
  primary_recruiting_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the athletics staff member (coach, recruiting coordinator, or authorized personnel) who initiated or conducted the recruiting contact.']
  prospect_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the prospective student-athlete who was contacted or evaluated during this recruiting interaction.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Recruiting contacts must comply with specific NCAA recruiting bylaws (contact periods, evaluation periods, dead periods, contact limits). Real business process: compliance officers monitor recruiting ']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.sport. Business justification: recruiting_contact is made in context of recruiting for a specific sport. Currently uses sport_code but lacks FK to sport master table. Adding sport_id enables JOIN to retrieve full sport details. No ']
  tertiary_recruiting_record_created_by_staff_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member who created this recruiting contact record in the system. May be the coach who made the contact or administrative staff entering data.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'The academic year during which the recruiting contact occurred (e.g., 2023-2024). Used for annual compliance reporting and recruiting cycle analysis.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator that a potential compliance issue or violation was identified with this recruiting contact. Triggers further review by compliance staff.']
  compliance_flag_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of why a compliance flag was raised, including the specific NCAA bylaw or institutional policy that may have been violated.']
  contact_city varchar [note: 'City where the in-person recruiting contact or evaluation took place. Used for travel expense tracking and compliance documentation.']
  contact_date date [note: 'The calendar date on which the recruiting contact or communication occurred. Critical for compliance tracking against recruiting period rules.']
  contact_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Length of the recruiting contact in minutes. Particularly important for phone calls and in-person meetings where duration limits may apply.']
  contact_location varchar [note: 'Physical location or venue where the contact occurred (e.g., high school campus, prospect\'s home, athletics facility, tournament site). Required for in-person contacts and evaluations.']
  contact_medium varchar [note: 'The communication channel or platform used for the contact (e.g., phone, mobile, email, in-person, social media, video conference, mail). Distinct from contact type which describes the interaction nature. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: phone|mobile|email|in_person|social_media|video_conference|mail — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  contact_notes varchar [note: 'Detailed confidential notes about the recruiting contact, including conversation highlights, prospect questions, family concerns, and coaching staff observations.']
  contact_state varchar [note: 'State or province where the in-person recruiting contact or evaluation occurred. Part of geographic recruiting analysis and compliance tracking.']
  contact_subject varchar [note: 'Brief subject or topic of the recruiting communication (e.g., scholarship offer discussion, campus visit invitation, academic program overview, team culture introduction).']
  contact_time timestamp [note: 'Precise date and time when the recruiting contact or communication took place, used for detailed compliance audit trails.']
  contact_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the recruiting interaction method. Determines permissibility rules under NCAA bylaws (e.g., phone call, text message, email, in-person evaluation, official visit, unofficial visit, campus tour, social media message, video call). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: phone_call|text_message|email|in_person_evaluation|official_visit|unofficial_visit|campus_tour|social_media_message|video_call — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  evaluation_notes varchar [note: 'Confidential notes recorded by the coaching staff regarding the prospect\'s athletic performance, character, academic standing, or fit with the program. Used for internal recruiting decisions.']
  evaluation_type varchar [note: 'For evaluation contacts, specifies the type of athletic activity being observed (e.g., game, practice, workout, combine, camp, showcase). Used to track evaluation opportunities against NCAA limits.']
  family_members_present varchar [note: 'Names or relationship descriptions of family members who participated in or were present during the recruiting contact (e.g., mother, father, guardian, sibling).']
  high_school_coach_present boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect\'s high school or club coach was present during the recruiting contact or evaluation.']
  initiator_role varchar [note: 'The official role or title of the staff member who made the contact. Important for compliance as different roles have different recruiting privileges under NCAA rules.']
  next_contact_planned_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next planned recruiting contact or follow-up with this prospect. Used for recruiting workflow management.']
  offer_extended boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal scholarship offer or roster spot commitment was extended to the prospect during this contact.']
  offer_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the scholarship or roster offer extended (e.g., full scholarship, partial scholarship, preferred walk-on, recruited walk-on).']
  official_visit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this contact was part of an official visit paid for by the institution. Official visits are limited in number and subject to strict NCAA regulations.']
  permissibility_review_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance office reviewed and determined the permissibility status of this recruiting contact.']
  permissibility_status varchar [note: 'Compliance determination indicating whether the recruiting contact was permissible under NCAA rules, impermissible (violation), under review by compliance office, or waived through exception process.']
  prospect_family_present boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect\'s family members (parents, guardians, or legal representatives) were present during the recruiting contact. Important for compliance documentation.']
  prospect_interest_level varchar [note: 'Coaching staff\'s assessment of the prospect\'s interest level in the program following this contact (high, medium, low, undecided, committed elsewhere). Used for recruiting pipeline management.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when this recruiting contact record was first created in the athletics compliance system. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when this recruiting contact record was last modified. Tracks changes to compliance status, notes, or other fields.']
  recruiting_class_year varchar [note: 'The expected high school graduation year or recruiting class year of the prospect (e.g., 2024, 2025). Used to organize recruiting efforts by class cohort.']
  recruiting_period_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the recruiting calendar period during which the contact occurred. NCAA defines four period types: contact period (in-person and off-campus contact allowed), evaluation period (in-person evaluation only, no contact), quiet period (on-campus contact only), dead period (no in-person contact).']
  scholarship_discussed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether athletic scholarship opportunities or financial aid were discussed during this recruiting contact. Important for tracking offer timelines and compliance.']
  unofficial_visit_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this contact occurred during an unofficial visit where the prospect visited campus at their own expense.']
  visit_end_date date [note: 'For official or unofficial visits, the date the campus visit concluded. Used to calculate total visit duration for compliance purposes.']
  visit_start_date date [note: 'For official or unofficial visits, the date the campus visit began. Used to track visit duration and compliance with 48-hour official visit limits.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of each permissible recruiting contact or communication between athletics staff and a prospective student-athlete or their family. Captures recruit reference, contact date, contact type (phone call/text/email/in-person evaluation/official visit/unofficial visit/campus tour), contact initiator, contact medium, permissibility status (permissible/impermissible), sport, recruiting period classification (quiet/contact/dead/evaluation), and any compliance flag raised.'
}

Table athletics.official_visit {
  official_visit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the official visit record. Primary key.']
  expense_cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Recruiting visit expenses are charged to team/sport cost centers for budget tracking and variance analysis. Enables athletic directors to monitor recruiting spending by sport against budgeted amounts ']
  expense_ledger_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ledger_account. Business justification: Official visit expenses (transportation, lodging, meals, entertainment tracked in total_visit_cost) must post to recruiting expense GL accounts for financial reporting and NCAA compliance. Required fo']
  host_student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the current student-athlete assigned to host the prospect during the visit.']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.policy. Business justification: Institutional visit policies govern approval processes, expense reimbursement, and entertainment restrictions. Real business process: visit pre-approval requires verification against institutional pol']
  primary_official_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the athletics staff member coordinating this official visit.']
  prospect_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the prospective student-athlete being recruited.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Official visits governed by specific NCAA regulations (48-hour rule, expense limits, entertainment restrictions). Real business process: compliance pre-approval and post-certification of visits requir']
  rescheduled_official_visit_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on official_visit (rescheduled_official_visit_id)']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  tertiary_official_compliance_post_certified_by_staff_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the compliance staff member who certified the visit post-completion.']
  academic_meeting_included_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether meetings with academic advisors or faculty were included in the official visit.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'Academic year during which the official visit takes place (e.g., 2023-2024).']
  accompanying_parent_guardian_count varchar [note: 'Number of parents or legal guardians accompanying the prospect on the official visit (NCAA allows institution to pay for up to two).']
  accompanying_spouse_count varchar [note: 'Number of spouses accompanying the prospect on the official visit (applicable for graduate transfers or older prospects).']
  athletic_event_attendance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the prospect attended an athletic event during the official visit.']
  athletic_facilities_tour_included_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a tour of athletic facilities was included in the official visit itinerary.']
  campus_tour_included_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a campus tour was included in the official visit itinerary.']
  compliance_post_certification_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance office certified the official visit as compliant after completion.']
  compliance_post_certification_status varchar [note: 'Status of compliance office post-visit certification confirming all expenses and activities were within NCAA regulations.']
  compliance_pre_approval_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance office approved the official visit to proceed.']
  compliance_pre_approval_status varchar [note: 'Status of compliance office pre-approval for the official visit before it occurs.']
  compliance_violation_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of any compliance violations identified related to this official visit.']
  compliance_violation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any NCAA compliance violations were identified during or after the official visit.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all expense amounts. Typically USD for U.S. institutions.']
  division_level varchar [note: 'Athletic division level of the institution conducting the official visit.']
  entertainment_expense_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount paid by the institution for entertainment activities during the official visit (tickets to athletic events, campus activities, etc.).']
  itinerary_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the planned activities and schedule for the official visit.']
  lodging_expense_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount paid by the institution for the prospect\'s lodging during the official visit.']
  meals_expense_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount paid by the institution for meals provided to the prospect during the official visit.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this official visit record was first created in the system.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'Date from which this official visit record is effective for reporting and compliance purposes.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this official visit record was last updated in the system.']
  recruiting_period_type varchar [note: 'Type of NCAA recruiting period during which the official visit occurs (contact, evaluation, quiet, or dead period).']
  total_visit_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cost of the official visit paid by the institution, including all allowable expenses.']
  transportation_expense_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount paid by the institution for the prospect\'s transportation to and from campus (airfare, mileage, etc.).']
  visit_end_date date [note: 'Date when the official visit ends. Must be within 48 hours of start date per NCAA regulations.']
  visit_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise date and time when the official visit ends, used for 48-hour compliance tracking.']
  visit_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments about the official visit from recruiting staff or compliance office.']
  visit_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of this official visit for the prospect (NCAA allows up to 5 official visits per prospect across all institutions).']
  visit_start_date date [note: 'Date when the official visit begins. NCAA official visits may not exceed 48 hours.']
  visit_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise date and time when the official visit begins, used for 48-hour compliance tracking.']
  visit_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the official visit in its lifecycle.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an official paid campus visit by a prospective student-athlete, funded by the institution under NCAA/NAIA regulations. Captures recruit reference, sport, visit start date, visit end date, visit number (1st through 5th for NCAA), expenses paid (transportation/lodging/meals/entertainment), total visit cost, host student-athlete assigned, compliance pre-approval status, and post-visit compliance certification.'
}

Table athletics.game {
  game_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the athletic contest. Primary key.']
  athletic_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the facility record where the game is played.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member who certified the game result.']
  rescheduled_game_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the new game record if this game was rescheduled.']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  team_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the institutional team participating in this game.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'Academic year in which the game occurs (e.g., 2024-2025).']
  attendance varchar [note: 'Number of spectators who attended the game.']
  away_team_score varchar [note: 'Final score for the away team. Null if game not completed.']
  broadcast_network varchar [note: 'Television or streaming network broadcasting the game (e.g., ESPN, CBS Sports, conference network).']
  broadcast_type varchar [note: 'Type of media broadcast for the game (television, streaming, radio, none).']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the game was cancelled or postponed (e.g., weather, facility issue, COVID-19).']
  conference_game_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this game counts toward conference standings (True/False).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the game record was first created in the system in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format.']
  datetime timestamp [note: 'Combined scheduled date and time of the game as a timestamp in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format.']
  game_date date [note: 'Scheduled date of the athletic contest in yyyy-MM-dd format.']
  game_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the game, often used in schedules and communications (e.g., G-2024-001).']
  game_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the game in its lifecycle (scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled, postponed, forfeited).']
  game_time timestamp [note: 'Scheduled start time of the game (e.g., 7:00 PM, 14:30).']
  game_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the game (regular season, conference, non-conference, exhibition, scrimmage, postseason, tournament).']
  head_official_name varchar [note: 'Name of the head referee or umpire for the game.']
  home_away_neutral varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the game is played at the institutional home venue, away, or at a neutral site.']
  home_team_score varchar [note: 'Final score for the home team. Null if game not completed.']
  institutional_score varchar [note: 'Final score for the institution\'s team (home or away). Null if game not completed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments about the game (e.g., notable performances, records broken, special circumstances).']
  officials_assigned varchar [note: 'Names of referees, umpires, or officials assigned to the game (comma-separated list).']
  opponent_institution_code varchar [note: 'Standard code identifying the opposing institution (e.g., IPEDS UnitID or NCAA institution code).']
  opponent_name varchar [note: 'Name of the opposing team or institution (e.g., University of Michigan, Ohio State).']
  opponent_score varchar [note: 'Final score for the opposing team. Null if game not completed.']
  outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the game from the institutional team\'s perspective (win, loss, tie, no contest, forfeit win, forfeit loss).']
  overtime_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the game went into overtime or extra innings (True/False).']
  overtime_periods varchar [note: 'Number of overtime periods or extra innings played.']
  result_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the game result has been officially certified by athletics administration (True/False).']
  result_certified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the game result was officially certified in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format.']
  season varchar [note: 'Athletic season designation (e.g., Fall 2024, Spring 2025, 2024-2025).']
  ticket_revenue decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenue generated from ticket sales for this game in US dollars.']
  tournament_name varchar [note: 'Name of the tournament if the game is part of a tournament (e.g., NCAA Division I Championship, Conference Tournament).']
  tournament_round varchar [note: 'Round designation within a tournament (e.g., First Round, Quarterfinals, Semifinals, Finals).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the game record was last updated in the system in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format.']
  venue_city varchar [note: 'City where the game venue is located.']
  venue_name varchar [note: 'Name of the facility where the game is played (e.g., Memorial Stadium, Alumni Arena).']
  venue_state varchar [note: 'State or province where the game venue is located (two-letter abbreviation).']
  weather_conditions varchar [note: 'Weather conditions at game time for outdoor events (e.g., sunny, rainy, temperature).']

  Note: 'Master record for each scheduled athletic contest (game, match, meet, regatta, tournament bout) for an institutional team. Captures team reference, opponent name, opponent institution code, game date, game time, venue, home/away/neutral site designation, game type (regular season/conference/non-conference/exhibition/scrimmage/postseason/tournament), game status (scheduled/completed/cancelled/postponed/forfeited), final score (home/away), outcome (win/loss/tie/no contest), attendance, broadcast information, and officials assigned.'
}

Table athletics.game_participation {
  game_participation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each student-athlete participation record in a specific game or contest. Primary key for the game participation entity.']
  amended_game_participation_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on game_participation (amended_game_participation_id)']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member (coach, athletic trainer, compliance officer) who recorded this participation record. Links to the staff master record.']
  game_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific game or contest in which the student-athlete participated. Links to the game master record.']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student-athlete who participated in this game. Links to the student_athlete master record.']
  team_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the team for which the student-athlete participated in this game. Links to the team master record.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'Academic year during which the game was played (e.g., 2023-2024). Used for eligibility tracking and compliance reporting.']
  aces varchar [note: 'Total aces served by the student-athlete in this match. Applicable to volleyball and tennis.']
  assists varchar [note: 'Total assists credited to the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to basketball, soccer, hockey, lacrosse.']
  blocks varchar [note: 'Total blocks recorded by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to volleyball and basketball.']
  competition_level varchar [note: 'Level of competition for this game. Determines whether the game counts toward NCAA eligibility and season-of-competition limits.']
  counts_toward_eligibility_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this game participation counts toward the student-athletes season of competition for NCAA eligibility purposes. True if counts, False otherwise.']
  disciplinary_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of any disciplinary action taken against the student-athlete during or as a result of this game.']
  disciplinary_action_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any disciplinary action was taken against the student-athlete during or as a result of this game. True if action taken, False otherwise.']
  ejection_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete was ejected from the game. True if ejected, False otherwise. Critical for NCAA compliance and disciplinary tracking.']
  ejection_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed reason for ejection if the student-athlete was ejected from the game. Includes rule violation description and referee notes.']
  fouls_committed varchar [note: 'Total fouls committed by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to basketball, soccer, and other contact sports.']
  goals_scored varchar [note: 'Total goals scored by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to soccer, hockey, lacrosse, water polo.']
  hits varchar [note: 'Total hits recorded by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to baseball and softball.']
  injury_description varchar [note: 'Brief description of the injury sustained during this game. Protected health information subject to HIPAA and FERPA restrictions.']
  injury_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete sustained an injury during this game. True if injured, False otherwise. Critical for medical tracking and eligibility.']
  innings_played decimal(4,1) [note: 'Number of innings the student-athlete participated in during the game. Applicable to baseball and softball.']
  jersey_number varchar [note: 'Jersey number worn by the student-athlete during this game. May differ from roster jersey number in some sports.']
  kills varchar [note: 'Total kills recorded by the student-athlete in this match. Applicable to volleyball.']
  medical_clearance_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether medical clearance is required before the student-athlete can participate in future games. True if clearance required, False otherwise.']
  minutes_played decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total minutes the student-athlete participated in the game. Applicable to sports with timed play (basketball, soccer, hockey, lacrosse).']
  participation_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments regarding the student-athletes participation in this game. May include coaching observations, special circumstances, or compliance notes.']
  participation_status varchar [note: 'Status indicating whether and how the student-athlete participated in the game. Critical for NCAA compliance reporting and eligibility tracking.']
  points_scored varchar [note: 'Total points scored by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to basketball, football (via touchdowns), track and field scoring systems.']
  position_played varchar [note: 'Primary position the student-athlete played during this game. Sport-specific position codes (e.g., QB, PG, MF, P).']
  rebounds varchar [note: 'Total rebounds (offensive and defensive combined) by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to basketball.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this game participation record was first created in the system. Critical for audit trail and compliance verification.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this game participation record was last updated in the system. Critical for audit trail and compliance verification.']
  red_cards varchar [note: 'Number of red cards received by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to soccer and other sports using card systems.']
  runs_batted_in varchar [note: 'Total runs batted in by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to baseball and softball.']
  saves varchar [note: 'Total saves made by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to goalkeepers in soccer, hockey, lacrosse, water polo.']
  season varchar [note: 'Academic season during which the game was played. Critical for NCAA eligibility clock and season-of-competition tracking.']
  sets_played varchar [note: 'Number of sets the student-athlete participated in during the match. Applicable to volleyball and tennis.']
  starter_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete was in the starting lineup for this game. True if starter, False if substitute or did not play.']
  strikeouts varchar [note: 'Total strikeouts recorded by the student-athlete in this game. For pitchers in baseball and softball, or batters who struck out.']
  touchdowns varchar [note: 'Total touchdowns scored by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to football.']
  yards_gained varchar [note: 'Total yards gained by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to football (rushing, passing, receiving yards).']
  yellow_cards varchar [note: 'Number of yellow cards received by the student-athlete in this game. Applicable to soccer and other sports using card systems.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing each student-athlete\'s participation in a specific game or contest. Captures student-athlete reference, game reference, participation status (played/did not play/injured/suspended/ineligible), starter flag, minutes played or sets played, position played, individual statistics summary (sport-specific: points, rebounds, assists, yards, goals, times, etc.), and any disciplinary action during the contest.'
}

Table athletics.practice_session {
  practice_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the practice session record. Primary key.']
  athletic_facility_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.athletic_facility. Business justification: practice_session has facility_id but this appears to point to a generic facility table. Since practice sessions are athletics-specific and athletic_facility exists as the domain-specific facility mast']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the compliance staff member who certified this practice session record.']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the athletic facility where the practice session was conducted.']
  makeup_practice_session_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on practice_session (makeup_practice_session_id)']
  primary_practice_head_coach_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the head coach responsible for supervising this practice session.']
  team_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the team conducting this practice session.']
  academic_year varchar [note: 'The academic year during which the practice session occurred, formatted as YYYY-YYYY (e.g., 2023-2024).']
  attendance_count varchar [note: 'Number of student-athletes who attended this practice session.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the practice session was cancelled or postponed, if applicable.']
  cara_countable_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session counts toward the weekly and seasonal NCAA CARA hour limits (20 hours per week, 8 hours per week out-of-season).']
  competition_preparation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session was specifically focused on preparing for an upcoming competition or game.']
  compliance_certification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the practice session was certified as compliant by athletics compliance staff.']
  compliance_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session has been reviewed and certified as compliant with NCAA CARA hour regulations.']
  compliance_review_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session requires additional compliance review due to unusual circumstances or potential rule violations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this practice session record was first created in the system.']
  duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total duration of the practice session in hours, calculated from start and end times. Used for NCAA CARA hour tracking.']
  heat_index varchar [note: 'Calculated heat index during the practice session, combining temperature and humidity for heat illness risk assessment.']
  injury_count varchar [note: 'Number of injuries that occurred during this practice session.']
  injury_occurred_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any student-athlete injury occurred during this practice session.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this practice session record was most recently modified.']
  mandatory_attendance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether attendance at this practice session was mandatory for all eligible team members.']
  medical_staff_present_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether athletic training or medical staff were present during the practice session for injury prevention and response.']
  opponent_scouting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session included film review or scouting of an upcoming opponent.']
  practice_date date [note: 'The calendar date on which the practice session occurred. Principal business event timestamp for this transaction.']
  practice_end_time timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when the practice session concluded, used for precise CARA hour calculation.']
  practice_focus varchar [note: 'Primary focus or objective of the practice session (e.g., offensive drills, defensive strategy, conditioning, scrimmage).']
  practice_intensity_level varchar [note: 'Subjective assessment of the overall intensity level of the practice session.']
  practice_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes about the practice session, including coaching observations, special circumstances, or compliance annotations.']
  practice_session_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the practice session, typically formatted as season-team-sequence (e.g., 2024-FB-001).']
  practice_start_time timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when the practice session began, used for precise CARA hour calculation.']
  practice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the practice session.']
  practice_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the practice activity type. Determines whether the session counts toward NCAA CARA hour limits.']
  record_effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this practice session record is considered effective for reporting and compliance purposes.']
  scrimmage_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this practice session included a scrimmage or simulated game situation.']
  season_designation varchar [note: 'Designation of the competitive season phase during which the practice occurred. Affects CARA hour limits and compliance rules.']
  temperature_fahrenheit varchar [note: 'Ambient temperature in degrees Fahrenheit during the practice session, used for heat safety monitoring.']
  term_code varchar [note: 'The academic term code during which the practice session occurred (e.g., 202401 for Spring 2024).']
  video_recorded_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether video footage of the practice session was recorded for coaching review and player development.']
  weather_condition varchar [note: 'Description of weather conditions during outdoor practice sessions, relevant for safety and performance tracking.']
  weekly_cara_hours_accumulated decimal(5,2) [note: 'Running total of CARA hours accumulated for the team during the calendar week containing this practice session. Used to monitor compliance with the 20-hour weekly limit.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a scheduled team practice session, used for NCAA countable athletically related activity (CARA) hour tracking. Captures team reference, practice date, start time, end time, duration in hours, practice type (team practice/individual workout/film session/walk-through/conditioning/weight training/competition preparation), CARA countable flag, weekly CARA hour accumulation, in-season vs out-of-season designation, and coach supervisor.'
}
