Business justification: EADA reporting mandated by specific federal regulation (Equity in Athletics Disclosure Act, 20 U.S.C. 1092(e)). Real business process: annual EADA submission must reference the specific regulatory req']
  athletics_director_email varchar [note: 'Official email address of the Director of Athletics for EADA reporting correspondence.']
  athletics_director_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the Director of Athletics responsible for the athletics program during the reporting year.']
  athletics_director_phone varchar [note: 'Official phone number of the Director of Athletics for EADA reporting correspondence.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date when the chief executive officer or designee certified the accuracy of the EADA report data.']
  certified_by_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the institutional official who certified the EADA report (typically the president or chancellor).']
  certified_by_title varchar [note: 'Official title of the person who certified the EADA report.']
  coeducational_athletically_related_student_aid decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total athletically related student aid awarded to student-athletes in coeducational teams where applicable.']
  coeducational_operating_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total operating expenses for coeducational teams where applicable.']
  coeducational_participants varchar [note: 'Total count of student-athletes participating in coeducational sports teams where applicable.']
  coeducational_recruiting_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total recruiting expenses for coeducational teams where applicable.']
  coeducational_revenues decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenues generated by or allocated to coeducational teams where applicable.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the EADA report record was first created in the system.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the EADA report record was last modified.']
  mens_assistant_coach_salaries_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total salaries and bonuses paid to all assistant coaches of mens teams during the reporting year.']
  mens_athletically_related_student_aid decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of athletically related student aid awarded to male student-athletes during the reporting year.']
  mens_head_coach_salaries_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total salaries and bonuses paid to all head coaches of mens teams during the reporting year.']
  mens_operating_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total operating expenses for mens teams including travel, equipment, uniforms, and game expenses.']
  mens_recruiting_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total expenses incurred for recruiting prospective student-athletes for mens teams.']
  mens_total_revenues decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenues generated by or allocated to mens athletics programs including ticket sales, media rights, donations, and institutional support.']
  report_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, clarifications, or contextual information about the EADA report data or submission.']
  report_preparer_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the staff member who prepared the EADA report for follow-up questions.']
  report_preparer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the staff member who prepared the EADA report data.']
  report_preparer_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the staff member who prepared the EADA report for follow-up questions.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'The academic year for which athletics data is being reported in YYYY format (e.g., 2023 represents the 2022-2023 academic year).']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date when the EADA report was officially submitted to the U.S. Department of Education.']
  submission_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the EADA report in the submission workflow to the U.S. Department of Education.']
  total_athletics_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Combined total expenses for the entire intercollegiate athletics program including both mens and womens sports.']
  total_athletics_revenues decimal(15,2) [note: 'Combined total revenues for the entire intercollegiate athletics program including both mens and womens sports.']
  total_female_assistant_coaches varchar [note: 'Total count of female assistant coaches for all mens and womens teams.']
  total_female_head_coaches varchar [note: 'Total count of female head coaches for all mens and womens teams.']
  total_female_participants varchar [note: 'Total unduplicated count of female student-athletes who participated in intercollegiate athletics during the reporting year.']
  total_male_assistant_coaches varchar [note: 'Total count of male assistant coaches for all mens and womens teams.']
  total_male_head_coaches varchar [note: 'Total count of male head coaches for all mens and womens teams.']
  total_male_participants varchar [note: 'Total unduplicated count of male student-athletes who participated in intercollegiate athletics during the reporting year.']
  womens_assistant_coach_salaries_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total salaries and bonuses paid to all assistant coaches of womens teams during the reporting year.']
  womens_athletically_related_student_aid decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of athletically related student aid awarded to female student-athletes during the reporting year.']
  womens_head_coach_salaries_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total salaries and bonuses paid to all head coaches of womens teams during the reporting year.']
  womens_operating_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total operating expenses for womens teams including travel, equipment, uniforms, and game expenses.']
  womens_recruiting_expenses decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total expenses incurred for recruiting prospective student-athletes for womens teams.']
  womens_total_revenues decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenues generated by or allocated to womens athletics programs including ticket sales, media rights, donations, and institutional support.']

  Note: 'Annual Equity in Athletics Disclosure Act (EADA) report record capturing the federally mandated gender equity and financial data submission for the institution\'s athletics program. Captures reporting year, total male/female participation counts by sport, coaching staff counts and salaries by gender and sport, operating expenses by sport and gender, recruiting expenses, athletically related student aid by sport and gender, revenues by sport, and submission status to the U.S. Department of Education.'
}

Table athletics.sports_medicine_case {
  sports_medicine_case_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sports medicine case record. Primary key for the sports medicine case entity.']
  primary_sports_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the certified athletic trainer who is the primary care provider for this sports medicine case.']
  quaternary_sports_record_updated_by_staff_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member who last updated this sports medicine case record.']
  related_sports_medicine_case_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sports_medicine_case (related_sports_medicine_case_id)']
  research_irb_protocol_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.irb_protocol. Business justification: Links medical cases enrolled in IRB-approved research studies (injury prevention trials, treatment efficacy studies, longitudinal health tracking). Required for research compliance, protocol enrollmen']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student-athlete who is the subject of this sports medicine case. Links to the student-athlete master record.']
  tertiary_sports_cleared_by_physician_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the physician who provided final medical clearance for return to play.']
  body_part varchar [note: 'Specific body part or anatomical region affected by the injury or condition (e.g., knee, shoulder, ankle, head, lower back).']
  body_side varchar [note: 'Laterality of the injury indicating which side of the body is affected (left, right, bilateral, central, not applicable).']
  case_closed_date date [note: 'Date when the sports medicine case was officially closed, indicating the student-athlete has fully recovered or the case is no longer active.']
  case_notes varchar [note: 'Additional clinical notes, observations, or administrative comments related to the sports medicine case.']
  case_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the sports medicine case, typically formatted with sport code prefix and sequential number for tracking and reference purposes.']
  case_opened_date date [note: 'Date when the sports medicine case was officially opened in the system.']
  case_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the sports medicine case (open, in treatment, cleared, closed, chronic management).']
  concussion_protocol_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this case involves a concussion and requires adherence to NCAA concussion management protocols (true/false).']
  diagnosis_code varchar [note: 'ICD-10 diagnosis code for the injury or medical condition, used for medical billing and insurance claims.']
  diagnosis_description varchar [note: 'Clinical diagnosis of the injury or medical condition in plain language, as determined by the treating physician or athletic trainer.']
  estimated_recovery_days varchar [note: 'Initial clinical estimate of the number of days until the student-athlete can return to full participation.']
  injury_category varchar [note: 'Broader categorical classification of the injury or condition (e.g., musculoskeletal, neurological, cardiovascular, respiratory, dermatological).']
  injury_date date [note: 'Date when the injury, illness, or medical condition occurred or was first identified.']
  injury_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of how the injury occurred, including circumstances, mechanism, and any contributing factors.']
  injury_time timestamp [note: 'Precise timestamp when the injury or medical event occurred, if known.']
  injury_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the injury or medical condition by type (acute, chronic, overuse, traumatic, illness, concussion, heat-related, cardiac, other). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: acute|chronic|overuse|traumatic|illness|concussion|heat_related|cardiac|other — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  insurance_claim_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the insurance claim filed for this injury or medical condition, if applicable.']
  insurance_claim_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the insurance claim associated with this sports medicine case (not filed, pending, approved, denied, paid, closed).']
  mechanism_of_injury varchar [note: 'Context in which the injury occurred, indicating the activity type (game, practice, conditioning, weight training, non-athletic, unknown).']
  medical_clearance_date date [note: 'Date when the student-athlete received medical clearance to return to full athletic participation.']
  medical_clearance_status varchar [note: 'Current medical clearance status indicating whether the student-athlete is authorized to participate in athletic activities (not cleared, cleared with restrictions, fully cleared, pending evaluation).']
  medical_redshirt_applied_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a medical hardship waiver application has been submitted to the NCAA for this case (true/false).']
  medical_redshirt_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this injury qualifies the student-athlete for a medical hardship waiver (medical redshirt) under NCAA rules (true/false).']
  physician_referral_date date [note: 'Date when the student-athlete was referred to a physician for medical evaluation or treatment.']
  physician_referral_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete was referred to a physician for evaluation or treatment (true/false).']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sports medicine case record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sports medicine case record was last modified in the system.']
  reportable_injury_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this injury must be reported to the NCAA Injury Surveillance System or other regulatory bodies (true/false).']
  return_to_play_protocol varchar [note: 'Structured protocol governing the student-athletes progression back to full athletic participation, including stages and criteria for advancement.']
  return_to_play_stage varchar [note: 'Current stage in the return-to-play progression (initial rest, light activity, sport-specific exercise, non-contact practice, full contact practice, unrestricted participation).']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Clinical assessment of injury severity (minor, moderate, severe, catastrophic) based on expected recovery time and impact on participation.']
  treating_athletic_trainer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the certified athletic trainer managing this case.']
  treating_physician_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the physician who evaluated or treated the student-athlete.']
  treatment_plan varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the treatment plan including therapeutic interventions, rehabilitation protocols, medications, and activity restrictions.']

  Note: 'Master record for a student-athlete\'s injury, illness, or medical condition managed by the athletics sports medicine staff. Captures student-athlete reference, sport, injury date, injury type, body part affected, mechanism of injury (game/practice/conditioning), diagnosis, treating athletic trainer, physician referral flag, treatment plan, return-to-play protocol stage, medical clearance status, medical redshirt eligibility flag, and insurance claim reference.'
}

Table athletics.drug_test {
  drug_test_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the drug test record. Primary key for the drug test entity.']
  primary_drug_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the institutional staff member (typically compliance officer or athletic director) who notified the student-athlete of the test result.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: Drug testing programs governed by specific NCAA/conference regulations and institutional policies. Real business process: testing protocols, substance lists, and sanction procedures must comply with s']
  research_irb_protocol_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.irb_protocol. Business justification: Links drug testing data used in IRB-approved research (epidemiological studies, substance use patterns, testing efficacy research). Required for research compliance when de-identified testing data is ']
  retest_drug_test_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on drug_test (retest_drug_test_id)']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to athletics.sport. Business justification: drug_test is conducted for student-athletes in a specific sport. Currently uses sport_code/sport_name but lacks FK to sport master table. Adding sport_id enables JOIN to retrieve sport_name and other ']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student-athlete who was tested. Links to the student-athlete master record.']
  appeal_decision_date date [note: 'The date on which a final decision was rendered on the student-athlete\'s appeal. Null if appeal is pending or no appeal was filed.']
  appeal_filed_date date [note: 'The date on which the student-athlete submitted a formal appeal of the test result or sanction. Null if no appeal was filed.']
  appeal_filed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete filed a formal appeal of the positive test result or imposed sanction.']
  appeal_status varchar [note: 'The current status of the appeal process: pending (under review), upheld (original decision affirmed), overturned (decision reversed), withdrawn (athlete withdrew appeal), or dismissed (appeal rejected on procedural grounds). Null if no appeal was filed.']
  b_sample_requested_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete requested analysis of the B sample (confirmatory sample) following a positive A sample result, as permitted under NCAA and WADA protocols.']
  b_sample_result varchar [note: 'The outcome of the B sample analysis: confirmed (positive result verified), not confirmed (positive result not verified), not requested (athlete did not request B sample analysis), or pending (analysis in progress).']
  chain_of_custody_number varchar [note: 'Unique tracking number documenting the handling and transfer of the specimen from collection through analysis and storage.']
  collection_site_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code identifying the collection site or facility where the sample was obtained.']
  concentration_level varchar [note: 'The measured concentration or quantity of the detected substance in the specimen, typically expressed in ng/mL or other laboratory units. Applicable for positive results.']
  games_missed varchar [note: 'The number of contests or competitions the student-athlete was ineligible to participate in due to the drug test sanction.']
  laboratory_accreditation_number varchar [note: 'Accreditation identifier for the testing laboratory, confirming compliance with WADA or NCAA standards.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, special circumstances, or administrative notes related to the drug test event, result, or sanction process.']
  notification_date date [note: 'The date on which the student-athlete was officially notified of a positive test result or other adverse finding.']
  notification_method varchar [note: 'The method by which the student-athlete was notified of the test result (in-person, phone, email, certified mail, or other).']
  positive_substance_name varchar [note: 'The specific banned substance or metabolite detected in a positive test result. Null if test result is negative.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this drug test record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this drug test record was last modified in the system.']
  result_reported_date date [note: 'The date on which the laboratory reported the test results to the institution or governing body.']
  sanction_imposed varchar [note: 'Description of the penalty or sanction imposed on the student-athlete as a result of a positive test (e.g., suspension from competition, loss of eligibility, mandatory counseling, withholding of financial aid). Null if no sanction was imposed.']
  specimen_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned to the biological specimen for chain of custody tracking and laboratory processing.']
  specimen_type varchar [note: 'The type of biological specimen collected for testing (urine, blood, saliva, or hair).']
  substance_class varchar [note: 'The category or class of the detected substance (e.g., stimulant, anabolic agent, cannabinoid, narcotic, diuretic, masking agent). Applicable for positive results.']
  substances_tested varchar [note: 'List or description of the substance classes or specific substances included in the testing panel (e.g., stimulants, anabolic agents, cannabinoids, narcotics, diuretics, masking agents).']
  suspension_end_date date [note: 'The date on which a suspension or eligibility withholding sanction ends, allowing the student-athlete to return to competition. Applicable if a suspension was imposed.']
  suspension_start_date date [note: 'The date on which a suspension or eligibility withholding sanction begins. Applicable if a suspension was imposed.']
  test_date date [note: 'The date on which the drug test sample was collected from the student-athlete.']
  test_location varchar [note: 'The physical location or facility where the drug test sample was collected.']
  test_result varchar [note: 'The outcome of the drug test: negative (no banned substances detected), positive (banned substance detected), dilute (sample concentration too low), invalid (sample compromised), refused (athlete declined to provide sample), or pending (results not yet available).']
  test_time timestamp [note: 'The precise timestamp when the drug test sample was collected, including time zone information.']
  test_type varchar [note: 'The category of drug test administered: random selection, reasonable suspicion, championship event, post-season, pre-season, or follow-up testing.']
  testing_laboratory_name varchar [note: 'Name of the certified laboratory that performed the drug test analysis.']
  testing_program varchar [note: 'The governing body or program under which the drug test was administered (NCAA, conference, institutional, NAIA, or other).']
  therapeutic_use_exemption_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the student-athlete has an approved Therapeutic Use Exemption for the detected substance, which may mitigate or nullify a positive result.']
  threshold_exceeded_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the detected substance concentration exceeded the NCAA or WADA reporting threshold, triggering a positive result.']
  tue_approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the Therapeutic Use Exemption was approved by the NCAA or institutional medical authority. Null if no TUE applies.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a mandatory drug or substance testing event for a student-athlete under NCAA, conference, or institutional drug testing programs. Captures student-athlete reference, sport, test date, testing program (NCAA/conference/institutional), test type (random/reasonable suspicion/post-season/pre-season), substances tested, result (negative/positive/dilute/refused), chain of custody reference, positive finding notification date, sanction imposed, and appeal status.'
}

Table athletics.booster {
  booster_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the booster record. Primary key for the booster entity.']
  donor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to advancement.donor. Business justification: Boosters are often donors to the institution. This FK links athletic boosters to the advancement donor master record, enabling unified donor relationship management across athletics and advancement. T']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the athletics compliance staff member assigned to monitor and manage this booster relationship.']
  primary_sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  referred_by_booster_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on booster (referred_by_booster_id)']
  third_party_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.third_party_contract. Business justification: Boosters/donors establish third-party payment contracts for student-athletes (corporate sponsors, booster clubs paying tuition). Business tracks booster-funded scholarships through third-party billing']
  training_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.training_program. Business justification: Boosters required to complete compliance briefings on NCAA rules (recruiting restrictions, impermissible benefits, representative of athletics interests designation). Real business process: compliance']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the booster\'s mailing address (street address).']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the booster\'s mailing address (suite, apartment, building).']
  alumni_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster is an alumnus/alumna of the institution.']
  booster_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the booster relationship: active (currently engaged), inactive (no recent activity), suspended (compliance hold), deceased (individual only), or restricted (prohibited from certain activities).']
  booster_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the booster entity type: individual person, corporate entity, foundation, organization, alumni association, or booster club.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of the booster\'s mailing address.']
  classification_date date [note: 'Date when the individual or organization was officially classified as a booster under NCAA/NAIA definitions.']
  club_member_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster is a member of an official athletics booster club or support organization.']
  compliance_briefing_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster has successfully completed the required NCAA/NAIA compliance education and briefing.']
  compliance_briefing_date date [note: 'Date when the booster completed the most recent NCAA/NAIA compliance education and briefing.']
  compliance_briefing_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster is required to complete NCAA/NAIA compliance education and briefing based on their level of involvement.']
  compliance_incident_count varchar [note: 'Total number of compliance incidents or violations associated with this booster.']
  compliance_incident_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster has been associated with any NCAA/NAIA compliance incidents or violations.']
  compliance_restriction_details varchar [note: 'Description of any compliance-related restrictions currently imposed on the booster, including scope and duration.']
  compliance_restriction_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster is currently subject to any compliance-related restrictions on their involvement with the athletics program.']
  corporate_sponsor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster (typically corporate or foundation type) has entered into sponsorship agreements with the athletics program.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the booster\'s mailing address.']
  donor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster has made financial contributions to the athletics program or related entities.']
  former_student_athlete_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster was a former student-athlete at the institution.']
  individual_first_name varchar [note: 'First name of the booster if booster_type is individual. Null for corporate/foundation boosters.']
  individual_last_name varchar [note: 'Last name of the booster if booster_type is individual. Null for corporate/foundation boosters.']
  individual_middle_name varchar [note: 'Middle name or initial of the booster if booster_type is individual. Null for corporate/foundation boosters.']
  involvement_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of booster involvement with the athletics program: donor (financial contributor), volunteer (time/service), ticket holder (season ticket purchaser), sponsor (corporate sponsorship), board member (booster club leadership), or multiple (combination of types).']
  last_compliance_incident_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance incident or violation associated with this booster.']
  last_contribution_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of the most recent financial contribution made by the booster.']
  last_contribution_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent financial contribution made by the booster.']
  next_compliance_briefing_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the booster must complete their next compliance education and briefing to maintain active status.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes regarding the booster relationship, involvement history, special considerations, or compliance observations.']
  organization_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the organization, corporation, foundation, or booster club if booster_type is not individual. Null for individual boosters.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the booster\'s mailing address.']
  primary_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for booster communication and compliance notifications.']
  primary_phone varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the booster.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this booster record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this booster record was last updated in the system.']
  season_ticket_holder_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster currently holds or has held season tickets for athletics events.']
  secondary_sport_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of additional sport codes the booster supports or is involved with beyond the primary sport.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the booster\'s mailing address.']
  total_lifetime_contributions decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative total dollar amount of all financial contributions made by the booster to the athletics program since classification date. Summary field for reporting purposes.']
  volunteer_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the booster has volunteered time or services to the athletics program.']

  Note: 'Master record for individuals and organizations classified as institutional boosters under NCAA/NAIA definitions — those who have promoted, assisted, or been involved with the athletics program. Captures booster name, organization, booster type (individual/corporate/foundation), classification date, sport(s) associated, financial contribution history summary, involvement type (donor/volunteer/ticket holder/sponsor), compliance briefing completion status, and any compliance incident associations.'
}

Table athletics.nil_activity {
  nil_activity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the NIL activity record. Primary key for the nil_activity product.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the compliance staff member who conducted the institutional review of this NIL activity.']
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_requirement. Business justification: NIL activities must comply with state laws and NCAA interim policy. Real business process: institutional review of NIL disclosures requires verification against specific regulatory requirements (state']
  sport_id varchar [note: 'FK to athletics.sport']
  student_athlete_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the student-athlete who entered into this NIL activity or agreement.']
  superseded_nil_activity_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on nil_activity (superseded_nil_activity_id)']
  activity_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description of the NIL activity, including the nature of services to be performed, deliverables, promotional obligations, and any other relevant details of the agreement.']
  activity_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or tracking number assigned to this NIL activity for institutional reference and reporting purposes.']
  activity_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the NIL activity (e.g., active and ongoing, completed, cancelled before start, suspended, terminated early).']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the type of NIL activity or agreement entered into by the student-athlete (e.g., endorsement, social media promotion, personal appearance, autograph session, camp instruction, licensing, merchandise, media production). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: endorsement|social_media|appearance|autograph|camp|licensing|merchandise|media|other — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  agreement_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the NIL agreement expires or terminates. Nullable for open-ended or ongoing agreements.']
  agreement_start_date date [note: 'The date on which the NIL agreement becomes effective and the student-athlete begins performing under the terms of the agreement.']
  compensation_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code representing the currency in which the estimated compensation value is denominated (e.g., USD for United States Dollar).']
  compensation_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the form of compensation provided under the NIL agreement (e.g., cash payment, goods, services, equity stake, mixed compensation).']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes from the compliance office regarding this NIL activity, including any concerns, follow-up actions, or special conditions imposed.']
  conflict_of_interest_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity presents a potential conflict of interest with institutional sponsors, partners, or values (e.g., competing brand, prohibited industry).']
  conflict_of_interest_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes describing any identified conflict of interest, the nature of the conflict, and any mitigation steps taken.']
  disclosure_date date [note: 'The date on which the student-athlete disclosed this NIL activity to the institution for compliance review and record-keeping purposes.']
  disclosure_method varchar [note: 'The method or channel through which the student-athlete disclosed the NIL activity to the institution (e.g., online portal, email submission, paper form, verbal notification).']
  estimated_compensation_value decimal(15,2) [note: 'The estimated total monetary value or fair market value of compensation the student-athlete will receive under this NIL agreement, including cash payments, goods, services, or other benefits.']
  institutional_marks_approval_status varchar [note: 'Status of institutional approval for the use of institutional trademarks or marks in this NIL activity (e.g., not applicable, pending approval, approved, denied).']
  institutional_marks_used_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the NIL activity involves the use of institutional trademarks, logos, uniforms, or other intellectual property owned by the institution.']
  institutional_review_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the institutional compliance review of this NIL activity (e.g., pending review, reviewed, approved, flagged for concern, rejected, under investigation).']
  ncaa_nil_policy_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity complies with NCAA Name, Image, and Likeness interim policy and guidelines.']
  ncaa_policy_version varchar [note: 'Version or effective date reference of the NCAA NIL policy under which this activity was reviewed and approved.']
  pay_for_play_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity was flagged as potentially constituting impermissible pay-for-play compensation tied to athletic participation or performance.']
  quid_pro_quo_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity was flagged as potentially being a quid pro quo arrangement tied to enrollment, athletic performance, or recruiting inducement, which would violate NCAA policy.']
  record_created_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system process that created this NIL activity record.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when this NIL activity record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when this NIL activity record was last modified or updated in the system.']
  review_date date [note: 'The date on which the institutional compliance office completed its review of this NIL activity.']
  state_nil_law_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity complies with applicable state Name, Image, and Likeness laws and regulations in the jurisdiction where the institution is located.']
  state_nil_law_reference varchar [note: 'Citation or reference to the specific state NIL law or statute that governs this activity (e.g., California SB 206, Florida HB 7003).']
  tax_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this NIL activity requires tax reporting (e.g., IRS Form 1099-MISC or 1099-NEC) due to the value of compensation received.']
  termination_date date [note: 'The date on which the NIL agreement was terminated or cancelled, if applicable. Nullable for agreements that were completed or are still active.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text explanation of the reason for early termination or cancellation of the NIL agreement (e.g., compliance violation, mutual agreement, breach of contract).']
  third_party_entity_name varchar [note: 'Name of the third-party individual, business, or organization that is party to the NIL agreement with the student-athlete.']
  third_party_entity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the third-party entity type (e.g., individual, corporation, limited liability company, partnership, nonprofit organization, NIL collective). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: individual|corporation|llc|partnership|nonprofit|collective|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) activity or agreement entered into by a student-athlete. Captures student-athlete reference, sport, NIL activity type (endorsement/social media/appearance/autograph/camp/licensing), third-party entity name, agreement start date, agreement end date, estimated compensation value, disclosure date, institutional review status (reviewed/approved/flagged), state NIL law compliance flag, and NCAA NIL policy compliance flag.'
}
